name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Will you join me in saying thank you to our nation's educators, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Happy National Teacher Appreciation Day!!
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62708364/404299299/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg0MjY4ZGItNGRlOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X4nxaADc_S3985-3-BUi1OQZXNasbWVFC3v-R9BslvA=&emci=c40d23aa-26e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=084268db-4de9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Happy National Teacher Appreciation Day, Peter!

As the son of two public school teachers, I am deeply and personally grateful for the work that our educators put in every single day.

Not only have they taken on the awesome responsibility of educating our nation's next generation of leaders, but they have also played an integral role in supporting our students through many of the challenges they've faced over the past few years.

From weathering the COVID-19 pandemic to dealing with politicians seeking to politicize the classroom, there's no question that American educators have stepped up in ways beyond what is already expected of them _**(which is a lot)**_. That's why today, especially, I want to uplift our educators and thank them for their hard work.

**[Peter: On this National Teacher Appreciation Day, will you join me in expressing your gratitude and supporting our educators by adding your name to our thank you card?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62708365/404299300/711748803?ms=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hsk3SfPAeWI49DAfJBuXQmLKtE4hFZC1740D0ax3IJpUWgCZQvQL3AgrLVmYuPcy/pB8wAkAtUQBvVdsNBrDhOuBT79KYWPoGA0B+y8L+LC4FeFzLa6vfoI1Orx4U+tQvS3ogztGr1mnnlhiJViUWWAiVU/+6faIeEQ99bikoM4=&refcode2=084268db-4de9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg0MjY4ZGItNGRlOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X4nxaADc_S3985-3-BUi1OQZXNasbWVFC3v-R9BslvA=&emci=c40d23aa-26e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=084268db-4de9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

I remain incredibly proud of what we've been able to accomplish in Congress to support our educators — from leading 100+ members in calling for American leadership to support global education, to securing over $12.5 million for rural schools in Washington state. **But I know our work is far from over.**

Look, I have always believed that education is the doorway to economic opportunity. And by empowering and supporting our teachers, we can set up our kids for future success. That's why I'll never stop fighting for our teachers in Congress.

**[I hope you'll join me in thanking our nation's teachers by signing our thank you card today ⇒](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62708366/404299301/711748803?ms=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hsk3SfPAeWI49DAfJBuXQmLKtE4hFZC1740D0ax3IJpUWgCZQvQL3AgrLVmYuPcy/pB8wAkAtUQBvVdsNBrDhOuBT79KYWPoGA0B+y8L+LC4FeFzLa6vfoI1Orx4U+tQvS3ogztGr1mnnlhiJViUWWAiVU/+6faIeEQ99bikoM4=&refcode2=084268db-4de9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg0MjY4ZGItNGRlOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X4nxaADc_S3985-3-BUi1OQZXNasbWVFC3v-R9BslvA=&emci=c40d23aa-26e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=084268db-4de9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

As always, it's an honor to serve you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62708367/404299302/1071353790?refcode=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230502_tchr_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=084268db-4de9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg0MjY4ZGItNGRlOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X4nxaADc_S3985-3-BUi1OQZXNasbWVFC3v-R9BslvA=)

I recently published my first note on [Substack Notes](https://substack.com/redirect/b5adf3b1-3578-48a7-b576-8ff80ed4577a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and invite you to join me there!
[| | | Shahid Buttar 5dIt's a revealing indictment of the U.S. press establishment that so many media outlets have ignored the findings of renowned investigative journalist Seymour Hersh. His work shames their deference to state-sponsored terrorism and ecocide. https://seymourhersh.substack.com/p/the-cover-up
---
| 4| | |
---|---|---|---](https://substack.com/redirect/0fa45837-03ba-488d-b552-573ad8b07100?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Notes](https://substack.com/redirect/11cf40e1-2ba1-45b7-945a-a5d3d35cc1a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a new space on Substack for us to share links, short posts, quotes, photos, and more. I plan to use it for things that don't fit in the newsletter, like short responses to other authors and posts promoting content by other insightful writers (like Seymour Hersh) whose work I recommend.
[Go to Notes](https://substack.com/redirect/b5adf3b1-3578-48a7-b576-8ff80ed4577a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
### How to join
Head to [substack.com/notes](https://substack.com/redirect/b5adf3b1-3578-48a7-b576-8ff80ed4577a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or find the "Notes" tab in the [Substack app](https://substack.com/redirect/331fa3d3-ce98-4981-a954-e3b74d3502ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As a subscriber to my newsletter, you'll automatically see my notes. Feel free to like, reply, or share them them others!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/376bf979-9739-42a4-9ac9-54c537560f5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You can also share notes of your own. I hope this becomes a space where every reader can share thoughts, ideas, and interesting quotes.
* * *
### Why Substack Notes?
Fellow writers and readers are using Notes for a variety of reasons. For me, it's mostly a matter of supporting a new alternative to co-opted corporate social media platforms that have done incalculable damage to our social fabric.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/facc4295-da1d-4f70-81b4-9e173d441b97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you've shared my concerns about corporate social media platforms like Facebook and Twitter throttling content, surveilling their users, arbitrarily enforcing content moderation rules, or impeding discourse by holding content generators hostage for paid promotion in order to reach our own followers, this new platform offers at least a new way to connect and share ideas.
Time will tell whether Notes proves any different than the platforms that came before it--but given their continuing failures, I am eager to support new challenges to their digital hegemony.
* * *
If you encounter any issues, you can always refer to the [Notes FAQ](https://substack.com/redirect/537c5ab8-3312-4de7-987e-9f7100238846?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for assistance. I look forward to reading your thoughts!
[Go to Notes](https://substack.com/redirect/b5adf3b1-3578-48a7-b576-8ff80ed4577a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Don Huffines
subject: Corporate welfare is BAD for Texans...
body:
It is clear that while property tax abatements do not benefit Texans, they do provide full employment for lobbyists and consultants.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zodtkt-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zodtkt-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **LIBERTY REPORT: Property Tax Abatements**
## _" It is clear that while property tax abatements do not benefit Texans, they do provide full employment for lobbyists and consultants."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zodtkt-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, May 2, 2023 -- Don Huffines' latest Liberty Report [on corporate welfare](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zodtkt-yuddtktydi-j/)** ** is available now. _" This year, the state received a $62 billion surplus of taxpayer dollars. But if you think a return check is coming in the mail, I have some bad news. Instead of broad tax relief, our representatives in Austin--and the sempiternal special interests that direct their votes--have elected to use the funds for corporate welfare."_ [Read More](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zodtkt-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###

name: Al Franken
subject: this is important to me and to our nation

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62708578/404305099/2136661255?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230502_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiY2Y3NDE3LTUwZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VywHZCfgf5z9up3REBAmwoq1jdAWUOtv9bU6RBYX4jY=) Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between UNITEDemocrats and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024. »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62708579/404305100/2136661255?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230502_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiY2Y3NDE3LTUwZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VywHZCfgf5z9up3REBAmwoq1jdAWUOtv9bU6RBYX4jY=)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between UNITEDemocrats and Josh’s campaign today? »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62708580/404305101/2136661255?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230502_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiY2Y3NDE3LTUwZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VywHZCfgf5z9up3REBAmwoq1jdAWUOtv9bU6RBYX4jY=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62708586/404305107/2136661255?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230502_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiY2Y3NDE3LTUwZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VywHZCfgf5z9up3REBAmwoq1jdAWUOtv9bU6RBYX4jY=)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62708587/404305108/2136661255?amount=15&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230502_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiY2Y3NDE3LTUwZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VywHZCfgf5z9up3REBAmwoq1jdAWUOtv9bU6RBYX4jY=)
[Or a custom donation »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62708588/404305109/2136661255?amount=20&amounts=10,15,20&refcode=UD_20230502_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiY2Y3NDE3LTUwZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VywHZCfgf5z9up3REBAmwoq1jdAWUOtv9bU6RBYX4jY=)
This is important to me. And to our nation.

Thanks,

Al

name: Right Wing Report
subject: Avoid Metformin - eat chocolate and butter
body:
Your doctor will call you a “model” patient for this...
* * *
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19049%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8y2cuJdU%2f9COzJ1up8IPEA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19040%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3TTD7we2HJsDt4xVXlMb6Q&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19041%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M34b3LPV8l5MfbITT1%2bw1A&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19042%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JxFTE6OgtbRbWWDlUgudFw&sysid=1)

body:
Take the 2024 Republican Platform Survey >>

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0kvoul151snmneo1tg5qks29bi4ret84hop5i1g_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35cph2bs)

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I'm entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z764jo2de0qh25end933i8io0100oqlgv3unor5o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35cph2bs)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only **WIN** in 2024 when we create an agenda __that best represents the will of the American people.__

You'll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we're counting on your quick response.

**[Please take the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey IMMEDIATELY to represent your area in our critical 2024 Election strategy.>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoounrpq7taok2vk6omu7l6tgniv6db4bla11938_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35cph2bs)**

2024 is the most important election of our lifetime. We can't afford another defeat like the one we had in 2022. Please don't let our Party down, friend. We're counting on you.

**[I need you to complete the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to ensure your response is recorded.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zki7q1e1iq1pnbfoe4qe0plk1qtmt8r7tj885h98_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35cph2bs)**

subject: We need you to STAY on our team.

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh7c18macvreb5lu2u2dlrob5jsi7mtddnt5t2oo_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7c77baroe70g42ai8lcih1ivicho7e16d2bojhg_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbpmei0idfac5gsoa5u9t9rs92oimdfi8i1arheo_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgnr61hspetgpq7p9kbjosrlar787qnicsepk9ro_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zql11ktj73ge07jbsfvnbgu7rukt9fg6qli3iuk0_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq29pt22tfkdhp5v25akmbfkod8a722ia8to9hbo_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ubq6rgjc9r8ah4cd18q3g7eh8cferl2p9084q0_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z99ug9ae95jrgmora05d6ms8g8g71e20f0pdqkl8_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5g74gn036j0d8micpo7n7sp1c1hm9fn5jn8eem0_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkar6n0r560csmlej2e51nq1ijifesh77ir380gg_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o35c9h2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrbofrp59cm3dgl4rf3a3vfpm3c7n8m2dq1ko99o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9v2d5cl49aofrludonspbaeb3ncq7qjgeibfnug_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $25.59?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z145qdse0920gvvpq4dc9r36q3e8as771udg6c78_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2h7sojejld0babneersatmvgh4cluiik1l6h9s8_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs5cv662ab7rvepan1g3rak3t5ssu9t5ovgngsho_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvq5sqimt27evlsr43nk0oe8esinepv393lmh7ig_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $25.59 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrre1d6agas994acssoc8bbjlasihlioabaet4l0_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7nnjjmh72ff7ag684bh2cmkeg9moo9pk89qbheo_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zne04nkfskv6t0g6cj8hltredkmvjp05nspav3kg_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zecfp1m4v4dpks7um1uq0unmd5dbr77m3qh27f08_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $25.59 -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze2nmkk148uluerdt70ctbs2snphrg3mo2s7724g_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5conn1imtht5i66jmgsienu2pa8dnkcttrposj0_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkkqjjfe73s58vt0mmht24dvg70o05ad5a4g12q8_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdhmpt5ih35d0n2t6gj49171gq9m97gbifue8rb8_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg0v1fa524l21g521upqdkrm99louktc1jbrfeh8_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg61o31c9h2bs)
---|---|---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

body:

|

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv6dpms2nd9d7rc6vdi9soqqsfjec3m8hkcd38ao_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg69o70cdh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z12hdm6qhdb8fpnro7ti3fh5dijip3e1no524eqg_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg69o70cdh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zra85mjtp49rkt7ebrhtin6atimojuojb5t7jq2o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg69o70cdh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs4hlbckpkqrhdvfhm3hdpndbuoasak5sh0glc50_rp22sh2s8i66o76chg69o70cdh2bs)
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uMSTR2LLMm8OSWOjDfhi3w&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uMSTR2LLMm8OSWOjDfhi3w&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19159%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ats66iegfegtYAlAObC6lw&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19160%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Co0Fj%2flX1ObdyBh3joc8Kw&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19161%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UcBjYc7ceyuqB8hg59lSag&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: C. Trump
subject: They are targeting me, and I need your help to fight back.
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MzIwIn0/mAHSVhWL68ysJgM3m8Iydg)
---
Fellow American, Trinity University in Texas labeled me "an elevated risk" and forced me to pay "special liability insurance" because my last name is Trump. [**Will you stand with me now and demand the university reverse this?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MzIwIn0/5i93zr7qmyn0cYkAfTiCHg) That's right... before I could step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, was forced to pay for special liability insurance. The Young Conservatives of Texas, who sponsored my speech, told me they have _NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before._ [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MzIwIn0/u2po6X9nWFmuMf01LLid3g)****
---
[ Stand with Speech First](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MzIwIn0/NnyrVlQ4SEV5BLaghCLfPQ)
---
Fellow American, even if I were related to President Trump (I'm not related), Trinity University would still be making a gross misstep and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the "Woke" student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone whom far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation - and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don't think so! [**Fellow American, add your name to Speech First's open letter right now to tell Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision ... and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MzIwIn0/2SFrmR9t9gzJLMlT34nOPw) They want you to think that the issue is over, but their decision sets a dangerous precedent of discrimination on campus. I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support!
---
Cherise TrumpExecutive DirectorSpeech First
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MzIwIn0/X9aKpPP0czxf3Y5pfLgGVA)
---
[Stand with Speech First](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MzIwIn0/iSzNsaNfVvEHaHGirJ5xMg)
---
1300 I St NW Suite 400EWashington, DC 20005
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTIzLTY5NTYyNjVlODU4NzQ4M2ViNDk4NzkxOWU2YjI5MDg4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/RRW70k3Sxqik-B0rVqthwA) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: this is important to me and to the nation
body:
Congressional pickup opportunity
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce36d1a1-cbe8-4707-bc83-d9cc93c73b5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc50015e1-ba45-42e3-a3f8-152c6e99ae04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, it’s Al Franken. [I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2589afea-ea92-4b5d-ba45-796dada5888a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. [Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta64efe33-3f16-4485-9afb-4d62692885a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9245fe23-9286-4136-b100-938efa9044c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. [So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T690caac5-8122-4c6c-9c88-8957d0576b45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al [P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! DONATE HERE.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee7b0132-6217-4dd9-8af0-e96c34fd474f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Roger R. Ream, TFAS
subject: Download Rand Paul’s FREE eBook today!
body:
Friend, It's no secret that many young people don't understand the dangers of socialism.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTIzLWQ1MmY5YmQyZjZjZjRjNjFiMDVhMTY3MzM3ZWZiZDgzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvM3BydzB3cWI1ND91dG1fc291cmNlPVNQTzM4MzIzIn0/89FuyGkZOjdvPmYf4XMZWA)
---
Friend, Every day, the importance of our freedoms becomes ever more apparent.

Because unfortunately, socialism continues to grow in popularity among young people.
In no small part because they're completely unaware of its terrible track record. And that means it sounds perfect to many of America's youth.

Today, many American leaders who should know better continue to praise this ideology. Let's be clear: a future with socialism is not pretty. Countries that crush their free markets end up poorer. And they frequently fall prey to cruel dictatorships that ruin individual liberties as well.

That's why it's essential to learn why socialism doesn't work and why free markets do.

So Friend, we've decided to publish Senator Rand Paul's lecture on the importance of freedom and government restraint.

| Peter, Go woke go broke. Companies like Coca Cola, Nike, and Bud Light figured that giving into the far left's propaganda and embracing corporate wokism would make them a LOT of money... Boy, were they wrong! In fact, Bud Light's recent parody of an ad campaign has resulted in a whopping 26.1% dip in sales volume year over year. “The shocking deterioration of Bud Light Blue’s market share continued apace through the third week of April — and actually somehow worsened. We’ve never seen such a dramatic shift in national share in such a short period of time,” Beer Business Daily wrote on it’s website.
Our voices are being heard and we must continue the pressure! You've probably heard of the Common Sense Club by now—we are an organization of like-minded Americans fighting to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: An unfair and illegitimate attack
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
It should not be a huge surprise what the liberal media is doing to conservative justices. |
---
Fellow American - Democrats and their allies in the media are teaming up to smear conservative justices on the Supreme Court.

Yesterday, the Senate Judiciary Committee held a hearing in which I tried my best to expose their double standard when it comes to conservative judges. By the way, the mainstream media is cherry picking stories and you know they have an ulterior motive.

Just take a look at this headline from the liberal news outlet, _The New Republic_ :

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61764461:sKaJj7DrN:m:1:877327319:3BC95B75B829EC363064E676A7D018A1:r)
They disagree with the conservative rulings coming from the Supreme Court so they are coming after conservative justices. But the media is not using the same standard for the justices appointed by Democrat presidents.

| [** STAND WITH CONSERVATIVES -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61764461:sKaJj7DrN:m:1:877327319:3BC95B75B829EC363064E676A7D018A1:r)
---

Democrats want to delegitimize a conservative court that was appointed through the traditional process.

The only way the Left can achieve their goal of packing the court with liberal judges is to smear the conservatives. We can't let them win.

The Dems' response to conservative Supreme Court rulings? **PACK THE COURTS.** Elections have consequences, Fellow American. Don't let the Left and liberal media attack our judicial system.

**[Add your name to show the Left that these unfair attacks won't go unanswered.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61764461:sKaJj7DrN:m:1:877327319:3BC95B75B829EC363064E676A7D018A1:r)**

Fellow American, Senate Democrats' selective outrage is blatantly obvious here and we won't stand for it. **[Show your support for the conservative court today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61764461:sKaJj7DrN:m:1:877327319:3BC95B75B829EC363064E676A7D018A1:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61764461:sKaJj7DrN:m:1:877327319:3BC95B75B829EC363064E676A7D018A1:r)
Lindsey Graham

[** STAND WITH CONSERVATIVES -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61764461:sKaJj7DrN:m:1:877327319:3BC95B75B829EC363064E676A7D018A1:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61764462:sKaJj7DrN:m:1:877327319:3BC95B75B829EC363064E676A7D018A1:r)

He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

name: The Flyover
subject: Biden Sends in the Army, Late-Night TV Cancelled, Near-Death Experiences Explained
body:

## Biden Orders Troops to Mexico Border
The Biden administration is [sending 1,500 US troops](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSpCAQQL9GMyxowHMCg0vM5tILLYRm7C0EC3rG3b_fmo03fi949f7f17ujRPnxzx04cyyr80wvXKUVUgvQK_RhjoiAusdZjZNWSk9W9fscrQkI1npw8TaBh-DCdgubuuEIcpM9zSBBSyu1klIpOxiFOoKcgho3Y7zpjMRAXOrwUSjzjjF9lRfWwZejT_POfLZO_-1g6WC5rmuI5TPj1d68g-UsiZh862DZKGAWLhyUqXF1TCULX3KjgLWJhjlQfghlpRTPJriWcjaxlRqwCrejCyJR5LfDxAmFAdHKs3psfZ3DeVFK1MY_nZGPw1H6KeTfh30HAAD__956b9A) to the Mexican border in response to a flood of illegal migrants. The key date for the US is May 11, which is when the Covid-era travel restrictions of [Title 42 officially end](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2v4yAQAH-N3TlaFjC4oLgmXa690uJjifeEjYW5RPfvn_LqV46mGc2fx_rwXPh4_vY7uZ7r6mPnF62gJ5ATyhXH5DIRkhzJidlKIaTVYtxcsiqhCQo0ikhWSWMW780ibA7zEmFkh4ASNEgBIIS-KUEyI9gk5qBUVIMCStxru_2tfPSNcvlfX9Ruse5jcVvv5zXIXwPeB7z786D39VEfaJ1joQHvgRMdE-87P5vvXI-pt1rPa7rqv75RO6ZQW6I2zZaiSqhzsCYogbMGsXjIOSF4Y9XYXDrfXApfsxkUPHfP5buk_zzmKwAA___6TWMd). The expiration of those rules, which allowed the US to quickly return tens of thousands of people trying to cross the border, is expected to draw a new wave of migrants. The White House has come under fire for the chaos of its immigration policy, though it continues to call it a success. [Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LlygzAQgOGnEZ0YnRyFijR0TpuSWaMF1tbBCMUkb59J6tR_88_3cZtvQIHS9g4RXV3zDEulF87CcqG50rNqvFsRFeoGnewGLaUerGx2N3p77xffdb0WGrqltxZwAD1IA3LssSGnhNLCCi2FkNK2RqJelRi87O7GLIYZgZ5qLu0jU6o7ruE7v7C0S45NcHutx8n0G1MTU9N1Xe2avxJe529naoroCZianlAoIX8gJH4QloK8ZDgrer4EoEhp4xQCbhA4xUhbgUo58VHwA_MRkNed0pOf9fMg3xTnj4tCoLPrmRFbBAp_R_V_oJ8AAAD__zzpaXs) drew ridicule this week for claiming that illegal immigration was down 90 percent under Biden.
## Blue States Losing Billions to Red States
New York and California [lost over $90 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v9CAQhH8N7rCWBX9cQfE27u5tU1qA1-dNMJxsdOT-feTUaaaZ0ejR83Gf744jp8d_t5Mta55dKPyiGToJWqKesVnsSoSkG7KqH7VSeuxUs1mnyQ9w64MfjSfS3XIDb4bxphXRoLBhi4AaOtAKQKmuNYr0ijAuqvfGBCMM0MIlH-1n5lQ2WuM7v-hoQ96baLdSnqfQ_wROAqdaaxuSD1cpcLquBU7QXYECp0RVvvPxJYOLvOYjsZMxnyQ9x8g5nZKT5BTyTrJkGXOVxX3Ls7hCZ7uVPTaHXZ71Wp_9IAw8dsfxl6X8reYnAAD__3xWZIk) in revenue during Covid as the flight to red states accelerated, according to new IRS data. Along with Illinois, these high-tax states appear to be hemorrhaging [high-income residents,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LtugzAUgOGngc3INwgZPHRhS9eOyNjHcCJfIh8nNG9ftXP3f_j1fd3Wm8WIef-0CUwLZbWu4QtWPjKumFSr7L0JABJUD0ZMsxJCzaPoDwNiApDzZDU4Ya9umvUWOIwXmMarc9cejeRS8ZErwbkQ46AFqCD57MW0ae10pzl4bKUO94K5HRDiu7ygDq6kPpqjtQd16qOTSyeX8zyHUL63J2EGot-mkwu4kkt6d3JJ9l4q2-ITGDXbgNgBqdR62B3zzqy_P6mBZ3stRAyzKwlYBUIPuRELEYBhJeZts4yOclJfjX-cGCPSdOk035PF-PfW_qf6CQAA__-Q-27L) who moved with their money to low-tax states such as Florida, Texas, and Indiana. The top 15 cities by rate of population growth are now concentrated in red states. The other problem for the blue states is the [difference in income](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1y6yAQRp8GdWhg-bm6BYVTqHOKNC41a7RYZBB4BLLit8_YddrvO8WZczlPZ4wp5tsnruRaKBP6Fh80CcOF4qAm6GYXiIBUR07aQUmpBiO7xanBa4NaGwzBovSD1daL_8EquKKh0EUHApQwQkkhpDS9lqQCiGGW9qq110wLmmMrW_9dYm4LhfQsD9p6X9YuuaW1e2XqxGBkMB7H0a81vz4GI2W-VwbjWjI9GYy-rHfMkV5bW4hf0068NmzE6afMe-XoPSXasL0Z3PjpJHH_unx0m5vvR0wpVvuPaXFbMaa3Qvu7yG8AAAD__8SQYk4) between newcomers and emigrants. The IRS data shows that the people leaving Illinois and New York make on average $30,000-$40,000 more than the new residents moving in.
## Writers Picket as TV Shows Go Dark
Late-night TV shows [begin reruns tonight](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO2zAQBNCvoToZu1xJpgoVAQx3d1WAlAJFrqVNSFEg6RP894GDlFfOm2rm18f8YSXIvn7ayFN9pNm6Kl88Q98CtZpm3fjpwayZGp5wMIRIpsdmm4j0Mnj0uDh7ZTOSG70ZOwNjB1et-0YmDZqgB0IAxP7SIdNDg_E4LF3nOtUBe6kpX34n2evGj_BKX5wvLsUmTFutR1H0Q-m70nd77HyWd_UOuYoLrPT9zFI5l7bULH-43VIIrzMl356rbUc94HXUBg0QIyzoe0Dv7DISE_Re0f1Z41zSMztWdNtS5MOurPTw9shenlHR7Wc6Pvks_9nZeFhZd0W3IxWpkvYZhiZP_jglBCnDVXWwRivh35L6_bF_AwAA__82Xnkd) as Hollywood writers go on strike. The writers [began picketing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAUhZ8Gb1jcy4-dgaGLt3TtaDn4EtMQEwEN8ttXaZcO3c45OsOn7-M8n5cQw359X-5kq0_z4mp40iw0F5KjnLFbrSdCkh1ZMKMEkKOGbrPKOES_GAVE4E4DaBi9FAoH44Q3ugsWBUqhhQQhAHSvgKRHMa5gLko5xZSgNdSU-88U9rqRj0d6Uu5dunfRbrU-CpNvDCeGU2ut31KMR0tpzfRIuf4-GU6XrxJ2KuVP5Du1V285VMqFl5rDjV4rP1K-cRfqwS8xuRsHlFoNI5xGhlOX7fpoIcZQzMCUuN6XEH-A6v9-vgMAAP__YdNnMg) in an effort to win the PR war against producers, and they filled an entire New York City block on Fifth Avenue with signs and marchers. clean_body: The Biden administration is sending 1,500 US troops to the Mexican border in response to a flood of illegal migrants. The Biden administration is sending 1,500 US troops to the Mexican border in response to a flood of illegal migrants. | | | | | | Wednesday, May 3, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering US troops headed to the Mexican border, late-night TV writers going on strike, and the mysterious moments of a near-death experience. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | Biden Orders Troops to Mexico Border The Biden administration is to the Mexican border in response to a flood of illegal migrants. The key date for the US is May 11, which is when the Covid-era travel restrictions of . The expiration of those rules, which allowed the US to quickly return tens of thousands of people trying to cross the border, is expected to draw a new wave of migrants. The White House has come under fire for the chaos of its immigration policy, though it continues to call it a success. drew ridicule this week for claiming that illegal immigration was down 90 percent under Biden. Blue States Losing Billions to Red States New York and California in revenue during Covid as the flight to red states accelerated, according to new IRS data. Along with Illinois, these high-tax states appear to be hemorrhaging who moved with their money to low-tax states such as Florida, Texas, and Indiana. The top 15 cities by rate of population growth are now concentrated in red states. The other problem for the blue states is the between newcomers and emigrants. The IRS data shows that the people leaving Illinois and New York make on average $30,000-$40,000 more than the new residents moving in. Writers Picket as TV Shows Go Dark Late-night TV shows as Hollywood writers go on strike. Streaming services will avoid disruption for now but if the strike is a long one. The writers in an effort to win the PR war against producers, and they filled an entire New York City block on Fifth Avenue with signs and marchers. The strike will affect individual shows differently. To help readers keep up, Variety maintains an of shows being impacted. ➤ AOC joined the chorus of Democrats calling for 89-year-old Dianne Feinstein to retire. Sen. Feinstein says she's hopeful she can return to the Senate next week after a health-related leave, but Senate Dems want her gone before her term ends. () ➤ Will Joe Manchin run for president as a third-party candidate with the bipartisan No Labels political group? Democrats worry that he will, but the West Virginia Dem says he won't decide anything until the end of the year. () ➤ Fox News named its weekend anchor Lawrence Jones as Tucker Carlson's next rotating replacement, beginning Monday. At the same time, conservative outlet Newsmax is reportedly wooing Carlson himself with a promise that he can program the whole channel, not just his show. () ➤ Republican leaders agree to meet with President Biden on May 9 to work on the debt ceiling impasse. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen has warned the country could run out of money to pay bills by June 1 if nothing is done. () ➤ The Big 12 Conference plans to expand into Mexico for regular season football and basketball games--perhaps as early as next year. The conference is looking to sign a multi-year contract for international expansion, with an announcement expected Wednesday. () ➤ Ohio regulators halted betting on all Alabama college baseball games after "suspicious wagering activity" was detected. Las Vegas gambling watchdog company US Integrity sounded the alarm after seeing suspicious betting on Alabama's game this weekend against top-ranked LSU. () ➤ This year 's Super Bowl LVII is now the most-watched game ever, according to revised ratings data from Nielson. The Chiefs' victory over the Eagles in February was actually viewed by a record 115 million viewers, 2 million more than Nielson previously reported. () Market Report 5/2/23 | ▼ | Nasdaq Natl. Staple Street Capital invested $38 million in Dominion in 2018 and will earn about $600 million from the settlement. () ➤ Samsung Electronics banned workplace use of ChatGPT and other AI chatbots after some of its proprietary code leaked because of employees using AI for work tasks. It joins other companies that have banned the workplace use of AI engines. () ➤ Coca-Cola shareholders overwhelmingly rejected a proposal to survey quality-of-life issues in pro-life states in an effort to convince Coke to do less business there. The defeated proposal was pushed by a non-profit company that promotes environmental and social governance policies for companies. () ➤ Surgeon General Vivek Murthy issued an advisory plan to combat widespread loneliness in America, comparing the health dangers of social loneliness to smoking a dozen cigarettes a day. () ➤ Adult website PornHub has blocked all Utah viewers to protest a new state law requiring porn sites to verify users' ages via a digital ID card. The adult site claims the state's solution puts children's privacy at risk. () ➤ The strange near-death sensations some people have reported are likely the product of unusually energetic gamma-wave brain activity discovered in dying people hooked to EEGs, according to new research. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: [URGENT] 18 more responses needed to help save Rusty's wolf pack!
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | Rusty, a rare and endangered Mexican gray wolf, was just quietly MURDERED | |
---
| | | **Should the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service do more to protect endangered Mexican gray wolves?**
---
[ ](http://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1754006?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | | [YES](http://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1754006?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| [NO](http://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1754006?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**This link has been generated specifically for you. Please do not share with anyone else. Responses submitted after 11:59 p.m. on May 3 will not be considered._
---
We can’t let this keep happening, friend.
**Rusty, a rare and endangered Mexican gray wolf, was just quietly MURDERED by the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service. Now, he’ll never meet his newborn pups – and his surviving pack members are even more likely to die from senseless slaughter!**
Why? Because instead of listening to science, government officials are taking sides with Big Meat and Dairy to eliminate wolves and maximize livestock industry profits. Mexican wolves are a unique and vital subspecies of gray wolves, and they were once abundant in our wilderness. **But for decades they’ve been unfairly and inaccurately blamed for cattle deaths and TRAPPED, POISONED and KILLED BY TROPHY HUNTERS to the brink of EXTINCTION!** Now, we’re running out of time to save them.
**Even worse, bloodthirsty trophy hunters are lobbying to strip this majestic species of federal protections under the Endangered Species Act. Meaning these vulnerable wolves could be subject to violent shootings, choking snares and even helicopter chases!** If the trophy hunting lobby succeeds, our surviving wolves may be WIPED OUT and their habitats could be completely opened to ecological destruction.
Evidence-based conservation methods already exist to protect wolves and our ecosystems from the greedy livestock industry and brutal hunters. **But it’s going to take a massive public outcry to put that evidence into action and save our wolves and their crucial habitats while we still can!**
**That’s why we urgently need 18 more responses from your area before our deadline at midnight tonight. But yours is still missing! Please – before we lose Rusty’s pups to needless killing – tell us now:**
| | **Should the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service do more to protect endangered Mexican gray wolves?** ** **
---
| | | [YES](http://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1754006?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| [NO](http://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1754006?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

_**This link has been generated specifically for you. Please do not share with anyone else. Responses submitted after 11:59 p.m. on May 3 will not be considered._

Your email address -- dpwillis67@gmail.com -- just got **chosen to receive a 10-Million Volt Pocket Stun Gun FREE.**

**_Here’s why you got chosen to get this Free:_**

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ had an overstock of these pocket stun guns in their warehouse... so they decided to give some of them away as a little “guerrilla marketing” campaign.

So to give everyone a **fair shot** to get one... we shuffled everyone’s email addresses and _chose a handful of winners at random._

**And dpwillis67@gmail.com got chosen!**

That’s a pretty big deal, since these pocket stun guns ** _sell for $69+_** on Amazon.

Over 132,000 other Americans have **gladly paid full price** for this... since it can turn a 260lb thug into a whimpering pile in two seconds flat.

But luckily for you...

[You can get it FREE](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3767/6374453/dabcd956fbb1e05daa404591ebf432cb7bc3ae58/7b0e588f15aafbfd4ac952a543e367eb29307874) since your email got chosen today.

Just **one small catch** here...

You’ll need to [claim your Free Pocket Stun Guns IMMEDIATELY](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3767/6374453/dabcd956fbb1e05daa404591ebf432cb7bc3ae58/7b0e588f15aafbfd4ac952a543e367eb29307874) if you want it.

If you don’t claim it within 4 hours...

We’ll simply take that to mean you **weren’t interested** \-- and then select another eligible winner to receive it Free.

So don’t dilly dally.

**Grab your FREE 10-Million Volt Pocket Stun Gun now** , before it’s handed off to another winner.

Thank You.

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: The Race to Identify the Next Progressive Memphis Mayor has Started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
May 3, 2023
Dear friend,
The 2023 Elections are really right around the corner. As a result, this week
we’re hosting our first “Neighborhood Party” featuring the candidates for City of Memphis Mayor. At Tennessee Voter Project, we believe we need to find a candidate who can deliver progress over the next four years. We’re looking for someone who pledges investment in transit, expanded hours at our community centers, and returning to full partnership with our public-school system.
Right now, in the Memphis race for Mayor, which concludes this October,
there are already many, many candidates. Unless we start now, it’ll be hard to make this important decision.
PITCH IN TO HELP TVP SUPPORT A PROGRESSIVE MAYOR FOR MEMPHIS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
That’s why we working hard right now to begin the process of vetting. Although we’re reserving the opportunity this week to meet the candidates to our friends who live in the neighborhood.
However, if you want to support TVP, and support our efforts to identify progressive candidates in Memphis and around our state, feel free to click on any of the links below.
Can you pitch in whatever you can afford to help TVP get ready for the October election? Any contribution you make will go a long way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thanks for your support,
Lee Harris
Shelby County Mayor & Founder of TVP

name: C. Trump
subject: They are targeting me, and I need your help to fight back.
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPMzgzMTkifQ/yF2XWDhLbh4x_Hg9RMaOPQ)
---
Fellow American, Trinity University in Texas labeled me "an elevated risk" and forced me to pay "special liability insurance" because my last name is Trump. [**Will you stand with me now and demand the university reverse this?**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPMzgzMTkifQ/WecIVn9jzkN1RIKKEmq86g) That's right... before I could step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, was forced to pay for special liability insurance. The Young Conservatives of Texas, who sponsored my speech, told me they have _NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before._ [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPMzgzMTkifQ/BsF7o2l1puaKvUTTponD7g)****
---
[ Stand with Speech First](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPMzgzMTkifQ/Jmx-gr5gbERIoc31imTdPA)
---
Fellow American, even if I were related to President Trump (I'm not related), Trinity University would still be making a gross misstep and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the "Woke" student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone whom far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation - and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don't think so! [**Fellow American, add your name to Speech First's open letter right now to tell Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision ... and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPMzgzMTkifQ/1QpDkloqBJChUNfOyIZdbw) They want you to think that the issue is over, but their decision sets a dangerous precedent of discrimination on campus. I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support!
---
Cherise TrumpExecutive DirectorSpeech First
---

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18944?t=1001&akid=3201%2E346206%2EBCw41A ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230503-3201-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3201_346206_BCw41A&akid=3201%2E346206%2EBCw41A

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3201%2E346206%2EBCw41A

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

subject: Is the Constitution “trash?!”
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsFz-s7DIN

You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and
politics are making outrageous statements like "The Constitution
is kind of trash."

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osFz-s7DIN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

"The
Constitution is kind of trash."

That's
what a guest-with an Ivy League degree-said recently on a
highly-rated daytime talk show.

You've
likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and
politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of
limited government and personal liberty with outrageous
statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash."

And like
that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative
that our Constitution is flawed, outdated, and incapable of
dealing with the challenges of our time.

Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution-Alexander
Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-gave you and me the perfect
guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist
Papers.

Written
between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius,
The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper
editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.

Thomas
Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the
principles of government which ever was written."

And these
documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If
we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we
shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them.

That's
why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The
Federalist Papers," on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible
donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

"The
Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for
viewing in your home or a small group.

You might
also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal
study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen
your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even
more.

These
DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our
nation's founding principles-maybe even a friend or family
member.

But
supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of
"The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. More than 200,000 people
have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last
long.

You can
use this secure link to receive your copy of "The Federalist
Papers" right now:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61764880:sFz-s7DIN:m:3:2532013465:3A369D1C0D6B20B6B468B9B3EA8DE229:r

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

"SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt" We'll be on the lookout for your name. Thank you, House GOP * | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: The American Safety Fund
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Last month, Dan Crenshaw and I made a pledge.

We decided it’s time for America to WIN the war on the Mexican cartels once and for all.

Too many border towns have fallen. Too many drugs have flooded our country. Too many Americans have died.

**It’s time to use the intelligence resources of the greatest military on Earth to take down the cartels who are trying to take down us.**

**I’m starting the _American Safety Fund_ to fuel our mission, and I need EVERY patriot to do their part now.**

From American gangs with ties south of the border to drugs that make their way to our streets, these thugs are bringing their violence right to America. And if you mess with Americans, we’re going to come for you. subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoorekl9ncevt0qtnjmjfvjm95l1rg0akhio5h8g_rp22sh2s8i66o76chj64pj6cdh2bs)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zahmugefjsul9eo5tr0383cg940rt5p3f4lddns8_rp22sh2s8i66o76chj64pj6cdh2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2fc2o5g4iumrtbghpvqjis1ti78ujbuacn4p66o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chj64pj6cdh2bs)

---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5ufh9ntb9k9a49jfmuhj37vjrug4nib9cr35iog_rp22sh2s8i66o76chj64pj6cdh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
