---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z17ge2sm06h29sip7mt39nvb032o12en82mvk27o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chj64pj6cdh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

It's the brutal reality of politics today. My campaign was incredibly tough, with millions spent before I had even announced my campaign for re-election. We had to spend, spend, spend to be able to mount a strong defense.

Unfortunately, to keep up with this pace, we incurred some debt. Fundraising was tough, and every single dollar spent was used to help my team come out victorious.

We just came up short, Friend.

I was hoping I could convince you to chip in **just $5 right** now to help me pay off this debt.

name: Andy Kim
subject: Small businesses make a community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Small businesses usually don't make national news – but they do make a big difference in a community. Small business owners are incredibly diverse, and New Jersey has small business owners from all different kinds of backgrounds.

Small businesses are the backbone of the U.S. economy, accounting for about two-thirds of all net new jobs created in recent decades. They provide employment opportunities for millions of people across the country, particularly in rural and underserved areas.

When I'm home in New Jersey, I like to visit small businesses whenever I can. Our community has some amazing spots!

I stopped by a bake shop the last time I was in the district. The smell of cinnamon hit me as soon as I walked through the door. So, of course, when they offered to let me help make cinnamon rolls, I couldn't say no.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-05-03-smallbusiness&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2d6ba964-b6e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-05-03-smallbusiness&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2d6ba964-b6e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

There are fantastic businesses just like this one in every city, neighborhood, and small town. They contribute to the unique character and diversity of communities across our country.

In Congress, I am working hard to help every small business thrive. That's why I've already introduced a bill focused on cutting red tape and easing cumbersome tax burdens to do exactly that.

Small businesses are vital to our communities . So do me a favor, stop by a small business next time you're out. You won't regret it.

Happy Small Business Week!

Andy

clean_body: Small businesses usually don't make national news – but they do make a big difference in a community. Small business owners are incredibly diverse, and New Jersey has small business owners from all different kinds of backgrounds. Small businesses are the backbone of the U.S. economy, accounting for about two-thirds of all net new jobs created in recent decades. They provide employment opportunities for millions of people across the country, particularly in rural and underserved areas. When I'm home in New Jersey, I like to visit small businesses whenever I can. Our community has some amazing spots! I stopped by a bake shop the last time I was in the district. The smell of cinnamon hit me as soon as I walked through the door. So, of course, when they offered to let me help make cinnamon rolls, I couldn't say no. [] There are fantastic businesses just like this one in every city, neighborhood, and small town. They contribute to the unique character and diversity of communities across our country. In Congress, I am working hard to help every small business thrive. That's why I've already introduced a bill focused on cutting red tape and easing cumbersome tax burdens to do exactly that. Small businesses are vital to our communities . So do me a favor, stop by a small business next time you're out. You won't regret it. Happy Small Business Week! name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: See the evidence for yourself
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79175%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sgmcdz5G7mG4uI21viNgVA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79176%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=81xGLakmn98KV8QamGfTlw&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79175%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sgmcdz5G7mG4uI21viNgVA&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79177%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=scPae9VvzSy35vrFZ3gYhw&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79175%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sgmcdz5G7mG4uI21viNgVA&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79178%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A%2fK2c7FE1GZmx5zjbazADA&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79179%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=URXe3%2b%2f4aiTzY7m0CGwyBg&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79170%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AnXskVhsWE0b81uNTA3gvg&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Great American Update

|

| | We’ve got some bad news, Peter.

**Despite our success in February and March, April was our worst month all year!**

Instead of growing our grassroots program and allowing us to build the infrastructure we need to win in 2024, **_our fundraising program dropped even lower than January!_**

If this trend continues, we could see our fundraising continue to plummet for the rest of the year.

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he’s ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden’s Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden’s Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19121%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RP7tpMPxTRsvwJPv9ov1cA&sysid=1)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19122%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A82deBfK%2bUbEqFNtV9OmcA&sysid=1)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19123%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rG8X2r9gWSgFDztNViQu9A&sysid=1 "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---
| | [REJECT BIDEN’S AMNESTY PLAN](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19124%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2gkSROezKPlZice%2bG9zi5Q&sysid=1)
---

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19135%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w2FjwTYGMwAsAr9PuitBqA&sysid=1)
---
Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: ⚔️ war is here
body:
PICK ONE: Idaho or Colorado...? |
---
| | War is upon us...

A group called "Idahoans for Open Primaries" is trying to undo what we just did...

They want Idaho to be the third state to use "Ranked Choice voting" (which produces moderate/liberal candidates) _and_ get rid of our closed primaries (which interferes with party dynamics).

**If you're an Idahoan... [READ THIS](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=cd96ec7a63&e=dea908e0fe "THE ENEMY WITHIN") **

Next, we'll see ballot initiatives to legalize weed, and then, abortion.

I guarantee it...

_This is why you _must _be vigilant._

This isn't something I do for you (or, any elected official).

This is something WE ALL DO together.

So you have to get involved in any way you can.

If not... Idaho *WILL* become the next Colorado (a leftist utopia).

Do you want your family to live in a red state flipped blue? Can you imagine?

I can... I lived in a state like that for nearly 30 years.

There’s no rest for the wicked...

_They want to flip our state blue. _

So WE MUST FIGHT the good fight and give them nothing.

Because "The Great Gem State Heist"... is ON.

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s.**

If you like having conservatives like me fighting for the Idaho way of life in the Senate...

[**Click here to help me stay there**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=995a1afe01&e=dea908e0fe "Keep Lenney in the fight") >>

_Because we're about to see more money flow into the state than ever before._

They did this to Colorado intentionally in the mid-2000s (Google "The Rocky Mountain Heist")

Now Idaho is in the crosshairs...

And I'm telling you...

Idaho as you know it is GONE if conservative liberty lovers don't step up to save it...

The Left **NEVER** ceases.

They don't rest...

They're relentless, well-funded, and organized.

So, now, over to you... _what will you do to keep Idaho RED?_

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=77d048f243).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) Want to support the cause? [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=67eb2c8840&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight").

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I needed to share this update with you directly, friend:
friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this,
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: All hell will break loose
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
As soon as this happens, illegal border crossings are set to double! | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61765615:WCw-T7DGN:m:1:877327319:94FF6286CB3459E01222447D8F5B3520:r)
---

Fellow American,

If President Biden does not act immediately, all hell will break loose.

Title 42 - a critical law in preventing a new wave of illegal border crossings that was enforced under the Trump Administration - is set to expire on May 11th. As soon as this happens, illegal border crossings are set to double!

Look at these numbers:

* Over the last 90 days, Border Patrol has had **_566,136 encounters_** with illegal immigrants.
* That amounts to **_6,300 encounters a day._**
* Without Title 42, this number could rise to over **_1.1 million in 90 days_** based on estimates from Customs and Border Patrol.

...and that's not counting those who don't get caught by Border Patrol!

Title 42 is the Biden Administration's most effective tool in their border security toolbox, and they are taking it completely off the table without any thought of a replacement. This is a purely political decision driven by radicals who want open borders.

******What the heck is it going to take to make the Biden Administration take this seriously?**

Communities across America, and even big city Democrat mayors, are begging Biden to do something, to change course and change the policy. They are overwhelmed by the increase in crime, in drugs, and in human trafficking all as a result of the open border and illegal immigration.

[**Fellow American, I need folks like you to send a strong message to the Biden Administration - don't fix what's not broken, leave Title 42 in place!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61765615:WCw-T7DGN:m:1:877327319:94FF6286CB3459E01222447D8F5B3520:r)

| [**Tell Biden -
LEAVE TITLE 42 IN PLACE! ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61765615:WCw-T7DGN:m:1:877327319:94FF6286CB3459E01222447D8F5B3520:r)
---

President Donald Trump did the best job in my political lifetime at protecting our nation and stopping the flood of illegal immigration at our southern border. When he did something, like Title 42, it worked. For Biden to allow Title 42 to expire just because it's a policy from President Trump's Administration is ridiculous.

It's clear that we cannot expect any meaningful enforcement of our laws or defense of our border from Joe Biden and the Democrats, Fellow American - which makes it even more necessary than before to defeat him and **Secure the Senate** in 2024.

Add your name to **DEMAND** Democrats in Washington address and fix the pending crisis at our southern border!

I know that together, we can make a change.

Thank you,

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61765615:WCw-T7DGN:m:1:877327319:94FF6286CB3459E01222447D8F5B3520:r)
Lindsey Graham

[**Tell Biden -
LEAVE TITLE 42 IN PLACE! ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61765615:WCw-T7DGN:m:1:877327319:94FF6286CB3459E01222447D8F5B3520:r)

clean_body: As soon as this happens, illegal border crossings are set to double! | Fellow American, If President Biden does not act immediately, all hell will break loose. Title 42 - a critical law in preventing a new wave of illegal border crossings that was enforced under the Trump Administration - is set to expire on May 11th. As soon as this happens, illegal border crossings are set to double! Look at these numbers: Over the last 90 days, Border Patrol has had 566,136 encounters with illegal immigrants. That amounts to 6,300 encounters a day. Without Title 42, this number could rise to over 1.1 million in 90 days based on estimates from Customs and Border Patrol. ...and that's not counting those who don't get caught by Border Patrol! Title 42 is the Biden Administration's most effective tool in their border security toolbox, and they are taking it completely off the table without any thought of a replacement. This is a purely political decision driven by radicals who want open borders. **What the heck is it going to take to make the Biden Administration take this seriously? Communities across America, and even big city Democrat mayors, are begging Biden to do something, to change course and change the policy. They are overwhelmed by the increase in crime, in drugs, and in human trafficking all as a result of the open border and illegal immigration. | President Donald Trump did the best job in my political lifetime at protecting our nation and stopping the flood of illegal immigration at our southern border. When he did something, like Title 42, it worked. For Biden to allow Title 42 to expire just because it's a policy from President Trump's Administration is ridiculous. It's clear that we cannot expect any meaningful enforcement of our laws or defense of our border from Joe Biden and the Democrats, Fellow American - which makes it even more necessary than before to defeat him and Secure the Senate in 2024. Add your name to DEMAND Democrats in Washington address and fix the pending crisis at our southern border! I know that together, we can make a change. Thank you, Lindsey Graham For text updates from Team Graham, In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. name: Patriots for School Choice
subject: Input needed to DEFEND freedom in education:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | Peter, There is no greater joy in life than being a parent.

But with such love comes responsibility, and that includes your child’s education.

The school-choice movement across our country is rooted in freedom and dignity for every family, but right now, the Left is trying to attack YOUR right to determine your child’s education.

[**We’re fueling a movement for school choice, and we need to know now: do YOU support school choice and freedom in education?**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=41723b2183674a7496b8b9d21cf64d5e&_e=1gKPwHla0L5Pfh9VNAbvXAemuLmRM4T6sxSTDUpbB6UiTn18qejcl1RXl_PyBGJOmgHu2M6OAG2m7MJ4hlBfRFs8cZl5lHIxmifw_cPRivtk6exwNY3l6YKdpu3d2Ah4oFWxYRMRTrfA_jKA9BjLXvnIDd_vzPGm7YTvHWh-yCG2kzpO6j-JfasfAbAXi8yiH3kZF-g9-BUfqUACgXW_o9FLFDD7LXolj8oA3w4_qLwtskAnHr_t3d-vOw3ZU0xgiuHP-85wjdhmmgLF5vT_ySnL82tH5UuMSooy9PvpmlTeXj4iVvD2UqhNX5R-9LyG2-_OMWUZ0FAZAqhjaYp3JqW4fUyzQRSXgvka5XvWB-o9lTTKiJkipz1MX8p_HXag)

subject: URGENT: 7 days until Title 42 ends…
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DNExTb51IdNXgL5v0wKTBxdsPNJgIDGDbDwS59BjS-Rmso-MFO6iBjzivgbg8q57F7RlsuvE9pogvH3B1lLDAThbGymcbi1NEVL9seEVWH2uIC91TVL08JZj_sRSFxg4BaKlr_jf-3utsyfcDNMwfqRRdyWviLtxvmatT_NrB9SMvfXlG8AfSJ3S-n_-uncQvHd8JuIrYkAzDN0y1azoCw==&c=hpD4zBSwIbZk84J690H6JJBAhX-JBFZV8uyIJxbf0SS11VQpvnfo1A==&ch=8V5evXmFBUqLEaaWw1oUKLSwHe8cRxE-BcGHsCErxBvpkpDPwjqwYw==)
---
| BORDER ALERT: LESS THAN 10 DAYS AND COUNTING
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DNExTb51IdNXgL5v0wKTBxdsPNJgIDGDbDwS59BjS-Rmso-MFO6iBjzivgbg8q57F7RlsuvE9pogvH3B1lLDAThbGymcbi1NEVL9seEVWH2uIC91TVL08JZj_sRSFxg4BaKlr_jf-3utsyfcDNMwfqRRdyWviLtxvmatT_NrB9SMvfXlG8AfSJ3S-n_-uncQvHd8JuIrYkAzDN0y1azoCw==&c=hpD4zBSwIbZk84J690H6JJBAhX-JBFZV8uyIJxbf0SS11VQpvnfo1A==&ch=8V5evXmFBUqLEaaWw1oUKLSwHe8cRxE-BcGHsCErxBvpkpDPwjqwYw==)
---
| Friend
FIRST: Biden and the Radical Left decided to halt the construction of the wall and work to undo all the effective border policies that President Trump put in place.
THEN: Under the Biden Administration, more than 6.3 million illegal immigrants have crossed the border, and that includes 1.3 million getaways that escaped past Border Patrol agents.
NOW: Title 42, the only effective border policy we had in place to stop the flow of illegal immigrants from crossing our border, is set to be suspended in less than 10 days on May 11th. If we don't act now, our border patrol agents will be left powerless.
---

---
---
# We are ready to deliver a Republican victory in November
Last night I won the Republican primary for mayor of Fort Wayne taking almost two of every three votes. **I actually received more votes in my primary election than Tom Henry** , the 16-year incumbent mayor of Fort Wayne, did in his primary election challenge. Fort Wayne is ready for a change, but I need your help to deliver that change.
---
[](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/eZB7DKUOMx0M-MPh1C22wili6oQaoDraKkrTweQFqkY=/wTBWRGaXJtSBvV4kSnA_QKdhxnQk4GZPEln1wV4qsWI=)
---
| | [Support Tom Didier](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/eZB7DKUOMx0M-MPh1C22wili6oQaoDraKkrTweQFqkY=/wTBWRGaXJtSBvV4kSnA_QHLZc0FFIyCZ0QIsqonpzXA= "Support Tom Didier")
---
Fort Wayne hasn't elected a Republican mayor since 1995. We have a real opportunity to win back this office this year. Not only do I have experience beating Tom Henry, we have a great team of candidates running in Fort Wayne for city council and city clerk. **This could be a huge victory for Republicans this fall!** The one difference this time - Tom Henry knows we are coming for him! He's calling in every favor he can think of to raise money and build up his war chest. I've run a grass roots campaign and that goes for fundraising as well. We have had dozens of donors who have donated to a political campaign for the first time in their lives. Every contribution to my campaign goes to helping us knock more doors, make more calls, and send more mail to voters.
---
| | [Donate to Tom Didier](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/eZB7DKUOMx0M-MPh1C22wili6oQaoDraKkrTweQFqkY=/wTBWRGaXJtSBvV4kSnA_QBK2wpCnanR6NBAinBiHGTI= "Donate to Tom Didier")
---
Please consider making a contribution to my campaign. Recurring contributions help us cover overhead costs for our office and the software we need to run the campaign. Every recurring donor gets invited to our monthly breakfast featuring a special guest where you can get updates about the campaign and share your thoughts with me on how we're doing. God Bless,
---
---
| **3rd Annual Golf Outing** **Thursday, May 25th
Chestnut Hills Golf Club** Matt and Lindsey Konkler are hosting my 3rd Annual Golf Outing and I would love to have you join us! More info: [Contact Rachel Birenbaum](mailto:rachel@simplestrategiesllc.com "Contact Rachel Birenbaum")
[Click to RSVP](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/eZB7DKUOMx0M-MPh1C22wili6oQaoDraKkrTweQFqkY=/wTBWRGaXJtSBvV4kSnA_QP2qATLCkNcVUMLRV3voZog= "Click to RSVP")

clean_body: How Soros plans to BUY the White House for Biden... | | Friend, A Soros-linked Super PAC has promised to swoop in and rescue Crooked Joe Biden’s failing re-election campaign launch. This shadowy Super PAC is pledging to spend $75,000,000 in the 6 biggest battleground states of the election (Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin) to BUY Biden the White House. And to counter a spend of this magnitude, we’re going to need every last MAGA patriot on board. That’s why I’ve set a NEW goal for our Battleground Victory Fund of 6,000 grassroots donations before midnight TONIGHT to mobilize ASAP and STOP Soros in each of these 6 battlegrounds. | | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: DonaldJTrump.com Date: Mon, May 1, 2023 Subject: RE: the 6 top battlegrounds of 2024 To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, Biden’s fundraising has reportedly been a DISASTER... ...So, a Soros-linked Super PAC is trying to salvage Crooked Joe’s campaign by spending $75 MILLION in the 6 STATES they’ve determined to be the TOP battlegrounds of 2024: Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin | President Trump needs YOUR help to fight back and mobilize ASAP in all 6 battleground states to ensure we SAVE AMERICA. | Thank you, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Republicans are holding our economy hostage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Late last week, Pramila went on to MSNBC to discuss House Republicans passing a conditional debt limit bill.
#
Peter,
Late last week, Pramila went on to MSNBC to discuss House Republicans’ draconian debt limit bill. The bill is not expected to pass in the Senate, but it boldly disregards the level of economic crisis our country is facing.
**[Peter, click here to watch the full video and, when you’re done watching, please consider chipping in to support Pramila as she puts pressure on Republicans and conservatives who put profits over people every day.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41844?refcode=em20230503-2437&t=1&akid=2437%2E420207%2EBY635b)**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41844?refcode=em20230503-2437&t=20&akid=2437%2E420207%2EBY635b)**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41844?refcode=em20230503-2437&t=21&akid=2437%2E420207%2EBY635b)
Pramila said it best: **Republicans are being incredibly hypocritical when it comes to throwing our economy into chaos.** They claim to care about the state of our economy but House Republicans' first bill in Congress targeted IRS funding to stop agents from investigating the ultra-wealthy tax cheats to reduce the deficit.
**Right now, Republicans are holding our economy hostage with this debt-limit bill — and it’s time for us to put our foot down and demand a clean debt ceiling bill immediately.**
Under the Trump administration, Republicans passed a clean debt ceiling three times which allowed our government to increase the amount of spending the U.S. is authorized to borrow. And when they were in power, **Republicans increased our country’s deficit by 7.2 trillion dollars in just under four years.** 1 During this time, Republicans moved with force to pass a number of spending increases and tax cuts for the wealthy that would add trillions to the national debt.
Passing Republicans’ current debt-limit bill would send our economy into a spiraling recession. It would threaten:
* The jobs of over seven million working people
* Key resources like Social Security, Medicare, and veterans affairs
* Small business loans
* Child care services
* **And so much more.**

**The stakes are enormous, and we must call on Republicans to set aside personal interests and show up for their everyday Americans.**[**Peter, if you stand with Pramila and the progressive leaders who are determined to bring real solutions to their constituents, please consider chipping in $3 or whatever you’re able to donate to our movement today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41844?refcode=em20230503-2437&t=22&akid=2437%2E420207%2EBY635b)
In solidarity,
Jayapal HQ
* * *
1 - [Democratic Policy & Communications Committee](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41827?t=23&akid=2437%2E420207%2EBY635b)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230503-2437-footer&t=24&refcode2=2437_420207_BY635b&akid=2437%2E420207%2EBY635b)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=2437%2E420207%2EBY635b)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2437%2E420207%2EBY635b)

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvm5519cluc1muv8e3d9ruqb4tq7ajp0ulbdotvg_rp22sh2s8i66o76chj69pb2c3h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8c1h4m4ddd6fss8skh31jnai5do40q48shld8e0_rp22sh2s8i66o76chj69pb2c3h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc35t7tccihmjq26e59j77o0rqvfr2htqgbsdh7o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chj69pb2c3h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt7p4irjiiua1ogunecoh47v8ahj2o6adh0eh9t0_rp22sh2s8i66o76chj69pb2c3h2bs)
---

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4193a62771c41bea3b1eadca79fce8b&_e=mxXLX-pId1GdSDfYWjkWr-f_lLA6ZmrnQkWSElbAZBCqHcDG_BA3EffaDmmPKwA7V0XG39T79S6jsB9LXQkNkc2FJnhUhHOjpVWSAKXsB214Y4lvTp1l3UDd4WeBrHEqea7mwMo8MDXIqiv6iY-GzVOvjjRuU9T0lM3SEE7yNAyTwXhsA34UmGoMwAtWJlDi390Mm8eT26iNzhm27SK6IB_x1Qn-iz283molZfzq5QUAR0VbRNiMks9ltIVoYdbojdtHxXy1lfJhcJROEAZjlN6Wp69yo3og5uyKCrXlUpq8JGdfSOheBJAolsRscBQH)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4193a62771c41bea3b1eadca79fce8b&_e=mxXLX-pId1GdSDfYWjkWr-f_lLA6ZmrnQkWSElbAZBCqHcDG_BA3EffaDmmPKwA7V0XG39T79S6jsB9LXQkNkc2FJnhUhHOjpVWSAKXsB214Y4lvTp1l3UDd4WeBrHEqea7mwMo8MDXIqiv6iY-GzYFQtFvgk-A0NxamfVwbOL9vawmLW3fLTlxip_UHsUmcyPB1cNZee15Z97NpmSxkBh4Ak6c2uLXP_M4q-mzxbF9cqxvGGi8Yu_g-N1A6noXKk-nr2pKNn4Wmew6N_wlb1zbQhXGmBRz4PLmnl51YV587EJeDd56eQz-AW9p8wdil)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4193a62771c41bea3b1eadca79fce8b&_e=mxXLX-pId1GdSDfYWjkWr-f_lLA6ZmrnQkWSElbAZBCqHcDG_BA3EffaDmmPKwA7V0XG39T79S6jsB9LXQkNkc2FJnhUhHOjpVWSAKXsB214Y4lvTp1l3UDd4WeBrHEqea7mwMo8MDXIqiv6iY-GzbXIiWRrJ1M2-fLnfUOPXKNUZ1aLwxeRZ306fZEc3Lsdbf48HYAu0odvPTXeyVPJqlpVe3aPal3bDBxwyDcaJa3eTMOzXcxJYuOXjNXM0ZlU2FeS0jpsqm7vDPKpReK-v81EeY5oOiiAqggZRrgbJy5gjB9BIGBDglTfFipsvMHf)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4193a62771c41bea3b1eadca79fce8b&_e=mxXLX-pId1GdSDfYWjkWr-f_lLA6ZmrnQkWSElbAZBCqHcDG_BA3EffaDmmPKwA7V0XG39T79S6jsB9LXQkNkc2FJnhUhHOjpVWSAKXsB214Y4lvTp1l3UDd4WeBrHEqea7mwMo8MDXIqiv6iY-GzdGG-m13eyOleAm7O3Gg6v0EfBsk1FSUa5rYRF5SUqYbBBimTSQEZ489He250hjuU2BF1tfsCAbFaN6l6JKJiHcTI9HTAjvyN1mieaE7eRAzD7WGWtyozrVj9lukl9xV1VVDq8x2BgWL2JzpumV3V564BTseOSJIzaSs6NXR7An3)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4193a62771c41bea3b1eadca79fce8b&_e=mxXLX-pId1GdSDfYWjkWr-f_lLA6ZmrnQkWSElbAZBCqHcDG_BA3EffaDmmPKwA7V0XG39T79S6jsB9LXQkNkc2FJnhUhHOjpVWSAKXsB214Y4lvTp1l3UDd4WeBrHEqea7mwMo8MDXIqiv6iY-GzXRiC6S2EpLrZwJFFixww5exs4LRmL3ZzRSz4GCAgwxCjt_eduus1jSjnl0v-gcr7DR__BrcL0SAGu0r1USSfZZNX8SRJEnVk6dJAFtShAZEliye_x3oHsCeE8kILkidsuQC3iVnwRFkAsN_SxY4wGVK55Yrcu6Kk7ZiwzlIXkgi)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4193a62771c41bea3b1eadca79fce8b&_e=mxXLX-pId1GdSDfYWjkWr-f_lLA6ZmrnQkWSElbAZBCqHcDG_BA3EffaDmmPKwA7V0XG39T79S6jsB9LXQkNkc2FJnhUhHOjpVWSAKXsB214Y4lvTp1l3UDd4WeBrHEqea7mwMo8MDXIqiv6iY-GzblDhGvPTBmcDmMMVLo5RYsiX0Gh-gLB9iw5GAx7hYyRxCPQAI5DlrPKcXlMBMT6foEfDXdLdfKyisKJnkeVQXnlb3LXPjWWDaQ-7m5bzGipmIwIGcM9DIQdjGUXve2-2XMLb_liI1o9LwhnOq1wQFk1Q0J-cgVHL6gAP7Syk5-r) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4193a62771c41bea3b1eadca79fce8b&_e=mxXLX-pId1GdSDfYWjkWr-f_lLA6ZmrnQkWSElbAZBCqHcDG_BA3EffaDmmPKwA7V0XG39T79S6jsB9LXQkNkc2FJnhUhHOjpVWSAKXsB214Y4lvTp1l3UDd4WeBrHEqea7mwMo8MDXIqiv6iY-GzcYZ1OvVwH3YRyKPCdz5zEu4O3jmVCIlw4XDbV-rmRIvA0aGOhlc-TCQ6-zGY4aZiKoHKkOjD__x7bd6_9nlmbpjpjWfSnZJPqDxQ0G3OdGBb46Bqky8xpg70WNa4phVlrmnudn5hcn6ZZJH-hiB09HnT7VV24tLzfj1T-VyfG-b)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4193a62771c41bea3b1eadca79fce8b&_e=mxXLX-pId1GdSDfYWjkWr-f_lLA6ZmrnQkWSElbAZBCqHcDG_BA3EffaDmmPKwA7V0XG39T79S6jsB9LXQkNkc2FJnhUhHOjpVWSAKXsB214Y4lvTp1l3UDd4WeBrHEqea7mwMo8MDXIqiv6iY-GzdKQ7IQiSIqd8v20LXHnK7Xt8CS79DyuACtU-bKDleSpJYdEag5xUoqifjqhxWq8GzD0nPPACyId-IBLbwD5pDyi-x9Rz1-JLmTIFILeZKizjoTAdUckYQpue6_YU2ZaLYr39qUIexXsfnbJce6f9rnzrtYuAnBJB2IgoETL0v1e) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Reclaiming American Freedom

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Two quick items for you.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62725290/404368072/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU2MjVmYS1jNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5v9zmq5v7BYyT4BQ2ci33xl8Zdwlc04a_d7fh0FiEXc=)
Peter,

**To start, I want to say thank you.**

With your help, we met our April fundraising goal, and I’m so grateful for your ongoing support. Now that there’s a new opponent in the race, it’s becoming increasingly important to meet our fundraising marks, and you continue to prove that our grassroots energy is alive and well.

**On a more somber note, I wanted to express my sincerest condolences to those impacted by the accidents on Interstate 55 in Illinois this week.** If you missed it: a massive dust storm caused more than 70 vehicles to crash in a two-mile stretch of the highway near Springfield. Tragically, six people lost their lives.

Incidents like this not only remind us how weather events can have sudden and horrific consequences; they show how important it is to communicate clearly and promptly about potential weather threats that pose a risk to Illinoisans.

As a meteorologist, I understand the value of clear communication about weather and climate. It can literally save lives. That’s why it’s crucial that we heed warnings from the National Weather Service and other credible groups, especially when it comes to hard-to-predict weather events like tornadoes or dust storms.

My thoughts are with the families of those affected by these accidents, and my team is ready to assist however possible.

Thanks for reading, Peter – that’s all for now, but stay tuned for more from our team soon.

Take care,

Eric

I want to hear from you...
| [](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=9c9ba8eb60504d20a618151450be3dff&_e=HoeIkH7qbCLlxSlOYlBq5aoBxthjeObMa9Hckjxs8UmzNpKpXyglum2LK6A4xI0reKI7_ceHLhjWjfJwil27m5pv7GWmL6PVgwjiEZVr1tb0_d_dh5FMRmSbF7uQpV6RewQrhveHz_YrrSVzvR37K2P6-eQYYfWyPqduRHf9V8AeXYxbyQ1y7CV5LZN36fZtjOJ9DBmgWUTEpqN9ipJE3OYwVMUrvQVvvT2y0NTHifDXlm6QO3EBtb8d1CwaquV7y86bWvqRsH8Pcv2QpDCe9GfiZJ4zz4iyBwpUeLYSuG62lzY2bTzfGjYwcxa3oA9_tmYb0bQgfDCtkTVB5kbqV88kAOcOAUbfCcToh5JSxCmNHWVoNHhIWouh7gCDWV2EXwab2-MEVJtzA3r7_1BjOopJleLBBP7XVwuFu-rBXtm_Q1UeTXkIZ5SWn2bEgSvobJqoYJk0DTwhOKdusfQIsg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
During my first 4 months in Congress, I’ve followed through on the promises I made to you on the campaign trail.
---
**I’ve fought relentlessly to stop the ruinous Biden-Harris agenda and save the American dream for future generations.**
---
But I want to ensure that I always remain accountable to YOU.
---
_Just like I promised, you’ll always be my top priority, Peter._
---
That’s why I’m asking for your input on some of the most pressing issues currently before Congress.
---
[**Please take my official 2023 Priorities Survey to share your input today.**](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=9c9ba8eb60504d20a618151450be3dff&_e=HoeIkH7qbCLlxSlOYlBq5aoBxthjeObMa9Hckjxs8UmzNpKpXyglum2LK6A4xI0reKI7_ceHLhjWjfJwil27m5pv7GWmL6PVgwjiEZVr1tb0_d_dh5FMRmSbF7uQpV6RewQrhveHz_YrrSVzvR37K2P6-eQYYfWyPqduRHf9V8AeXYxbyQ1y7CV5LZN36fZtjOJ9DBmgWUTEpqN9ipJE3OYwVMUrvQVvvT2y0NTHifDXlm6QO3EBtb8d1CwaquV7y86bWvqRsH8Pcv2QpDCe9GfiZJ4zz4iyBwpUeLYSuG62lzY2bTzfGjYwcxa3oA9_qNBtSt3fR0LzyBiFxInPR1Rj2U0Ams4Wtb-mKm3OYE2ugbu5S9oHaw8bu9x5fGjXq3ujgQJyd7ECfUbNxFrCPb2oQa4IR8hOAAlT38YE9lkbHcdxea5dJISbDm0VWguUD9PiHcnoTQGUH2TvXqUxWg%3D%3D)
---

[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=9c9ba8eb60504d20a618151450be3dff&_e=HoeIkH7qbCLlxSlOYlBq5aoBxthjeObMa9Hckjxs8UmzNpKpXyglum2LK6A4xI0reKI7_ceHLhjWjfJwil27m5pv7GWmL6PVgwjiEZVr1tb0_d_dh5FMRmSbF7uQpV6RewQrhveHz_YrrSVzvR37K2P6-eQYYfWyPqduRHf9V8AeXYxbyQ1y7CV5LZN36fZtjOJ9DBmgWUTEpqN9ipJE3OYwVMUrvQVvvT2y0NTHifDXlm6QO3EBtb8d1CwaquV7y86bWvqRsH8Pcv2QpDCe9GfiZJ4zz4iyBwpUeLYSuG62lzY2bTzfGjYwcxa3oA9_lUeJIm189P5FpZDIZxc0lv8gsBqgUqy7hVPBQSc7mkUx-W56t7_JLDfw4gIm3Wfw7SzmqrFDVphMxzgYIXHlLED71_OGkVqxicMKHis2cOLG1mtWFPgBSYRPrpHGOguCDaR7qWRCJyj9Bc7I3_2-9g%3D%3D)
---

When Republicans won back the House, it was a clear message to Biden and the Left that Americans were ready for change and sick and tired of their failing agenda.
---
Yet D.C. Democrats just push harder to enact their disastrous far-Left policies...
---
_...They REFUSE to take common-sense steps to secure our border._
---
_...They REFUSE to negotiate on the debt ceiling and fix the fiscal mess they’ve created._
---
_...They REFUSE to even safeguard our basic constitutional rights!_
---
_D.C. Democrats seem to have forgotten that they represent the American people, not their far-Left special interest donors and their own personal interests._
---
I’m committed to making sure your priorities are heard loudly and clearly in Congress,
---
But to do that, I need to hear from you.
---
[**So please, take my official 2023 Priorities Survey to share your input today.**](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=9c9ba8eb60504d20a618151450be3dff&_e=HoeIkH7qbCLlxSlOYlBq5aoBxthjeObMa9Hckjxs8UmzNpKpXyglum2LK6A4xI0reKI7_ceHLhjWjfJwil27m5pv7GWmL6PVgwjiEZVr1tb0_d_dh5FMRmSbF7uQpV6RewQrhveHz_YrrSVzvR37K2P6-eQYYfWyPqduRHf9V8AeXYxbyQ1y7CV5LZN36fZtjOJ9DBmgWUTEpqN9ipJE3OYwVMUrvQVvvT2y0NTHifDXlm6QO3EBtb8d1CwaquV7y86bWvqRsH8Pcv2QpDCe9GfiZJ4zz4iyBwpUeLYSuG62lzY2bTzfGjYwcxa3oA9_dbj0y_F6aPX2KiJY423Nl-eJp9xnPPluj5fFwNyZ3ogF0CoGS45E2a5MuR76dLMKJrz_T6LZGkAKGOgxBFTxhs1sq2Odokt-L9EWzv6BtRa9HJXe9LnV7p4Jk751tvsgLnyFWBrElY3VDtoDSDlLPw%3D%3D)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=9c9ba8eb60504d20a618151450be3dff&_e=HoeIkH7qbCLlxSlOYlBq5aoBxthjeObMa9Hckjxs8UmzNpKpXyglum2LK6A4xI0reKI7_ceHLhjWjfJwil27m5pv7GWmL6PVgwjiEZVr1tb0_d_dh5FMRmSbF7uQpV6RewQrhveHz_YrrSVzvR37K2P6-eQYYfWyPqduRHf9V8AeXYxbyQ1y7CV5LZN36fZtjOJ9DBmgWUTEpqN9ipJE3OYwVMUrvQVvvT2y0NTHifDXlm6QO3EBtb8d1CwaquV7y86bWvqRsH8Pcv2QpDCe9GfiZJ4zz4iyBwpUeLYSuG62lzY2bTzfGjYwcxa3oA9_FDPOGCrBXS7DK7sI6w0r1VjNNxikEsql9fdngwRgPgFJaYZLPtvzfO--sCGK8TepAcLIivLmG22u8u1fA-f6lpwslDbKzaSOlY6I_dugaLejbhC1LE46rMWK2Wq-_xqbiCCPZGuuO23m7oKZizUi8Q%3D%3D)
---
Rep. Juan Ciscomani
Arizona’s 6th Congressional District
---
PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS
---
P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740
---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not reply to this email as this address is not monitored.
We believe that email is a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters, but you can click [here](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_s=9c9ba8eb60504d20a618151450be3dff&_t=N6Q-2d5s6E7lD7n6PObxyJQXiZzbrZ6jeIoaqoRWYZCQtBXdzR5tYuzEhypJg519lB3EgOpOd3xavaos47y75ds2dBjfSb1Y_t1qIshKukA%3D) if you would like to unsubscribe from these messages.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2cf8a005b254c30baa497214ecb31ca&_e=8DboyM1wi9b_zRIgCfoK-XUI0Sp5BGGiHGHMwlLoO95WLtN1RPH7uabxo69GRrXDQ3kXk6WfE3nzSoYJR8On2XUKCpMsAMg1YjfkkuwOJ4kfq2pJGq9FPqVxlUDfi4LgC_Xn4UFUtP7xPd8I_4RAkeM_VWcsLWCKHpDXnLBu-Eh7KHtbCq9uklFRWC61QAGKVS0PKcx6vaXbfvRCH2QaYYCSvfx1Befu34fmhLbO367TVZvXT_1-0vyi_hzTYp5Gp25r0d9KZwCswOWlvFuE_tJFNMT1wy4H6k6rfr6DwWpQdiqjPdFDXUSpkLSyeLe4BWuQVaYiSHVNp_5c08WviUW2sLvtShBGlFhlafefCXQyCHjxI0gcT8s186-Dx1-pvZkxjPgky4XXnTGonJBydA%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2cf8a005b254c30baa497214ecb31ca&_e=8DboyM1wi9b_zRIgCfoK-XUI0Sp5BGGiHGHMwlLoO95WLtN1RPH7uabxo69GRrXDQ3kXk6WfE3nzSoYJR8On2XUKCpMsAMg1YjfkkuwOJ4kfq2pJGq9FPqVxlUDfi4LgC_Xn4UFUtP7xPd8I_4RAkeM_VWcsLWCKHpDXnLBu-Eh7KHtbCq9uklFRWC61QAGKVS0PKcx6vaXbfvRCH2QaYYCSvfx1Befu34fmhLbO367TVZvXT_1-0vyi_hzTYp5GDzYklNr0mbSBdwMhOQJArQLoQaRWpW9s7sGbi1y2mcepchwPWBiNKI1JAvFFohGbNZxRKtU-j7xsCsV1gGAoN-N4Ci3iBZSkZBWvoX-3cSkMqV_gFOiDnLSLywpEMYR9R5LVSHTTLffWu9F2d_nxKg%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2cf8a005b254c30baa497214ecb31ca&_e=8DboyM1wi9b_zRIgCfoK-XUI0Sp5BGGiHGHMwlLoO95WLtN1RPH7uabxo69GRrXDQ3kXk6WfE3nzSoYJR8On2XUKCpMsAMg1YjfkkuwOJ4kfq2pJGq9FPqVxlUDfi4LgC_Xn4UFUtP7xPd8I_4RAkeM_VWcsLWCKHpDXnLBu-Eh7KHtbCq9uklFRWC61QAGKVS0PKcx6vaXbfvRCH2QaYYCSvfx1Befu34fmhLbO367TVZvXT_1-0vyi_hzTYp5Gp2r9poCeabSEAjkYu0YwT6yZoAfaUTTdHfBtjLyzdz-1thaflUSGIkJ__4yQaP4nsOTT1fbP_V4s5VjoDPt1eyYI43siJrlrsv5cLYGxgJVtA4V2qvdpSFiJrL-V5TBuAejHdIQHMd9JjKb-79SFPA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2cf8a005b254c30baa497214ecb31ca&_e=8DboyM1wi9b_zRIgCfoK-XUI0Sp5BGGiHGHMwlLoO95WLtN1RPH7uabxo69GRrXDQ3kXk6WfE3nzSoYJR8On2XUKCpMsAMg1YjfkkuwOJ4kfq2pJGq9FPqVxlUDfi4LgC_Xn4UFUtP7xPd8I_4RAkeM_VWcsLWCKHpDXnLBu-Eh7KHtbCq9uklFRWC61QAGKVS0PKcx6vaXbfvRCH2QaYYCSvfx1Befu34fmhLbO367TVZvXT_1-0vyi_hzTYp5Gx3L7BPP0W8P3SJ13-JnI6AjgBeljUyGaX1z54-p2lb28zsATckz1JL7NtB309b_XCzbHj69tX8dFH3GwzV0zKuraMMsySleZDVrRO0RwPdLtIhjYBYfJ2xwYH_cw-70IgX-5br4Iq6GD30n2EWEFvQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2cf8a005b254c30baa497214ecb31ca&_e=8DboyM1wi9b_zRIgCfoK-XUI0Sp5BGGiHGHMwlLoO95WLtN1RPH7uabxo69GRrXDQ3kXk6WfE3nzSoYJR8On2XUKCpMsAMg1YjfkkuwOJ4kfq2pJGq9FPqVxlUDfi4LgC_Xn4UFUtP7xPd8I_4RAkeM_VWcsLWCKHpDXnLBu-Eh7KHtbCq9uklFRWC61QAGKVS0PKcx6vaXbfvRCH2QaYYCSvfx1Befu34fmhLbO367TVZvXT_1-0vyi_hzTYp5GFwMZYPl6NugNlltLdRUQHe9K6joCDJ3aeUXPseL7U25EMH4Y3izkoyczdU0Zj34ulGlJeMPIaiTgV6ab7Glb3_1HrvkSgJdTzWviMahxRsMY5X-xz_lrp45JH7myy3c8jOb3_rYTB_qtQ_QloGYShQ%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=e2cf8a005b254c30baa497214ecb31ca&_t=WSrzjZ8KMNRFCCF8sngX0m1a5FXEGtg2cbothrI7efUKXxB49p5DpO_4Ti7OwHyjpg4ttpnzmHydBfz1OFfFqHb8KJSWIIO0H_TYQP_j7cmuuMTHXVrtyoEhgzSVQGUwj7rcaDANDu0XGYGaHa4fO8zYGB7ngKVe38JWdIdgXCc%3D)

| | On Wednesday, April 26, the members of the York County Breakfast Club graciously invited me to address them. We were greeted so warmly, and I thank every member for your outpouring of support for our candidacy. We joined more patriotic friends and supporters in the evening at the 1607 First Landing Dinner in Virginia Beach. We had the privilege of sharing a table with dear friends Tricia and Mark Stall (I have endorsed Tricia in her campaign for Mathews’ County Board of Supervisors).

On Saturday, April 29, we joined several Republican leaders from Loudoun County at the 6th Annual Loudoun Conservative Gala at the Trump National Golf Club in Potomac, Virginia. We renewed many old friendships and met several new friends united in the fight against big government socialism and woke indoctrination.
---

| | On Sunday, April 30, we attended Julie Perry and Debra Tisler’s informative education forum, explaining the gross mismanagement and woke indoctrination in the Fairfax County Public Schools at the Clifton Town Center. We were pleased to hear from the very informed speakers and to voice our support for competitive private alternatives to the FCPS, which would be bolstered to the benefit of all students through the passage of true school choice in Virginia.
---

# We Help Everyday Americans
---
Do you dream of transforming your community through elected leadership? We firmly believe that _every_ American has the power to make a difference in their communities. At Our Time To Run, our core mission is to help build a better America by empowering individuals like**you** to find your voice and **make a difference in your communities.** We believe that everyone has the power to create positive change in the world, and we are dedicated to providing you with the tools and resources you need to succeed.

# **From Dreams to Ambition to Leadership**
---
|
---
We know that running for political office can be intimidating, especially for first-time candidates. That's why we offer a wide range of services designed to help you navigate the complexities of the political landscape and run a successful campaign. From fundraising and digital marketing to voter outreach and grassroots organizing, we have the expertise you need to achieve your goals. But our mission is about more than just helping individuals run for office. It's about empowering YOU to live in a world that you help create. It's about giving you the tools to shape the policies that affect your daily life, and to advocate for causes that you care about. It's about building a better future for yourself, your family, and your community. At Our Time To Run, we believe that the future of America is in your hands. We want to help you find your voice, and we want to give you the tools you need to make that voice heard.

| What you did for us this past month was incredible – thank you.

I wanted to reach out and share my gratitude for all your relentless support in our mission to gain Democratic victories across this state. Your contributions have been so helpful in our efforts to build a strong party that will take on any GOP candidate.

**_As we continue to build up our race-winning infrastructure, it's important to remember what we are facing._**

GOP candidates are jumping into the Senate race, and the AZ legislature is currently in Republican control. And it's critical to keep in mind that Arizona is a battleground state crucial to President Biden's chances of winning again in 2024.

**[Your grassroots support is critical to our success in this new month, and I hope you will consider donating to our campaign today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDNs30TdVXmBmVR88-88TM7pyLjeCTKDx454RTUE3lRsEfwlg3xiWunf40cN7Wmah0MnfO0YmdXV99-FvInsZJThjPTax7-pDw-2wBNYDm84b0UFBhshfYq-f9JQJvXLx_4N_ExYUDKgVy4un2Qj462ooIAYrGK5C1WNJXtgFfLPx9ZrBSBzj5Bs_ru4c_73EXRvmVe_ASPsvBGmRXPDEGMTbEyUrtaPNNMO5P_C7isXVikipORftTJt__puE7cqjba0WeTDHIIh0JfsmJpLIVEgq1lCAFIk7gssbAwhzgrGssEZ_8BWAEkvzmZvVqn1XYKrO7yPBmwFM8VAF9wu-36U70ipb6AcqIfiDTQ1adVyEzLxi7sKJZzD1gTbtqfiLJgNJRIbCD1Hzrc6f4JNJIjK5NDXELl4NNNt4wYoDwaEyLkbDloa58IPRFRzdkbWl6/3vv/OwE0D31yT2GdbkDxXj0YgA/h1/W9H_ICA7TlQ498izM9KGocodwvtHFqVlP0inC9QRNeM)**

clean_body: | | | | | | What you did for us this past month was incredible – thank you. I wanted to reach out and share my gratitude for all your relentless support in our mission to gain Democratic victories across this state. Your contributions have been so helpful in our efforts to build a strong party that will take on any GOP candidate. As we continue to build up our race-winning infrastructure, it's important to remember what we are facing. GOP candidates are jumping into the Senate race, and the AZ legislature is currently in Republican control. And it's critical to keep in mind that Arizona is a battleground state crucial to President Biden's chances of winning again in 2024. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for being with us, Yolanda Bejarano Arizona Democratic Party Chair Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

Your presence standing shoulder-to-shoulder with me and all of Gwen NATION is a source of strength I am thankful for each and every day! Let's keep the energy going and stay on track towards 2024 success! = Together, #WeRepresent! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | = | =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge_ : taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Sherrod Brown’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62726313/404372433/-665331034?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk180-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2MwMDkxZi1jOGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDvMCn3ok_RcTX1PiCt_ECDMSVWxNlIl2EHttJ60dqM=)**

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred
| | [Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62726314/404372434/-665331034?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk180-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2MwMDkxZi1jOGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDvMCn3ok_RcTX1PiCt_ECDMSVWxNlIl2EHttJ60dqM=)

I’m honored to have his support in the fight to bring real change to Philly. **Like Bernie, I’ve always believed that healthcare, housing, education, and economic opportunity are a right — not a privilege.** That’s why, when a private equity firm plundered Hahnemann Hospital and turned its back on our most vulnerable residents, Bernie and I stood together to fight back. Bernie and I both believe it’s time to return power back to communities that have been denied it for too long. If you’re with us, please pitch in so we can win on May 16th and make City Hall work for the people it serves. **Here’s your personal link:[actblue.com/donate/hhg-personal?supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62726571/404373542/-2004317602?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230503_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTViZWY1Mi1jOWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qndRYbEbDwyh9JdNSCHIJ_qzVobCy2xQP9oQxw5PqEI=)** We get the city we fight for, team. Please join me and Bernie to fight for a Philadelphia where all of us can be safe and joyful. — Helen

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Your input matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, When I decided to run for Senate, I did it because I was ready to fight for the values that keep American families strong.
But if we’re going to finish our fight and take back America from the radical Left, I need your help.
**Our team put together a survey for our most dedicated patriots on the biggest issues facing America today, and your input is CRITICAL for us to forge a winning path forward.**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: Steve Bannon

body:
In case you missed the interview.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6rv039rcl8467hn7ig7a1sffhflaohkfb74cmf8_rp22sh2s8i66o76chgm4or3cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign's America First platform.
_**He asked me if I still would 've run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family.**_
I answered, _**" ABSOLUTELY."**_
Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight.
_**But the battle to save America is worth the hell they 've put me through.**_
Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull's eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry.
_**They hate me because I 'm a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who've been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class.**_
But, there have been many other great patriots who've dutifully run for president before, so there's something about _our movement_ that's different...
...And that difference is **YOU.**
**The Swamp knows I 've flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support.**
_Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. _

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ongoing judicial corruption: A $1.6 Billion "Gift" Has Been Discovered That Was Used To Corrupt Republican Justices
body:
judicial corruption trainwreck
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33e505c5-b86d-4c0a-9daf-0cc80ae2a115/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_JUDICIAL CORRUPTION UPDATE: A $1.6 Billion "Gift" Has Been Discovered That Was Used To Corrupt Republican Justices_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b1aa39e-0b69-459b-b1f0-b68332ac62bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _If it were a movie you wouldn't believe it. _ **_Another story's exposed that the corrupt, cretinous legion of extremist doom, the Federalist Society--organized a generation ago as a secretive cabal the Right likes to pretend exist on the Left--has used a $1.6B slush fund to pack our courts with lying, autocratic, corrupt Republicans in robes. _And doing it illegally.__** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd4dbdfd-178a-45b3-8504-293647ce12d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Wonder why Clarence Thomas goes on super-yacht trips with a billionaire who bought his mom a house with business before the Court? Why Gorsuch sold land to a partner at a corporate law firm with cases before him, reporting the sale, but not the buyer's name? Why "I like beer Senator" Kavanaugh, skated on scores of sexual harassment/assault accusations with NO REAL Senate Judiciary Committee or FBI investigation?_ **_Because they're owned by the wealthy, Federalist-Society cabal. It's to rich, corrupt corporate law firms what the NRA is to rich, corrupt gun pushers. Yep, this Court (and some lower ones) is irredeemable, creating a democratic crisis, unless you want voting rights only for white male landowners, the right to own a bazooka, the Handmaid's Tale becoming 100% reality & legalization of Putin's right to donate to Republicans. If you think I'm exaggerating, I am..But not by as much as you think. _** [**_The ONLY answer is to expand the Court & bring justice to these Justices. Will you join Blue Amp in this fight, taking back the Supreme Court from these contemptible zealots, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72567985-ad40-4eed-852c-2d0f6e695e6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for knowing when to stand up and fight for the very basis of our democracy._ Cliff
---
|

---
| | |

|

---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00854568-1685-4412-af52-fddd78673ad9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

Together, we can defeat Ted Cruz | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. **That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?** [Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cRYguM6dPmz-ie5ttM77WmgAPmVIfjRQ-iU_VXXnWFVVeXxjyVnR8NSAWn7CM5tVvaiuwj6dRtT16C1Y5PKhgnCcoAyeZBuTfXz-5JfhRuX32dhf-tub4-bdKyDLh-6nKNW86kiX7j3BYzNiJb5Po8ZzwuRKCeluav6wnj5qFfp7rgI7cfBEv5tD7_Tjs_IyIa5HYtXy-kwjIIAmPAt5SOk55SC_ey87IaAY3JKGVUDqE0_bBtlVLEeyAJA0Dm-aqv40w8eDeAccDPQQgUNKgBtwSAaTe1H9UUo2D2gk_S_Jng3xPRyC4FPvSBObXS0_x-PJGbJFpKW7Nz8NlbT_t7D3Jel4jWw6j8mCa1lu9UUoWRWE0r2CZOOpGg84EETN0rm87WFqPdFGOyxGRWYgW9A/3vv/MXp4JXPZSXCFLdx_nHMA5A/h9/PTNt5mg_D2kXdxlXvp1vBJ5nD_yu2mp8fPqvWNdk444)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred
