We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: Together, we can defeat Ted Cruz | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . Donald J. Trump May 2nd, 2023
**Mar-a-Lago, FL—** In a new Agenda47 policy video, President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to reclaim our once great educational institutions from the radical Left and Marxist maniacs.
President Trump will protect American students, impose real standards on higher education, and hold colleges and universities accountable.
“For many years, tuition costs at colleges and universities have been exploding, and I mean absolutely exploding while academics have been obsessed with indoctrinating America's youth," President Trump said. "The time has come to reclaim our once great educational institutions from the radical Left, and we will do that.”
[ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j72O4yAUhZ8Gd1hwwT8pXGw2yhaRtt1tr30hZgIYAZ5M3n7k0Wja8x2dHwzJO_ua2HBmAKujwgCY-sUAbvr8_29_-3e7cEjhD7_0nX4eFH4zgPpK5sf6ndKagM4f6nBpaOrAStGYSfajknAa4dSsk0KJcycHMlaZcSQt5aIWq8EO_TzO1LgJBCjRCSV7obRqFY2dUgJPHaLsBsG0IFMem6Utoqe3mveQ2mULjZ_WWlP52nRlcM17mL05EIPrO_j42h8c7yYS6oGnvFWzVBfvvNSdTKyF27wFXlfDM5Jb0HNvbOUYiQfMH65UHjA6XEq71uCbPFF6Ou9d6Qemxf24f9R9BgAA__9KOWqm)
[Watch President Trump’s plan to reclaim our educational institutions from the radical Left.](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j72O4yAUhZ8Gd1hwwT8pXGw2yhaRtt1tr30hZgIYAZ5M3n7k0Wja8x2dHwzJO_ua2HBmAKujwgCY-sUAbvr8_29_-3e7cEjhD7_0nX4eFH4zgPpK5sf6ndKagM4f6nBpaOrAStGYSfajknAa4dSsk0KJcycHMlaZcSQt5aIWq8EO_TzO1LgJBCjRCSV7obRqFY2dUgJPHaLsBsG0IFMem6Utoqe3mveQ2mULjZ_WWlP52nRlcM17mL05EIPrO_j42h8c7yYS6oGnvFWzVBfvvNSdTKyF27wFXlfDM5Jb0HNvbOUYiQfMH65UHjA6XEq71uCbPFF6Ou9d6Qemxf24f9R9BgAA__9KOWqm)
President Trump has pledged to fire the radical Left accreditors that have allowed our colleges to become dominated by Marxist Maniacs and lunatics.
He will impose real standards on American colleges and universities, to include defending the American tradition and Western civilization, protecting free speech, eliminating wasteful administrative positions that drive up costs, removing all DEI bureaucrats, offering options for accelerated and low-cost degrees, providing meaningful job placement and career services, and implementing college entrance and exit exams to prove that students are getting their money's worth.
Once back in the White House, President Trump will direct the Department of Justice to pursue federal civil rights cases against schools that continue to engage in racial discrimination and will advance a measure to have schools that continue these illegal and unjust policies fined up to the entire amount of their endowment.
**TRANSCRIPT**
For many years, tuition costs at colleges and universities have been exploding, and I mean absolutely exploding while academics have been obsessed with indoctrinating America's youth. The time has come to reclaim our once great educational institutions from the radical Left, and we will do that.
Our secret weapon will be the college accreditation system. It's called accreditation for a reason.
The accreditors are supposed to ensure that schools are not ripping off students and taxpayers, but they have failed totally. When I return to the White House, I will fire the radical Left accreditors that have allowed our colleges to become dominated by Marxist Maniacs and lunatics.
We will then accept applications for new accreditors who will impose real standards on colleges once again and once and for all.
These standards will include defending the American tradition and Western civilization, protecting free speech, eliminating wasteful administrative positions that drive up costs incredibly, removing all Marxist diversity, equity, and inclusion bureaucrats, offering options for accelerated and low-cost degrees, providing meaningful job placement and career services, and implementing college entrance and exit exams to prove that students are actually learning and getting their money's worth.
Furthermore, I will direct the Department of Justice to pursue federal civil rights cases against schools that continue to engage in racial discrimination. And schools that persist in explicit unlawful discrimination under the guise of equity will not only have their endowment taxed, but through budget reconciliation, I will advance a measure to have them fined up to the entire amount of their endowment.
A portion of the seized funds will then be used as restitution for victims of these illegal and unjust policies, policies that hurt our country so badly. Colleges have gotten hundreds of billions of dollars from hard-working taxpayers and now we are going to get this anti-American insanity out of our institutions once and for all.
We are going to have real education in America.
Thank you.
[ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxkkL1urDAQhZ9m6EDjsY1N4eLuRaRASpu0_iOQhcUCVta-fUQUbZF0o5lvPh0du6R5Gh4G1AWIxinsQAT8HxD14vL-WvdvfVtSWl7KtpYin1f6D0THI8Un-mOp4mKn-dyqtghG0sCwiIbVmjNqNDXFaARDjUo5FwN5F2IQEWvlHTrneNRNMRlC4iiRsxq54BUPWnKOtpHWMqkQBIa4X9chrDc7h89juy-p8utSzGY8jrR_Z-qAupxzNVgf3bpeTwCo20e7xe05VGlMwLs78Pbv62__LeYdqFODaqRnuiTUWIqBfOm0b0rPHKJ1Vnsni82ElKd5nvZagcCPs5jT8RUAAP__ULBuZg) | [ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxckL1urDAQRp9m6EDjMf4rXNy9iBQrpU1ag01wYhYEXln79hFRtEXaOUdHo88tW4rTw4K6ANEc_QFEwP8B0bW9vL_K69u1q2lbXupOiraclP4DUX5s4an-VpqwuJjOq-oqbwVNDKtgmdSckdFkqtl6NJo4Q9JSKEcolEbvjWIKAwWpq2gJiaNAziTyljfca8E5OiOcY0IhtOjD8bVOfr255D_zfl-2ZlyXKtk55-3npR6ozyXmHPYTAfXH7PYAvL_vCXh3isfTLKU0f2u3UA6gXk3KiJHpmlBj3U401oMeTT2yAdENTo-DqHbrtxJTiodU0OLHOcPZ-A4AAP__7FJmPw)

body:
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62727923/404378920/-2044271459?refcode=EM_FR_230503ColinAllredLaunch_SplitCA_CA_90DO_10_NG_N_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg1NTc1NC1jY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azZd2zQ9eKwzCPqbDyMwBraG66DkLQz08g9aJHKbpBE=) Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full-ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[**_That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz, and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Shontel Brown’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62727931/404378928/-2044271459?refcode=EM_FR_230503ColinAllredLaunch_SplitCA_CA_90DO_10_NG_N_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg1NTc1NC1jY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azZd2zQ9eKwzCPqbDyMwBraG66DkLQz08g9aJHKbpBE=)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Beachwood, OH 44122

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Other organizations wouldn’t even consider this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Yesterday, we emailed you about how we missed our April fundraising goal
and needed to close our $7,205 gap.

We’re going to share something with you that other organizations wouldn’t
even consider and give you a real screenshot of how much that email raised
from our reporting sheet:

As you can see, we still need to raise $5,917 to close this gap. We’re
sharing this with you because as a grassroots-funded organization, we have
to be transparent with you. We don’t have tens of millions of dollars in
the bank like the DCCC — and unlike them, we reject all contributions from
corporate PACs.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134288?refcode=em20230503-28773&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28773%2E1203867%2E3BmHKK ]Please, will you make your
first contribution of $3 right now to help
us make up for our April shortfall? Every donation will help us recruit
the next AOC, Summer Lee, or Cori Bush.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134288?refcode=em20230503-28773&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28773%2E1203867%2E3BmHKK ]Contribute $3

No matter what — whether you can afford to donate today or need to wait —
thank you so much for being a part of our movement to transform the
Democratic Party to truly represent the people, not corporations.

-Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=28773%2E1203867%2E3BmHKK ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=28773%2E1203867%2E3BmHKK ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230503-28773-footer&t=1023&refcode2=28773_1203867_3BmHKK&akid=28773%2E1203867%2E3BmHKK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=28773%2E1203867%2E3BmHKK

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:__taking on Ted Cruz._ I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. clean_body: Together, we can defeat Ted Cruz | | | | | = ---|--- Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $15 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Colin Allred and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: = Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

clean_body: What are they afraid of? | | | Friend, We’re now 3 DAYS into May, and the Biden campaign STILL HAS NOT ANNOUNCED their FIRST-MONTH fundraising haul for April. They haven’t said a word about fundraising. Could it be that Crooked Joe’s approval rating hit a RECORD LOW in April according to Gallup , so his April fundraising was horrendous? Here’s what I think is going on... ...Biden’s handlers know how much our campaign raised in JUST 24 hours when I was arrested, so they’re worried we outraised them during their announcement month! Now, they’re using the first three days of May to beg their special interest donors for more money and PAD their April numbers! Some might say that’s crooked. But we won’t let them get away with it. We need to go on a fundraising blitz over the next 24 hours. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Biden’s campaign is funded by billionaire special interest donors, so it’s truly INCREDIBLE that our team of donors giving $1, $5, $24, $47 even has a shot at outraising Crooked Joe. body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s Senator Rick Scott – or as some call “The Least Popular Man in Washington.”

**I’ve been given that title for 2 reasons** \- I challenged Mitch McConnell for Republican Leader and I demanded that Republicans stop caving to Democrats.
Every day in Washington, I see some Republicans caving into a one-way, woke compromise with the Democrats – _and I won’t have it_.
I didn’t run for Senate to make friends with Mitch McConnell, Chuck Schumer, or Joe Biden.
In fact, I must be doing something right if they aren’t happy with me.
[**Stand with me as I demand new, bold conservative leadership!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3d97b5c07a7a4cecbd66015f1e743723&_e=F21bYyHds1QxPZjoB9vk3ukI58-0hwzs9_RZ7FAgqkDdSwCe-5mnkS_-oyyR1LFzNWUtiPEb8GMnBwQ-NE8N_G_OpNIKRqz9TAXJetDMnTCv__ksTIZ8eDps_wPwrqvb-O7pLAfBHOtBy7wsc6EBydNCbrDsBgX15rvSASM-73oh3QH8sxf51LsFPaSYSkM4C1RMSa2_bJVZjEgv6573TqzVNKePkcaT80DS2JZtOn9K6bFt7TR9ZNQ3s5toQ-pZgxJvNSUP2Ys1Na0sx6p-wAaV6TaIKjTL6g7nv0ZHnAIjr6rvY6-6okW56URNANnnCe4eR44NouRjh9wR-aAgOOOmChKIz2MSj33jQyV35QmAm7Zkfwphlele5IeuDAJL)

subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Will you help me win in Texas?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62729019/404383526/2071237055?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230503_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5YTU3ZTZhLWNlZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jaajZxPyv2dkEuF4MNP5uekb4B6wsrNvZoPRMK3RvKU=) Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?[ Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62729020/404383529/2071237055?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230503_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5YTU3ZTZhLWNlZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jaajZxPyv2dkEuF4MNP5uekb4B6wsrNvZoPRMK3RvKU=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62729021/404383530/2071237055?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=UTS_20230503_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5YTU3ZTZhLWNlZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jaajZxPyv2dkEuF4MNP5uekb4B6wsrNvZoPRMK3RvKU=)**

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62729026/404383536/2071237055?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230503_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5YTU3ZTZhLWNlZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jaajZxPyv2dkEuF4MNP5uekb4B6wsrNvZoPRMK3RvKU=)**

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

clean_body: Will you help me win in Texas? | = Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: = Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred = | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. The system is set up against us — so we're electing leaders who will upset the system. Please, consider making a =. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: We can elect a new Texas Senator and defeat Ted Cruz in 2024.
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Today’s news is as big as Texas. And it couldn’t be any better. My friend Colin Allred announced today that he is running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
I’ve known Colin since we met on the campaign trail in 2018, back when we were both running to unseat long-time Republican Congressmembers and to put our country back on a path to progress. And I have served with him since we won those races, helping flip the House from red to blue and bringing the voices and priorities of Texas to Washington, D.C. Now, Colin is taking on a new challenge, bringing that same effort to the Senate.
We made history in 2018. And we are going to do it again in 2024.
As we have learned, it will take all of us working together to make it happen. That’s why I am writing to you to share the news and to ask for your help in supporting Colin.
I am making a contribution to Colin Allred for Senate today, and I hope you will do the same. You can do so at the link here:
Give to Colin's campaign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf-ca]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf-ca [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf-ca]
We know what it takes to win on this team. And we know how important it is that we do. The stakes couldn’t be higher, and the contrast between the candidates couldn’t be more clear. I am excited to work to make it happen with you—and I thank you for all I know you will do between now and next November!
Together, we can do anything,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf-ca]

clean_body: There's always next month! | Peter we have some bad news... I know you've been paying close attention to JD Vance's fundraising numbers over the past few weeks so it pains us to tell you this but JD didn 't meet his goal last month. It 's not fair. He's been fighting against the radical agenda since his first day in office and is a key patriot within the conservative movement. But, we won't dwell on the past and instead focus on his next goal. We have to start early for next month! We CAN'T slip behind two months in a row! Hurry, Peter. JD is counting on patriots like you to step up and not let him fall behind. Thanks, Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Ron Johnson
subject: One small request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important.

| |
---
| | |
Friend,

I hate to bother you again about this, but it's really important.

I'll get straight to the point: even though we won, my campaign had to take on some debt.

It's the brutal reality of politics today. My campaign was incredibly tough, with millions spent before I had even announced my campaign for re-election. We had to spend, spend, spend to be able to mount a strong defense.

Unfortunately, to keep up with this pace, we incurred some debt. Fundraising was tough, and every single dollar spent was used to help my team come out victorious.

We just came up short, Friend.

I was hoping I could convince you to chip in **just $5 right** now to help me pay off this debt.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Fox News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
In the past few weeks, kids have been shot in this country for: Knocking on the wrong door. Approaching the wrong car. Turning into the wrong driveway.

Friends -
In the past few weeks, kids have been shot in this country for:
Knocking on the wrong door.
Approaching the wrong car.
Turning into the wrong driveway.
Asking a neighbor to stop shooting his AR-15 at 11pm so their infant can sleep.
It’s no wonder that even Fox News polls reveal how completely out of touch the Republican Party is with the rest of America.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2300?t=1&akid=1345%2E4767699%2EFYbbYO)
No one wants this — a country where the number one cause of death for our kids is guns.
GUNS! Not cancer. Not accidents. Guns!
And the response from Missouri Republicans? Arm the kids.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2394?t=2&akid=1345%2E4767699%2EFYbbYO)
It’s insane.
Gun safety may be a controversial issue in Washington, D.C. and some state capitals across the country, in the rest of America almost everyone wants action to make our communities safer from gun violence.
The Second Amendment is not a suicide pact.
\- Gavin
* * *

**☀ ️ Hi. Please don’t go just yet. ❤️**
If you are angry about the state of gun violence in America, there is something you can do about it. Please split a contribution between Gabby Giffords’ gun safety organization and Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we’d have the resources to take on the NRA nationally and in California and we could save lives. If that sounds worth $20, please split a donation between GIFFORDS and Campaign for Democracy today.

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Will you help me win in Texas?
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44352?t=6&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S) Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?** [Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44352?t=7&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44353?t=8&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44354?t=9&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44355?t=10&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44356?t=11&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44352?t=12&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S)
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44352?t=13&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred
[DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44352?t=14&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S)
---

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7451%2E878179%2EsC_o7S).**

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Derek Marshall with fight for abortion access!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
**Mifepristone is safe and effective, and it has been for over 20 years! Republicans want it banned.**

[**Pro-choice champion Derek Marshall just announced the re-launch of his Congressional campaign for California's 23rd District. Will you donate to his campaign to DEFEAT his anti-choice opponent?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731034/404391743/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230428_13&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGY1ZWVmZi1kM2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yfsv0cyCCSvyTaBe-9SCvpU69Hz9l4h1V29u7OB3p_Y=)

Mifepristone is a drug used in medication abortions which account for more than half of the abortions in the country. The data shows it is very effective and safer than Tylenol, Penicillin, and Viagra.

Thirteen states have outright abortion bans... so far. A Trump-appointed Texas judge ruled to halt Mifepristone’s FDA approval effectively banning it nationwide. That was appealed, and the ruling now sits in legal limbo for months.

**This isn’t about fetuses. This is about controlling women. Two-thirds of Americans FAVOR legalized abortion, yet Republicans continue to strip women of their bodily autonomy.

[Derek will FIGHT for women’s human rights and access to abortion care. clean_body: Mifepristone is safe and effective, and it has been for over 20 years! Republicans want it banned. = Mifepristone is a drug used in medication abortions which account for more than half of the abortions in the country. The data shows it is very effective and safer than Tylenol, Penicillin, and Viagra. Thirteen states have outright abortion bans... so far. A Trump-appointed Texas judge ruled to halt Mifepristone’s FDA approval effectively banning it nationwide. That was appealed, and the ruling now sits in legal limbo for months. This isn’t about fetuses. This is about controlling women. body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731097/404391870/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTU0MzkzZC1kNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eGa5KH0cj3zXsl8_0NjFbCdUPawKZBu7VKVmSQ4Z1lg=&emci=e0eba5c2-cce9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a554393d-d4e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)

| | **Over the last few months, we've watched as the farthest of the far right ram their most dangerous and extreme policy ideas through red state legislatures nationwide.** From conservatives going after abortion medication, to school boards banning and censoring books, to Republican legislatures introducing bills targeting trans children, to lawmakers purposefully making it harder to vote – and everything in between – far-right conservatives are doing everything in their power to force their extremist values on the American people. **Some of the most concerning players are the current front runners for the Republican presidential nomination: Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis.** With these two leading the pack, there's no way around it: Republicans across the country are embracing the most policies and ideas to undermine our democracy and turn back the clock on progress. Now is the time to stand up and defend our country from the far-right's undemocratic takeover of our institutions. But this requires an all-hands-on-deck response. **[Will you donate now to help fuel the movement to elect leaders who will protect our democracy – not undermine it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731098/404391871/-2044921950?refcode=2023-05-03-trump-desantis-s&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a554393d-d4e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTU0MzkzZC1kNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eGa5KH0cj3zXsl8_0NjFbCdUPawKZBu7VKVmSQ4Z1lg=)** Both Trump and DeSantis have shown disdain for the democratic process, preferring to dictate their dangerous agendas and attack anyone who disagrees. Republican party leadership has not only tolerated them, but welcomed them with open arms. It might seem early to be talking about presidential elections. But this is about more than one election. It's about the future of our country. I worry that our history is repeating its worst episodes, as a major political party is willing to throw away democratic principles and vilify our own citizens in pursuit of power. **Here's the good news: In the last election, this movement pushed them back.** But democracy is not something to be won in a single election. We must continue to work for it by showing up again and again for every election—**[chip in now to be part of the growing movement for democracy and against Republican extremism.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731099/404391872/-2044921950?refcode=2023-05-03-trump-desantis-s&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a554393d-d4e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTU0MzkzZC1kNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eGa5KH0cj3zXsl8_0NjFbCdUPawKZBu7VKVmSQ4Z1lg=)** clean_body: | | | | Over the last few months, we've watched as the farthest of the far right ram their most dangerous and extreme policy ideas through red state legislatures nationwide. From conservatives going after abortion medication, to school boards banning and censoring books, to Republican legislatures introducing bills targeting trans children, to lawmakers purposefully making it harder to vote – and everything in between – far-right conservatives are doing everything in their power to force their extremist values on the American people. Some of the most concerning players are the current front runners for the Republican presidential nomination: Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis. With these two leading the pack, there's no way around it: Republicans across the country are embracing the most policies and ideas to undermine our democracy and turn back the clock on progress. Now is the time to stand up and defend our country from the far-right's undemocratic takeover of our institutions. But this requires an all-hands-on-deck response. = Both Trump and DeSantis have shown disdain for the democratic process, preferring to dictate their dangerous agendas and attack anyone who disagrees. Republican party leadership has not only tolerated them, but welcomed them with open arms. It might seem early to be talking about presidential elections. But this is about more than one election. It's about the future of our country. I worry that our history is repeating its worst episodes, as a major political party is willing to throw away democratic principles and vilify our own citizens in pursuit of power. Here's the good news: In the last election, this movement pushed them back. But democracy is not something to be won in a single election. We must continue to work for it by showing up again and again for every election—= Together, we can and will win the fight for our democracy. subject: Sign: Demand Republicans in Congress raise the debt ceiling before June 1 >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign your name: Demand Republicans in Congress raise the debt ceiling before June 1 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5dee567-adf5-449f-8b8f-2849f7e95bec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7373a54d-9ab5-4504-9e3e-10c5cff893a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [Congressional Republicans are still refusing to raise the debt limit, threatening to push America into default, and tank our economy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1f14cfc-5fa4-4a27-879e-5e0407ad7cc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The debt limit authorizes borrowing for debt already incurred. Refusing to raise it doesn't mean you're cutting spending, it means you're not paying the bills you already owe. And if we don't raise it, it will send the US into default, dramatically raise the interest rates the government needs to pay on debt, and almost certainly send the economy into a deep recession. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen just warned that the US government could run out of money to pay its obligations as soon as June 1, and the jobs, benefits and financial security of millions of Americans could start disappearing. But Republican extremists in the House don't care, and they are willing to drive America off a cliff to appease their base. Millions of Americans will suffer in less than 30 days from now unless Republicans start acting like adults and do their job. [We must keep up the pressure and demand Republicans raise the debt ceiling before June 1. Add your name >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T871fa147-56e6-43e1-8e64-8fd1be181015/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Bennet HQ
subject: It's time we pass common-sense gun reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731298/404392197/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzRjMTkwNi1kNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kwo583uqEaAfkcPDscYDwRED6B_OcY_jLm7AJTsdsWc=)
Gun violence is the leading cause of death for kids in America. Children across the country are growing up with the reasonable fear that they could be shot at school. That's why Michael just introduced the _School Shooting Safety & Preparedness Act_, a bill that will collect data on school shootings to inform policy solutions and help us take a step towards keeping our kids safe. The American people are demanding action to protect our communities from gun violence. And Coloradans know this feeling all too well. From Columbine to Aurora to Boulder, Michael often points out that his daughters' generation has grown up in the shadow of gun violence — something his generation never had to do. **We cannot allow this to continue. Legislation like the _School Shooting Safety & Preparedness Act_ is a tangible step in the right direction: _protecting our children. _** We know that the gun lobby will use its power to obstruct Michael's common-sense gun safety legislation. That's why we need widespread grassroots support to drown them out and _finally_ make progress on this all-too-common issue.[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731299/404392198/1673072504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzRjMTkwNi1kNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kwo583uqEaAfkcPDscYDwRED6B_OcY_jLm7AJTsdsWc=&emci=b9884c52-39e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0c4c1906-d4e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) [**Will you join Michael and Team Bennet by becoming a community endorser of the _School Shooting Safety & Preparedness Act?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731300/404392199/1673072504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzRjMTkwNi1kNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kwo583uqEaAfkcPDscYDwRED6B_OcY_jLm7AJTsdsWc=&emci=b9884c52-39e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0c4c1906-d4e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731301/404392200/1673072504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzRjMTkwNi1kNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kwo583uqEaAfkcPDscYDwRED6B_OcY_jLm7AJTsdsWc=&emci=b9884c52-39e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0c4c1906-d4e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Thank you, thank you, thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Thanks to the kindness of people like you – who chipped in what you could, when you could over the last month – we surpassed our April fundraising goal! This grassroots team never fails to amaze me. I know we’re in for an uphill battle over the next year and a half. Washington Republicans have wasted no time in preparing to unseat me, and I know their attacks are only going to get worse over the next few months.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731366/404392535/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.05.03_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDc4ZWI4ZS1kNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULx2X4BhtlfFrJTXelgz9diTK7EWakN7VUmumKia-qo=)
Peter, I can’t thank you enough.

Thanks to the kindness of people like you – who chipped in what you could, when you could over the last month – we surpassed our April fundraising goal! This grassroots team never fails to amaze me.

I know we’re in for an uphill battle over the next year and a half. Washington Republicans have wasted no time in preparing to unseat me, and I know their attacks are only going to get worse over the next few months.

But Peter, even though we have a tough fight ahead, you and I both know that Northeast Ohio is worth fighting for. _And with this grassroots team, I’m more confident than ever that we will win this fight, once again, and bring home another victory for the Birthplace of Champions._

Thank you for believing in this campaign,

Emilia
| [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62731367/404392536/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.05.03_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDc4ZWI4ZS1kNGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULx2X4BhtlfFrJTXelgz9diTK7EWakN7VUmumKia-qo=)
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

Peter, Election Day may seem far off, but that doesn't mean we can spend these next few months sitting idly and twiddling our thumbs._**Republicans are certainly not.**_
Instead, far-right extremists are using these calmer months to ensure that _as many_ voter suppression laws as possible are in place by 2024. **And their efforts have not gone in vain: During last year's midterm elections, voter suppression laws blocked more than 4.6 million people from voting. **
Peter, this is only the beginning. Republicans know they can't win in 2024 unless they suppress the will of the people, and that's _exactly_ what they're trying to do.
We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like _you_ prefer to vote.
So please, we need 291 more responses before midnight to ensure statistically significant results.

We’ve officially grown our commanding lead in the GOP primary to more than 40 POINTS while also leading Crooked Joe Biden by 4 points in the general election! The time has come to lock up the nomination, Friend. We can’t give Soros and Biden their wish of a long and drawn-out contest that gives them the upper hand. With YOUR help, we can effectively END the primary TODAY and shift 100% of our focus to DOUBLING our current lead over Crooked Joe. Friend, this same new poll shows that not only are we SURGING, but that we’re doing so among voters who are the most concerned about our country’s future under Biden. Simply put, the American people know OUR movement is our country’s FINAL HOPE. Just think back to my FINAL State of the Union Address as your President... Our economy was booming like never before. Overseas jobs were pouring back into the country. Cost of living was affordable. We were not only energy independent, we were energy DOMINANT. Our border was SECURE. The wall was being built. Our streets were SAFE. Washington swamp creatures were finally beholden to THE PEOPLE. We were respected on the world stage. Our military was STRONG. We were TOUGH on China and Russia. Your God-given freedoms were protected. Simply put, we were WINNING! And all of this can be had once more. That’s why Americans from every corner of the country are UNITING behind Trump 2024, because together, we can and we WILL save America. But our fight to win back the White House and renew America’s greatness is dependent on the support of grassroots patriots like YOU. Thank you, | Donald J. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream — from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy — and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz — when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
[**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $25, or whatever you can spare, between my campaign and Eric Swalwell’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62732419/404396328/-984110450?refcode=E21380-20230503-CollinAllred-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjkzMTYxYi1kNmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-iK8x1l22Volnxtjl99jEgJV7TwGS_RoPiWbiz6eco=)
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this,
Colin Allred

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_"The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=04d0b7bf706c4df0b480d5f47965310f&_e=VEvbwDoIs0slLquDM35FB3bwJFZRc4cQbXFMREaXDtcBd2wRNwKDrDvDhHBeNMig0e3xRupvb3qPBo_cT4vMmkaXOf2azJejeMX_LJ5WMLCy3FGgM5SCR8ZSlvQPVog8J1z_DdESGCJrrPQZwIb_Qw_4NYa5VuDQCi1lrJTHop7BRpg0oikGSbtI1zyZgtGGhDHsn_V3IbEVib0SCSj07M7m3jtzoF3nKjMxLSHR4uL8PURCNbX8I1MbweT62rmvjNl4OjAuag3OsSXC3XqcUN9gGTiTFxJnboTL1LV737QocTqqofgURInMZlf4j_BKThN1Bczh61jdNxdL1kNupdmLdaKFGppPh0mlnLyz6_6YQlmN9U4n05LPr_3EhAJ_YTlx2z69jCMNXI_Xhx1hsTo-ZFuHOZduPf4syFDJfPXwKGP-Bmn6QIFshSoMgiIC73r_lK4mXt-hnTUy-MU10Q%3D%3D "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=04d0b7bf706c4df0b480d5f47965310f&_e=VEvbwDoIs0slLquDM35FB3bwJFZRc4cQbXFMREaXDtcBd2wRNwKDrDvDhHBeNMig0e3xRupvb3qPBo_cT4vMmkaXOf2azJejeMX_LJ5WMLCy3FGgM5SCR8ZSlvQPVog8J1z_DdESGCJrrPQZwIb_Qw_4NYa5VuDQCi1lrJTHop7BRpg0oikGSbtI1zyZgtGGhDHsn_V3IbEVib0SCSj07M7m3jtzoF3nKjMxLSHR4uL8PURCNbX8I1MbweT62rmvjNl4OjAuag3OsSXC3XqcUN9gGTiTFxJnboTL1LV737QocTqqofgURInMZlf4j_BK-Q8lI2Y9KxB5m4qHwyYra9qJVvNyxlFvZT68Sc7hbKOw_ucnnr5tZG2S9D9C57iKprN-yuf0w36FuHzA3sU88l2h8fXyWCxRnjCRA3107vO3c6-j4rw2Lqtx6X4ozf6QY68Flh2MP8QoeDQiOnL2cw%3D%3D "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**

Thank you,

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: You’re invited
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
On behalf of the House Democratic Caucus, I want to thank you for your continued support of our efforts in the Tennessee House. You are essential in our fight to build a better Tennessee.
In the week since our adjournment, I have traveled from Memphis to Knoxville visiting with individuals who are stepping up to strengthen our Caucus with much-needed support and resources. Our large gathering in Knoxville was inspiring, and I look forward to our next opportunity to get together in Nashville on May 25th. Please join me and my fellow House Democratic Caucus members at the home of our generous hosts, Brooks and Bert Mathews. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may25mathews]
Raising funds now will create a strong foundation for Democratic House candidates in the upcoming legislative elections. Please consider joining our host committee for this event with a contribution in support of candidates in targeted districts across our state.
Tennesseans have suffered long enough from state leaders who refuse to stand up for what’s right or focus on issues that really matter to our families. Now is the time to make a lasting change. I hope you will join us on May 25th as we begin the work of ending the GOP supermajority in the Tennessee House.
Thank you,
John Ray Clemmons
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may25mathews]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may25mathews [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may25mathews]

name: Andy Beshear
subject: I'm glad to know that I can count on you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
My team called on you to step up for this big deadline, and you showed up. Peter,

For the last week, my team has called on supporters across the Commonwealth to chip in to my re-election campaign ahead of the final pre-primary reporting deadline. Folks from every corner of Kentucky stepped up to help ensure my team and I have the resources to take on whoever wins the primary on May 16.

I couldn't be more honored and grateful to have the support of this grassroots team. The primary election is in less than two weeks, and thanks to supporters like you, I'm now in an even stronger position to kick off the general election.

As we look ahead to the rest of 2023, I know we will face obstacles along the way, and millions will be spent to attack me and try to tear down my campaign. Still, because of the enthusiasm and generosity of this grassroots team, I am more optimistic than ever about our ability to bring Kentuckians together, run an honest race, and win again in November.

Thank you so much for your continued support.

Sincerely,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62733313/404399474/96677371?refcode=em23_230503_ty_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230503_ty_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cba83134-d8e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmE4MzEzNC1kOGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vGQWdUrtFhu2ENAqcATbslUvc8djAz7LnharJo6kJuM=)
---

Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204

Fellow Conservative, Last week, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he’s challenging **Joe Manchin** for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc5e2c8590d44b45858d5113aa68915d&_e=llxThDngVpkPqg7t6KcCmuSydT8oY7XVblsypIqruEKHTqv65tt7WK_3Gl5JkiCPQjnooqcQFGWgi2vPYWPlR6UOliUgG0wmQKvMrOwavn8jmhGPp0HYBa20qIGOVIuaOzuCy6_BeMuAUrTZw9nltwO9vY5GCbrq-IHp7mTrxiOeovEYL8a9mpEd7okB7OMPvzw9trCjZ6mefe1uwwza8cvauZHrtGQLKAtaJcKJko-8rw0JJ9RmeWJyfmOVp19d9bxA1Fmic8Gd0jRJLWoxFRv74E1O9su9keksZxKqQzQSOvzrEkY_R2pWmfyZcs9nSRHhhEb2VXKnjxK2hwagq337JYLyS4vfdiKhSvwRWYfdKK9RgWOECIzulrb1MLc6a9EZkZaQvLDa2TYmupvYLzh6Leyn6w4Jx07UWzVUZIM%3D)**

**We need 400 responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you.**

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc5e2c8590d44b45858d5113aa68915d&_e=llxThDngVpkPqg7t6KcCmuSydT8oY7XVblsypIqruEKHTqv65tt7WK_3Gl5JkiCPQjnooqcQFGWgi2vPYWPlR6UOliUgG0wmQKvMrOwavn8jmhGPp0HYBa20qIGOVIuaOzuCy6_BeMuAUrTZw9nltwO9vY5GCbrq-IHp7mTrxiOeovEYL8a9mpEd7okB7OMPvzw9trCjZ6mefe1uwwza8cvauZHrtGQLKAtaJcKJko-8rw0JJ9RmeWJyfmOVp19d9bxA1Fmic8Gd0jRJLWoxFcINgi9Hvw0HXN0bJHUAh7QSm0RAGkLiW6_HKlcnXA-xpi2nUdo2KE7TZgAfXzqvKDON_gWu-QTvOwtz7dQpVAJpAEgNolv3Ka0D-6TK3y94UKjN_mtTkVQ0KN1soGhb2KXEziD8fO8ZwhxZiMWmkKU%3D)
Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

Please, if you can,**[take two minutes right now and submit your response to our questionnaire.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc5e2c8590d44b45858d5113aa68915d&_e=llxThDngVpkPqg7t6KcCmuSydT8oY7XVblsypIqruEKHTqv65tt7WK_3Gl5JkiCPQjnooqcQFGWgi2vPYWPlR6UOliUgG0wmQKvMrOwavn8jmhGPp0HYBa20qIGOVIuaOzuCy6_BeMuAUrTZw9nltwO9vY5GCbrq-IHp7mTrxiOeovEYL8a9mpEd7okB7OMPvzw9trCjZ6mefe1uwwza8cvauZHrtGQLKAtaJcKJko-8rw0JJ9RmeWJyfmOVp19d9bxA1Fmic8Gd0jRJLWoxFV2hcgQu_4n9_Nx3A2h8Bb2T0UmM59dfXRscJMoOya-PxBdfSbRsP06SLo6i4sssWa2egAw2k-uzYnFqSNxsYMy_asYzblpqK-EkOBthjhQbBWckWZdr1xvNRBBoPYNTcNbtpCc3u8lJqXCObHmj-48%3D)** We’re looking to conservatives like you for guidance ahead of what we’re expecting to be an extremely hard-fought campaign.

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc5e2c8590d44b45858d5113aa68915d&_e=llxThDngVpkPqg7t6KcCmuSydT8oY7XVblsypIqruEKHTqv65tt7WK_3Gl5JkiCPQjnooqcQFGWgi2vPYWPlR6UOliUgG0wmQKvMrOwavn8jmhGPp0HYBa20qIGOVIuaOzuCy6_BeMuAUrTZw9nltwO9vY5GCbrq-IHp7mTrxiOeovEYL8a9mpEd7okB7OMPvzw9trCjZ6mefe1uwwza8cvauZHrtGQLKAtaJcKJko-8rw0JJ9RmeWJyfmOVp19d9bxA1Fmic8Gd0jRJLWoxFahrDObjnsGrdjnV0-ObOMTyU9k-EXEzKZgpgbungL6R3yXqmxKqsfkF93dKNhhYJwFnEsY9YLd_iATz6HSqdFbVqI8IARwnR3p8C0IXevg1FK96YZss_wXTfr8pvcus-PmJhf_TAGmsxq-EU2k2qjA%3D)

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

subject: Anti-Americanism in higher education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vszC3k7DPN

Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oszC3k7DPN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
fellow American,

Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But
recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of
American life.

Today it
asserts itself in many forms-including critical race theory-in
our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the
media, in sports, and even in our military.

The last
gubernatorial election in Virginia brought the corruption of
American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our
national conversation.

The
breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed
patriotism-without which self-government is impossible-is not
something we can allow to continue.

While
there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done
to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead.

Education
is where this attack on America began-and it is the battlefield
on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and
limited constitutional government.

Hillsdale
College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We
are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who
agree with Hillsdale's mission, to redouble our efforts at this
crucial time for our nation-no matter the cost.

That's
why we are expanding our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by
Reaching and Teaching Millions.

You can
support this vital project through this link:
https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/preserve-freedom-for-future-generations

The
Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching
Millions will give informed patriots across the country the
effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we
need your help.

The
project has three key objectives:

Expand the circulation of Imprimis, our digest of liberty, to
reach millions more Americans.

Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans)
enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101:
The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American
Story: A Land of Hope," and "American Citizenship and Its
Decline" with Victor Davis Hanson.

Launch additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter
schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, our American
classical K-12 curriculum (including the new Hillsdale 1776
Curriculum) to thousands more American teachers and
homeschoolers.

And your
generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

Hillsdale
College conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of
liberty-as it does all of its work-while refusing to accept one
penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of
federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to
expand this effective program, we will need thousands of gifts
between $25 and $100. This is the range in which most supporters
give. We will also need a significant number of $500 to $1,000
donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

We
urgently need your help.

You can
safely and securely renew your support using this link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61765732:szC3k7DPN:m:3:2532013465:911632AB4442CF7B5B34BD5B599EC58B:r

As the
forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to
undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and
to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage
them ever more aggressively-including on the central battlefield
of education.

That's
why I hope you'll make your most generous gift in this critical
time for America.

Every
dollar you can give will help expand our Project to Defend
Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.

Thank you
for your generosity. I hope you'll stand with us. Together, we
will work to preserve freedom for future generations of
Americans.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

subject: Sign your name: Oppose McCarthy’s budget cuts

It would inflict devastating cuts to our rural communities, raise costs for hardworking families, and set back economic growth. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62735342/404406301/1130754827?refcode=EM_PET_230503pet_N_TK_90DA_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjYwNDJmMy1kY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_TITNrYt9zauY3ADYmRgvMItYPgYCYP-VhngiF0zxA=)

Kevin McCarthy's spending plan was passed in the House, and it will hurt countless Ohioans and hold the full faith and credit of the United States hostage. It would inflict devastating cuts to our rural communities, raise costs for hard-working families, and set back economic growth.

Speaker McCarthy’s plan:
* Endangers public safety and negatively impacts public health by cutting 330 rail safety inspections in Ohio alone, denying 2,000 Ohioans admission to opioid treatment, and shutting down at least 5 air traffic control towers in our state.

* Raises costs for families and students by eliminating 12,300 preschool and child care slots in Ohio, stripping food assistance from 426,000 Ohioans, making college more expensive for 200,000 Ohioans, and raising housing costs for more than 23,000 Ohioans.

* Harms seniors and veterans by worsening Social Security and Medicare assistance wait times for 2.6 million seniors in Ohio and threatening medical care for Ohio veterans with a quarter million fewer outpatient visits available.

The bill was shortsighted, and that’s why I voted no and am urging you to sign on to my petition to tell Kevin McCarthy to stop playing politics with our nation’s economy.

[**Please take a moment to sign our petition today to oppose Kevin McCarthy’s budget plan. Together, we can stand up for hard-working families and rural communities in Northwest Ohio.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62735344/404406364/-1969154873?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjYwNDJmMy1kY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_TITNrYt9zauY3ADYmRgvMItYPgYCYP-VhngiF0zxA=&emci=ffce2ac4-c1e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1b6042f3-dce9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2814549) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62735346/404406367/-1969154873?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjYwNDJmMy1kY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_TITNrYt9zauY3ADYmRgvMItYPgYCYP-VhngiF0zxA=&emci=ffce2ac4-c1e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1b6042f3-dce9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2814549) Thank you for your support,

clean_body: It would inflict devastating cuts to our rural communities, raise costs for hardworking families, and set back economic growth. | | = Kevin McCarthy's spending plan was passed in the House, and it will hurt countless Ohioans and hold the full faith and credit of the United States hostage. It would inflict devastating cuts to our rural communities, raise costs for hard-working families, and set back economic growth. Speaker McCarthy’s plan: Endangers public safety and negatively impacts public health by cutting 330 rail safety inspections in Ohio alone, denying 2,000 Ohioans admission to opioid treatment, and shutting down at least 5 air traffic control towers in our state. Raises costs for families and students by eliminating 12,300 preschool and child care slots in Ohio, stripping food assistance from 426,000 Ohioans, making college more expensive for 200,000 Ohioans, and raising housing costs for more than 23,000 Ohioans. Harms seniors and veterans by worsening Social Security and Medicare assistance wait times for 2.6 million seniors in Ohio and threatening medical care for Ohio veterans with a quarter million fewer outpatient visits available. The bill was shortsighted, and that’s why I voted no and am urging you to sign on to my petition to tell Kevin McCarthy to stop playing politics with our nation’s economy. Thank you for your support, Marcy Kaptur | | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help Marcy by giving any amount today? = Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Kaptur for Congress PO Box 899 Toledo, OH 43697 United States We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, please . If you would like to stay subscribed but receive fewer emails, fill out this form .**

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name for Supreme Court ethics reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We need a code of ethics to restore public confidence in the Court.
#
Peter,
This week, I led a Senate Judiciary Committee hearing to discuss adopting a code of ethics and begin restoring integrity to the highest court in the land: the Supreme Court of the United States of America.
Recent reports have made this issue more timely, but it certainly isn’t new. I first called on the Chief Justice to create a code of conduct for the Court eleven years ago. It has yet to happen. And in the meantime, public confidence in the Court and our judiciary continues to plummet.
**[If the Supreme Court won’t take action, then Congress must. Add your name to the petition now to support a written code of ethical standards for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62735430/404406766/520107522?refcode=dd_em_230503_1_t1&ms=dd_em_230503_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDJkNTAxMS1kZGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1A0h1NIjhtFGCy7r62XPhIoycJWjYGV3ehA88Rm5Ml0=&emci=01c10f16-d7e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f42d5011-dde9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
Our Committee has made record progress confirming President Biden’s judicial nominees. Once confirmed, each of these judges is bound by the high bar of ethical behavior that every federal judge in the country must follow. There is no reason Supreme Court Justices should be exempt.
In order to restore the public’s faith in the Supreme Court, there must be a clear code of ethics that holds a Justice accountable for their actions if they engage in conduct that crosses the line.
**[The American people expect public servants to follow ethical standards. The Supreme Court is no different. Sign on now to support our call for much-needed ethics reform.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62735434/404406780/520107522?refcode=dd_em_230503_1_t1&ms=dd_em_230503_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDJkNTAxMS1kZGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1A0h1NIjhtFGCy7r62XPhIoycJWjYGV3ehA88Rm5Ml0=&emci=01c10f16-d7e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f42d5011-dde9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin
