body:
Will you help me win in Texas?
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17017?t=6&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw) Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $3 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Ron Be Gone to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?**[**Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17018?t=8&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17025?t=15&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17026?t=16&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17027?t=17&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw)
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[**We need to raise $4,000 by MIDNIGHT to fund our crucial work. Will you chip in $1, $3, or anything you can afford today? »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17018?t=19&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

_Colin Allred_
[DONATE »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17018?t=21&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw)
---
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw).**

[Click here](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.ronbegone.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Beat Ron DeSantis »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/120?t=4&akid=1786%2E564421%2EHHoZiw)

Friend, On April 28, North Carolina’s right-wing Supreme Court paved the way for Republican legislators to gerrymander the state’s congressional map—scrapping a previous ruling prior to the court’s conservative takeover declaring gerrymandering illegal. This is shocking, infuriating, and unacceptable. Partisan gerrymandering is an assault on our democracy. It allows elected officials to pick their voters, when it should be the other way around. Republicans are working overtime to dismantle our democracy. Far-right politicians have enabled judicial extremists to interpret the Constitution as they see fit.
But we can stop them. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judge Rules in Favor of Judicial Watch Client: Bucks County, PA Acted in Bad Faith in Withholding School COVID Shutdown Documents – Court Orders County to Pay $3,000
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that a Bucks County, PA judge ruled
the county acted “in bad faith” in withholding records that are,
by law, public from Megan Brock, a parent represented by Judicial
Watch who was sued by Bucks County to prevent the release of documents
related to COVID restrictions and the re-opening of the county’s
schools that she requested under the commonwealth’s Right-to-Know
Law.

[alt_text]

[*****]
May 03, 2023

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63176&L=29440&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkZ2UtcnVsZXMtaW4tZmF2b3Itb2YtanctY2xpZW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=9cfe357df4f258d5a9f17458f4cddea585d6dcebb1997eca20c84db3ea813a84]

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26b8dcf6d19b429bb45b237d67b72e38&_e=4nnFgFPNJD6zfderejulZ44Wo1vn_-yi_ax8EU1tJBl5RqNsfJCgf9YarMPkyM7e7nNxCR-sW9Bbgzsl22qAUzoATEwI-9Duqy2MGX_JTx_3p40QWpr0Mr0uJ-kI_hGWkoTAXQOI93OOO-cydpxuM8sMpu0NO9c5g0yQw0ze1srVRJyxiseSM-w9hN_1ijjFfYkYo1GLgGLV7YUUfip3Dj__KGp31cpyvcuBme8gMUcKpRVt4MX6CyaP2oYVNbYNMs7D5h6uE8Gt3AzZyKJdVQEMnoeuA5CVvpHBlkqKZmlykySD9oTW90Uv4U46K4UkiEKX3GNVP2ZQaOoggevVwg4QdHSQQRK4Pz2OkLs7vTwSoWMQ-t5mnmdQ0kH8WGFlsVFnaslyHkr5sa4kEV7XLOeQcsBH_55y0AU2xvISRGjnH_yN84yKTcxWPvhJTyWdg9WmLmhE40x12Pzy8ylPYA%3D%3D)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26b8dcf6d19b429bb45b237d67b72e38&_e=4nnFgFPNJD6zfderejulZ44Wo1vn_-yi_ax8EU1tJBl5RqNsfJCgf9YarMPkyM7e7nNxCR-sW9Bbgzsl22qAUzoATEwI-9Duqy2MGX_JTx_3p40QWpr0Mr0uJ-kI_hGWkoTAXQOI93OOO-cydpxuM8sMpu0NO9c5g0yQw0ze1srVRJyxiseSM-w9hN_1ijjFfYkYo1GLgGLV7YUUfip3Dj__KGp31cpyvcuBme8gMUcKpRVt4MX6CyaP2oYVNbYNMs7D5h6uE8Gt3AzZyKJdVQEMnoeuA5CVvpHBlkqKZmlykySD9oTW90Uv4U46K4UkRpYrogPthnCwHoZg2CqZXi2sapUr8xG_6aSLP_h_3F0tO3MaE6oDsOR3FDWMQH-qDWbpb_2WgrdjKQH02YjG1AwGEkwFrvde3JsnXYLcuSxQCu8qzbeK9QTT2UkgUHruKR6JshirKOx6aLbc9vmA1Q%3D%3D)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26b8dcf6d19b429bb45b237d67b72e38&_e=4nnFgFPNJD6zfderejulZ44Wo1vn_-yi_ax8EU1tJBl5RqNsfJCgf9YarMPkyM7e7nNxCR-sW9Bbgzsl22qAUzoATEwI-9Duqy2MGX_JTx_3p40QWpr0Mr0uJ-kI_hGWkoTAXQOI93OOO-cydpxuM8sMpu0NO9c5g0yQw0ze1srVRJyxiseSM-w9hN_1ijjFfYkYo1GLgGLV7YUUfip3Dj__KGp31cpyvcuBme8gMUcKpRVt4MX6CyaP2oYVNbYNMs7D5h6uE8Gt3AzZyKJdVQEMnoeuA5CVvpHBlkqKZmlykySD9oTW90Uv4U46K4UkKvSAkQ-ErU3NlvpoxOs7valCrsQ0GznAZ-6hpBLY7fUBhKJBTJeuMVlN3j3ZgrhMCkqrMUaYDM-DI0CW1OlcaDt50t970TEcS7H6asCuSFOLRm7qFCmItpZdWhPLJiSOtFOFWWLvAl-dvPhoLuXsaw%3D%3D "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

body:
Our first ad targeting the Republicans who voted to cut the VA
#
Derek -
In 2022, Lauren Boebert won re-election by a margin of less than a thousand votes.
And last week, she voted to cut the VA’s budget by 22%.
[**Watch our newest ad targeting Lauren Boebert. We’re using advanced data to target 20,000 Veterans and Military Families in her district, and we need you to donate $5 to keep it running. Help us make sure every person in her district knows about this disgraceful vote.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23-boebert.eMky-h&refcode=em230503-1-15&t=1&akid=8400%2E3013755%2E6PUDfF)

body:
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
It’s Senator Rick Scott – or as some call “The Least Popular Man in Washington.”

**I’ve been given that title for 2 reasons** \- I challenged Mitch McConnell for Republican Leader and I demanded that Republicans stop caving to Democrats.
Every day in Washington, I see some Republicans caving into a one-way, woke compromise with the Democrats – _and I won’t have it_.
I didn’t run for Senate to make friends with Mitch McConnell, Chuck Schumer, or Joe Biden.
In fact, I must be doing something right if they aren’t happy with me.
[**Stand with me as I demand new, bold conservative leadership!**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b81b83e61ab143ae882f7398fab5d4f8&_e=2poUVXf8F01oRVTWUHabnVPWOnzXwcFYg80EPb9FjsYVI5_qdX82j0VacPQdPx-W851m7wwNolnq6vePBLLHVTCdzwiWZJChPL9HnF5J4E0jFl1uIVV3GdQNQ5WIO_lD-Sdqbzcy6gRqQDxShY359tBiVLDgsYiVmC82zaQasIpX3BGLkPCUAKQzWgVnxFsMKlrAQ5GHy9GIPHwto196jPJPJmRK47J72TVsoTy-b7fgzximWGX1sj_bSzF_1NtuvRJrUE_TX1BqjP8tg3x5XSdEUrfxnwg2qqgw9ZIZRTQDmdmMEsG_yeUZY_Af4SjsIZWW3GkYl3FtNuYqoL0UzXkeawIdpmLJSn-oqH2-FkyyYuJgQgP4f31fC9-rPEc7ELAcHTpkpYIPhOnyec7qKA%3D%3D)

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Thank you so much!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Thank you for all the kind words, the donations, and the moral support I have gotten as we begin preparations for my re-election campaign. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62737219/404412234/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjFhODdhZS1lMmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8iVQLpZBwSmJWji2QlgGHhtWdXV7UKELCHjkSt9muKk=&emci=9dfda25d-cfe9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=bf1a87ae-e2e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Hi team, Just wanted to send you a quick note personally thanking you for all your support over the past few weeks. Since I have been named a “Frontline” member – meaning that I represent one of the most competitive districts in 2024 – the outpouring of support has been overwhelming. Thank you for all the kind words, the donations, and the moral support I have gotten as we begin preparations for my re-election campaign. You are why I do this. Our community deserves someone who truly understands to represent us, and even though we know we have a tough re-election campaign ahead of us, I know that we will be victorious with the support of our community behind me. If you can, I have another ask of you: Will you please commit to donating $5 per month to my campaign? Recurring donations make it a lot easier to set campaign budgets and understand what will come in each month, so even if it is just $5, it will make a huge difference. name: SCOTUS Alert (via the NDRC)
subject: a right-wing theory so fringe, even prominent conservatives want nothing to do with it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
here’s what you need to know before the Court’s ruling in Moore v. Harper
|
---

Team, we need to talk about _Moore v. Harper_.

It’s a pending Supreme Court case where Republicans have advanced the fringe “independent state legislature theory.” If the Court endorses their position, it could give GOP legislatures unchecked power to gerrymander, suppress voting rights, and even undermine legitimate presidential election results. [**_Help combat GOP efforts to undermine our elections: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62737273/404412338/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230503_FR_5B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMWE4N2FlLWUyZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o1yfiG_vKoa9JQjD0ylt86bmDqTPBI-J90mRv-OaYcs=) The theory is so extreme that even _prominent conservatives_ have called the theory “radical” and warn its adoption could lead to “nightmare scenarios” for our democracy: **“It is rare to encounter a constitutional theory so antithetical to the Constitution’s text and structure, so inconsistent with the Constitution’s original meaning, so disdainful of this Court’s precedent, and so potentially damaging for American democracy.”
– Judge J. Michael Luttig, former Bush-appointed federal circuit judge

“An affirmation of the theory would be a constitutional travesty.”
– Steven G. Calabresi, co-founder of the Federalist Society** Team, when you’ve lost the Federalist Society – the conservative legal organization that recommends conservative judges across the country – you _know_ you’ve gone too far. [**_Help us fight back against GOP extremism: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62737274/404412339/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230503_FR_5B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMWE4N2FlLWUyZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o1yfiG_vKoa9JQjD0ylt86bmDqTPBI-J90mRv-OaYcs=) Republicans are trying to subvert our democratic system of checks and balances in a way we haven’t seen in decades – maybe not even in centuries. _That means our work at the NDRC has never been more important._

Remember what A.G. Holder said: **“Other generations of Americans have faced difficulties, and they have always found a way to protect our democracy. Thanks to people like you who are committed to this work, I suspect we will be able to do so as well.”**

He’s right – together, we have the power to protect our democracy from those who seek to undermine it, just like so many in generations before have done. **Are you with us?** [**_Help defend democracy: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62737275/404412340/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230503_FR_5B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMWE4N2FlLWUyZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o1yfiG_vKoa9JQjD0ylt86bmDqTPBI-J90mRv-OaYcs=) We don’t know how the Supreme Court will rule in _Moore_ , team. But we do know that, no matter what happens, we must be prepared to continue our democracy-saving work.

We hope we can count on you. | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: here’s what you need to know before the Court’s ruling in Moore v. Harper | Team, we need to talk about Moore v. Harper. It’s a pending Supreme Court case where Republicans have advanced the fringe “independent state legislature theory.” If the Court endorses their position, it could give GOP legislatures unchecked power to gerrymander, suppress voting rights, and even undermine legitimate presidential election results. = The theory is so extreme that even prominent conservatives have called the theory “radical” and warn its adoption could lead to “nightmare scenarios” for our democracy: “It is rare to encounter a constitutional theory so antithetical to the Constitution’s text and structure, so inconsistent with the Constitution’s original meaning, so disdainful of this Court’s precedent, and so potentially damaging for American democracy.” – Judge J. Michael Luttig, former Bush-appointed federal circuit judge “An affirmation of the theory would be a constitutional travesty.” – Steven G. Calabresi, co-founder of the Federalist Society Team, when you’ve lost the Federalist Society – the conservative legal organization that recommends conservative judges across the country – you know you’ve gone too far. = Republicans are trying to subvert our democratic system of checks and balances in a way we haven’t seen in decades – maybe not even in centuries. That means our work at the NDRC has never been more important. Remember what A.G. Holder said: “Other generations of Americans have faced difficulties, and they have always found a way to protect our democracy. Thanks to people like you who are committed to this work, I suspect we will be able to do so as well.” He’s right – together, we have the power to protect our democracy from those who seek to undermine it, just like so many in generations before have done. Are you with us? = We don’t know how the Supreme Court will rule in Moore , team. But we do know that, no matter what happens, we must be prepared to continue our democracy-saving work. We hope we can count on you. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Justin Amash
subject: Facing the audience
body:
On town halls and growing as a representative
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in app](https://open.substack.com/pub/justinamash/p/facing-the-audience?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store) or [online](https://substack..gr5qRyEjNIkNeJ73vNuk259P7xJgiU_BwB0v6c4d2Do?)
---
# [Facing the audience](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1137026&post_id=118691326&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE4NjkxMzI2LCJpYXQiOjE2ODMxNDA0NzYsImV4cCI6MTY4NTczMjQ3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMzcwMjYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.O9HQE94iw6d7YyNFi6hogJiH1AK1TurHNehcTakJXRI)
### On town halls and growing as a representative
| | [Justin Amash](https://substack.com/redirect/fb151d8d-ba49-49a2-ba1a-2da4f9383d24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| May 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fb151d8d-ba49-49a2-ba1a-2da4f9383d24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1137026&post_id=118691326&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE4NjkxMzI2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY4MzE0MDQ3NiwiZXhwIjoxNjg1NzMyNDc2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTEzNzAyNiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0._wUAvinCjdnX0lCKnCaSTwsflRZ3kXcTEvdXTdKjRV8&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1137026&post_id=118691326&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE4NjkxMzI2LCJpYXQiOjE2ODMxNDA0NzYsImV4cCI6MTY4NTczMjQ3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMzcwMjYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.O9HQE94iw6d7YyNFi6hogJiH1AK1TurHNehcTakJXRI&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack..fs1heYNvopbNrlXAk6xP2Q8kx1xUqB9qrCA1fZwFpUI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1137026&post_id=118691326&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE4NjkxMzI2LCJpYXQiOjE2ODMxNDA0NzYsImV4cCI6MTY4NTczMjQ3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMzcwMjYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.O9HQE94iw6d7YyNFi6hogJiH1AK1TurHNehcTakJXRI)
---
The other day I got an email from my freshman representative in Congress, Hillary Scholten, reminding me of Tuesday evening's town hall in Grand Rapids. Unlike a previous email she'd sent announcing the event, this time she mentioned that she'd be joined by the Kent County sheriff and Grand Rapids mayor.
My first thought was _I hope she 's not constantly going to have special guests._
A lot of officials hold joint town halls to create a "safety in numbers" situation, giving the audience way less time with the sponsoring individual. Think about it this way: If there's something controversial in the news, or if you draw a tough crowd, would you rather be up there by yourself or with a couple other targets, each one eating up a chunk of the time?
Of course, sometimes it's reasonable and appropriate to invite a guest. Occasionally, a big topic crosses federal/state/local boundaries or you just need an expert to help explain things.
When I served as the district's representative, I invited a guest maybe a few times when it seemed warranted--but that's out of more than 100 town halls. Representative Scholten hasn't been in office long enough for us to know what will be usual for her. In any case, I don't think this one instance is a big deal.
It was the next line in her email that got me riled up.
"RSVP and submit questions at this link!" (To be clear, the exclamation point is hers.)
Now, I'm not writing this newsletter to pick on Representative Scholten. She's not doing anything atypical here; she just happens to be my rep. To the extent members of Congress hold town halls (many of them don't), the vast majority ask for both RSVPs and submitted questions (in one form or another).
So, let's take these items one at a time. What's wrong with asking people to RSVP?
After all, RSVPs are a normal part of everyday life. People use them routinely in event planning. Members of Congress use them for campaign fundraisers and more.
But one of the things that makes a town hall a town hall is that it's open to the public. The public means everyone you represent and anyone who wants to cover the event for those you represent, which might include people and media you don't represent. Anything that creates a barrier to attendance should be avoided.
The excuse generally given for requesting RSVPs is "capacity and safety." As a veteran of the town hall circuit, I can assure you that this argument for RSVPs is largely bogus.
Even in the most contentious year of town halling, 2017, my gatherings reached capacity only a few times--and only because there was a dramatic surge of activism on the left following the election of Donald Trump. My team and I quickly recalibrated and booked bigger venues that could handle a crowd of several hundred people. It was never again a problem.
As for safety, the RSVP adds little value. No congressional office is going to run a real background check on attendees, and they don't collect enough information to do so anyway. They know that if they ask too many detailed questions they're going to face public backlash, and they also don't want to discourage attendance to the point that the audience is tiny, because the optics wouldn't be good.
What about scaring off bad actors simply by asking for name, phone number, and email address? Well, it's precisely the bad actors who _aren 't_ scared off by such things. _Bad_ actors are perfectly happy to give out _bad_ information, particularly when they know they're likely to get away with it. Only once have I heard of a congressman doing an actual ID check at the door.
The primary function of the RSVP in this context is to scare off _good_ actors--more specifically, good actors who disagree with the member of Congress. It's the person who doesn't support or trust the member of Congress, but who would never falsify a form, who is least likely to participate in a town hall that asks for an RSVP.
But this is exactly the kind of person you should want to have at your town hall if you're interested in growing as an elected official--someone who honestly challenges your way of thinking, who might persuade you or be persuaded.
[Share Justin Amash](https://substack.com/redirect/2b9f5d35-9a64-4b39-ab34-44bb0d6225fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's turn to the second item. What's wrong with having people submit questions in advance, either online or by hand at the event?
Well, nothing is wrong with it in a narrow context. For example, maybe someone in the audience is extremely shy and doesn't want to speak in public, or maybe someone has a disability that inhibits certain interactions. It's completely sensible to accept a question in writing in these circumstances.
But these should be the exceptions. Unfortunately, it's overwhelmingly the case that, to the extent _any_ audience questions are answered at a town hall, the questions will be carefully handpicked. An audience member will be called on at the appointed time to deliver a preapproved question or simply have their question read from the podium.
The excuse here is almost always that this is the best way to keep the town hall orderly and peaceful. Nothing could be further from the truth.
In fact, one of the reasons my town halls were such _relatively_ calm affairs (emphasis on "relatively," because anyone who does enough town halls will experience some tense moments) is that I gave everyone an opportunity to express themselves, regardless of where they stood on me or the issues. If you want to sow seeds of grievance as an elected official, then the surest way to do that is to make people feel unheard.
The bottom line is that the Q&A portion of the town hall shouldn't revolve around answering preselected questions. The mistake so many members of Congress make is viewing the town hall as a forum for presenting talking points rather than as a forum for growing into their role as a genuine representative of every person in the district.
My town halls were focused on providing audience members with the opportunity to question me directly--live and unfiltered--without my foreknowledge of the questions. I'd spend some time at the start of each meeting, maybe 15 minutes, giving an update on happenings in Congress, and then I'd typically take one and a half to three hours of questions, randomly calling on individuals who raised their hands, not knowing what anyone was going to ask or say.
This process built understanding and trust with the whole community. I developed into a much better representative by making myself vulnerable, engaging respectfully, learning about their issues through dialogue, and addressing the concerns of supporters and detractors alike. They developed a new appreciation for my libertarian principles, and I established common ground with some people who initially felt like they disagreed with me on everything.
Being elected to Congress means being given the responsibility to represent hundreds of thousands of people of all backgrounds and creeds. Nobody arrives to Congress fully prepared. But most members of Congress choose never to prepare, even after they've been there for years or decades.

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62738474/404416449/2074664510?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230503_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NjhiYTQwLWU2ZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N_63_ayqr5cKElKgePOyPSQgeZuxYOgzeM5lW5UjoNA=)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Friend,
I recently sat down with Mark Levin to talk about some of the most pressing issues facing our country.
There’s no doubt in my mind that Crooked Joe Biden will go down as the SINGLE WORST PRESIDENT in American history – and it’s not even close.
If we don’t beat Biden in 2024, the America you and I know and love will be DEAD. In its place will be a Marxist Third World Country.
_**That’s why it’s time for our Party to UNITE so that we can focus all of our effort on FIRING Crooked Joe and winning back the beautiful White House RIGHT NOW.**_
...And I think Mark Levin put it very well:
_**“...Donald Trump is a historic figure... This is a man who’s committed to fighting these abuses, who’s committed to fighting these Marxists... We – the American people – need to stand behind this guy! There’s not another Republican I can think of who can fight back and fight back this way.” **_ **\- Mark Levin**
_Now, I’m asking YOU to peacefully stand by my side in the fight to SAVE AMERICA._

clean_body: I recently sat down with the great Mark Levin... | | | Friend, I recently sat down with Mark Levin to talk about some of the most pressing issues facing our country. There’s no doubt in my mind that Crooked Joe Biden will go down as the SINGLE WORST PRESIDENT in American history – and it’s not even close. If we don’t beat Biden in 2024, the America you and I know and love will be DEAD. In its place will be a Marxist Third World Country. That’s why it’s time for our Party to UNITE so that we can focus all of our effort on FIRING Crooked Joe and winning back the beautiful White House RIGHT NOW. ...And I think Mark Levin put it very well: “...Donald Trump is a historic figure... This is a man who’s committed to fighting these abuses, who’s committed to fighting these Marxists... We – the American people – need to stand behind this guy! There’s not another Republican I can think of who can fight back and fight back this way.” \- Mark Levin Now, I’m asking YOU to peacefully stand by my side in the fight to SAVE AMERICA. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Rolling Stone is attacking me and YOU. I can only imagine it's because our campaign is gaining momentum against the woke Left.

Peter,

I'm the latest recipient of Rolling Stone’s anti-conservative wrath - and I can only imagine it's because the liberal LEFT sees our campaign as a threat to the two Democrats I’m up against in the battle for Arizona’s Senate seat.

If you’ve read any of the emails my campaign sent you before today, then you’ll know I’m tougher than a $2 steak, but I couldn’t not respond to the hit piece Rolling Stone put out.**This article’s attacks are not just about my candidacy but about me as a person and about _YOU_ as a conservative. **

**I'm asking you to help me send a clear message today: the personal, nasty attacks only increase our resolve to win this critical U.S. Senate race.**

**[Will you add your name to my petition demanding that Rolling Stone issue an apology for their personal attacks on me and our conservative movement as a whole?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e4af30206e9a4d7396e5ddd39dd68c7e&_e=Gz8tQXRp65ryW0aHHAXw3bAWG8tCUIpBT4_eO9TtpPmi9teBudrrjqBRVrTiS6oci9NjXnPRp8Nd0_jRqH84Q0dEqiHuYSLV8Nvem2konxievoJ47g5xKUjHswBOwNgTQH5xoZwQIogIoMVPxJvqlruLT1plo3M0rwoHlGicRs6riSwAnFK3OWmXSCMA2CMLKZ8zwGHzBuZ5mAMTFR2dZ4hfzHM-uWPFGh6Nco0tQggAK4bSP1x6Dx4g9YLxbZN7HlU0hZkGUjjasHMPFV8NT1Uz4LKEvIehICzpY1E1w71U4JKvM58Gd2h7Z4Hz0Atk_uZOyxv4tIxUG-dC-U_5niV9J8YxYMOcCHWah2jeVqWSH02WBhEbG5hZgLFW_hdmDTsQs_QoZ2rJsCRQnGF6JDtu7JrY8D51JyhSy-Dm46ucLziw4c2fLrKENcLV2Oo0Wqf802WU9jlh3AlFkMsus-t3AFhe57CTOGm37MPuYrrz6JrXj0uPDuWD1UAbpluV6I_iv5OQtAhjUkUz_sH69sDKF1gS0V7B6PmbzMoQohHx_G3E5GWEwarNy_sMeISM)**

[**STOP CANCEL CULTURE » ADD YOUR NAME TO MY PETITION**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e4af30206e9a4d7396e5ddd39dd68c7e&_e=Gz8tQXRp65ryW0aHHAXw3bAWG8tCUIpBT4_eO9TtpPmi9teBudrrjqBRVrTiS6oci9NjXnPRp8Nd0_jRqH84Q0dEqiHuYSLV8Nvem2konxievoJ47g5xKUjHswBOwNgTQH5xoZwQIogIoMVPxJvqlruLT1plo3M0rwoHlGicRs6riSwAnFK3OWmXSCMA2CMLKZ8zwGHzBuZ5mAMTFR2dZ4hfzHM-uWPFGh6Nco0tQggAK4bSP1x6Dx4g9YLxbZN7HlU0hZkGUjjasHMPFV8NT1Uz4LKEvIehICzpY1E1w71U4JKvM58Gd2h7Z4Hz0Atk_uZOyxv4tIxUG-dC-U_5niV9J8YxYMOcCHWah2jeVqWSH02WBhEbG5hZgLFW_hdmDTsQs_QoZ2rJsCRQnGF6JDtu7JrY8D51JyhSy-Dm46ufDirVuOu2LLvdCR3l_dY47PqYA9bmyeKYZpNwZVb3_gNM6I24os7FXF2rei_xrLJUH0-LExuM9U-YDbizCJetgvb5m1HaLWEs9K45f6gt8aLHyhaeh8X0rBOuWvmexgu6KZF6n9sGr8RvYlWogsD0)

Peter, this is exactly why I am running for the U.S. Senate, because _we need leaders in this country that aren’t too politically correct to protect us._ **[We need warriors who are willing to stand up and fight for our American values and leaders who refuse to retreat when confronted by cancel culture, sensationalism, and anti-Americanism.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e4af30206e9a4d7396e5ddd39dd68c7e&_e=Gz8tQXRp65ryW0aHHAXw3bAWG8tCUIpBT4_eO9TtpPmi9teBudrrjqBRVrTiS6oci9NjXnPRp8Nd0_jRqH84Q0dEqiHuYSLV8Nvem2konxievoJ47g5xKUjHswBOwNgTQH5xoZwQIogIoMVPxJvqlruLT1plo3M0rwoHlGicRs6riSwAnFK3OWmXSCMA2CMLKZ8zwGHzBuZ5mAMTFR2dZ4hfzHM-uWPFGh6Nco0tQggAK4bSP1x6Dx4g9YLxbZN7HlU0hZkGUjjasHMPFV8NT1Uz4LKEvIehICzpY1E1w71U4JKvM58Gd2h7Z4Hz0Atk_uZOyxv4tIxUG-dC-U_5niV9J8YxYMOcCHWah2jeVqWSH02WBhEbG5hZgLFW_hdmDTsQs_QoZ2rJsCRQnGF6JDtu7JrY8D51JyhSy-Dm46valruPZ1LKSt6CDl_tT_tBk4MzbCES_j16ska2CfaGAyPDFpUNiRm3OtRPp-ZfNwFVBhz02oDQ5zM1acKu_ZnDcrvH19ULFJ2bP3vEjb-P5cZYo_aVL61Sl6Mp2ODCw1AEhS9o0jUeLP5hrHIbgya3)**

**It’s not _‘EXTREME’_ to want a secure southern border.** What’s extreme is having to carry dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescue children from sex trafficking rings, and stop gang members and drug dealers daily.

**It’s not _‘EXTREME’_ to stand up for American families** who cannot afford to put food on the table because of Joe Biden’s inflation. Watching hardworking families suffer while the political elite eats ice cream on live TV is extreme.

**It’s not _‘EXTREME’_ to defend our Second Amendment or the right to life.** It’s extreme to infringe upon these liberties simply because you don’t like them.

**And it sure as heck isn’t _‘EXTREME’_ to be a God-fearing, freedom-loving, family-first American PATRIOT, Peter. The attempt to spread anti-American ideology into every area of American life is extreme. **

America is at a crossroads, we can allow these vultures to pick our values apart and change the fabric of our nation, making it unrecognizable, or we can stand up for the America we love, the world’s bastion of liberty.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. body:
In case you missed the interview.

| | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=78391cdfadce4185ae35b16284d4949c&_e=0Bu-8Oo-01MCRbzk4NsQvGwRlwLtUohJwsB_ubwD__jHqIA-eGk4nKTjh0fxxJGwrNjvrR1ABkpKhblA3jentPvp4f5aVJDrswdIJAXa6Nef14VPx-PO3ujEJu9lkbEPQTX014fwBDn_q9yiP_KHtRhu5ncpLwngAmcZWsqtGZ8Kj88fpYvNKiXjQnOaBW0p8htA2HKjWM2E6u1Mnysisy1P96mftbYNBSQFm4L6HWj1Ne2fCLwBtY_J1V48GWEXuaVeoWTr1wuRGNv1KHFEGwk0z-RHI6tKS7yo-tUXQ91zgb-6BzDM64Zuc6EAzMNgYRaIkBCy6lGhc2btg5BYgamzd9hkIVysZGMNNqm1v3HcFc49N8tv3LB_DHgdRjKgoHrLm_x6vCGBR7uygjIolw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign's America First platform.
_**He asked me if I still would 've run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family.**_
I answered, _**" ABSOLUTELY."**_
Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight.
_**But the battle to save America is worth the hell they 've put me through.**_
Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull's eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry.
_**They hate me because I 'm a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who've been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class.**_
But, there have been many other great patriots who've dutifully run for president before, so there's something about _our movement_ that's different...
...And that difference is **YOU.**
**The Swamp knows I 've flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support.**
_Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. _
**[If you're not doing poorly right now, please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA for 1,500% impact.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=78391cdfadce4185ae35b16284d4949c&_e=0Bu-8Oo-01MCRbzk4NsQvGwRlwLtUohJwsB_ubwD__jHqIA-eGk4nKTjh0fxxJGwrNjvrR1ABkpKhblA3jentPvp4f5aVJDrswdIJAXa6Nef14VPx-PO3ujEJu9lkbEPQTX014fwBDn_q9yiP_KHtRhu5ncpLwngAmcZWsqtGZ8Kj88fpYvNKiXjQnOaBW0p8htA2HKjWM2E6u1Mnysisy1P96mftbYNBSQFm4L6HWj1Ne2fCLwBtY_J1V48GWEXYtfp9IB0qjowbBjZWEdn6y9ISXY6uNvYJYght9rWXPmd0qgMlQ5tSmds4ps-aIYwpTjU9lU1iT-KCu6Z5gMb6ckJ9WhjHCQAcYz16V7UrRUTtf9Ts0RL-k3ac1TVHyGJJTXR7jCqGm6RSGv2Ju-HQg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: In case you missed the interview. | | | Friend, I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign's America First platform. He asked me if I still would 've run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family. I answered, " ABSOLUTELY." Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight. But the battle to save America is worth the hell they 've put me through. Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull's eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry. They hate me because I 'm a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who've been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class. But, there have been many other great patriots who've dutifully run for president before, so there's something about our movement that's different... ...And that difference is YOU. The Swamp knows I 've flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support. Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. | | [Pictured: President Trump sitting down with Steve Bannon at Mar-a-Lago in a recent interview] Thank you, | Donald J. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: From abortion rights to gun control: What we’veaccomplished in Michigan, thanks to you
body:
Last election, RIC PAC donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations. | | |
---
Friend, Together, we’re building power in the halls of Congress and in state legislatures across the country. Last year, in Michigan, our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC supported dozens of candidates and grassroots organizations on the state and local level. And now, for the first time in 40 years, we control the Michigan State House and the Governor’s office―and we took back the State Supreme Court. But controlling the legislative, executive, and judicial branches aren’t just symbolic victories. **Progressives in Michigan are doing exactly what we elected them to do.** **One of the first orders of business in Michigan was repealing Michigan’s extreme 1931 abortion ban.** And last month, Michigan Governor Whitmer signed common-sense gun reforms into law, including universal background checks and gun safety storage legislation. **I founded the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to build progressive power in Congress and across the country. And last election we donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations.** [**We’re building the future of the Democratic Party and the progressive movement. And none of this would be possible without you. **As we elect more candidates who are rooted in their communities, we’re seeing massive opposition from corporate and right-wing interests that are invested in maintaining the unjust status quo.**

In my re-election campaign, we were met with over $1 million of opposition from wealthy out-of-state donors who are threatened by our power and our movement for change. And we weren’t alone.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Pass the Women's Health Protection Act NOW to protect our bodies and rights
body:
Add your name
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ca7fac7-903f-4d71-803c-7a0ebbeb5484/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Since the U.S. Supreme Court eliminated the constitutional right to abortion, many states have taken action to deny abortion care–12 states have [near-total abortion bans](https://default.salsalabs.org/T836ab40f-e9ef-4676-9203-6e3b1e4f2563/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in place, and access to medication abortion is restricted in 15 states. Some of these restrictions prevent state residents from getting an abortion in other states, prohibit abortion even for medical reasons, or outright criminalizes abortion. **[Add your name: Access to safe and legal abortion healthcare is a right.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66cde9b8-d4a1-43fd-9941-017ea5bcf55e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** It is critical for Congress to pass federal legislation to protect reproductive rights for everyone. We have a chance to do just that—the [Women's Health Protection Act (WHPA) of 2023](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3832273f-9fe8-498f-83ba-7ae614277221/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) provides a nationwide safeguard against abortion bans and restrictions that push abortion care out of reach, protecting the right to an abortion at the national level. By passing WHPA, our legislators would lift barriers to care that disproportionately impact Black, Brown, and Indigenous people, trans and queer people, disabled people, low-income people, and people living in rural areas. They could [prevent](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf77d0f2-b7f6-4505-a41e-61592b19e3d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) more paternal and infant deaths. And they would enshrine reproductive freedom. Abortion healthcare access must be free, accessible, and available everywhere, in every state, for everyone. When we expand access, we all win. People are currently being denied abortion care, we don't have time to waste. Congress must use every possible tool at their disposal to guarantee reproductive freedom for all. [**Sign the petition: Demand Congress pass the Women's Health Protection Act.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdbe0b87-ceaa-4246-873e-7f61f8d6c3f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Dan Goldman
subject: 🚨 Texas Republicans just passed a massive power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
An outright attempt to suppress Democratic votes. |
#
---
Shocking news out of Texas, Peter, | | **"Texas Bill Will Give Republican Official Power to Overturn Elections"**
_— Newsweek, _May 2, 2023
* * *
**This is an outrageously brazen attack on our free and fair elections, and we must respond. Sign on if you agree that elections must be decided by voters, not politicians.** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62739907/404421457/-628000993?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTM5NTY3My1lY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QdVprfX4O5K4dJQyqtdQGbYsnUZ28Jvci5f52Btxklc=&emci=f562dd27-eae9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e1395673-ece9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)
---
The Texas Senate just passed SB 1993, which specifically allows the (Republican) Secretary of State, who Governor Abbott appointed himself, to overturn elections in Harris County.
Harris County, of course, is the _third largest county in the United States_ , the largest county in Texas, and has consistently voted Democratic in every Presidential election since 2008.
The rationale from Texas Republicans for targeting only Harris County? Completely bogus conspiracy theories inspired by Donald Trump’s Big Lie.
**So this is nothing more than an overt power grab designed to suppress Democratic votes at the whim of a partisan political appointee who answers to one of the most extreme, right-wing governors in the country and a longtime ally of Donald Trump. And MAGA Republicans are using this same playbook around the country.**
Peter, MAGA Republicans continue to attack our democracy and our free and fair elections. They know that the majority of voters are deeply opposed to their extreme agenda — so they’re doing everything they can to silence their voices.
**[We can’t let this stand. If you agree, add your name to my petition to demand that Congress immediately pass legislation that protects and expands voting rights and secures our free and fair elections. This authoritarian power grab is just the latest reminder that we must act now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62739908/404421458/-628000993?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTM5NTY3My1lY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QdVprfX4O5K4dJQyqtdQGbYsnUZ28Jvci5f52Btxklc=&emci=f562dd27-eae9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e1395673-ece9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62739909/404421459/-628000993?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTM5NTY3My1lY2U5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QdVprfX4O5K4dJQyqtdQGbYsnUZ28Jvci5f52Btxklc=&emci=f562dd27-eae9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e1395673-ece9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Republicans court Sinema to obstruct debt ceiling deal
body:
The economy is at risk because of Republicans–and Sinema is helping them | | | Peter – Kyrsten Sinema is back at it again, sniffing out yet another opportunity to undermine President Biden and make herself the center of attention. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wACfeU3PmCbsWe42ufSWhqBzRcUdI1je4Ye7uao7Ph9CxNbzSDVQpfryQuZXMd2L576xnHpwMhe_5Ndq-upYStIU4YbNFJcAzu4OhHBrb76MF9xUhQ9kB6zOGMkcxA8EihKkktROek_5ZMZkpEFz6bR6kxWYa1J1yn9dem-vual4dbVF8BnwrUowxshrhTUyn0tbyF2RsiWBDmSLDWFy1dl9eTGeqW_AeP5cHxcgmC5RwzYgJozJdn7ragqaR0N1EPZi0bLAMFrAg5CbWTlwX72ZVOO8ZjmbQKX121XUiOLd2xg9OtDHEMMQSgkaxBhYLMfQN-YMjojUY-e-GCjI_BmX-YeaSmmUla7tZ_WKpHEg/3vv/K9s6GZAQTCStIm-eLpdBJQ/h0/AYVjvBYh2qNOJZLmF8Xfpxcu-ndzronI8erA84ibb0Y) This time, Politico reports that Sinema is breaking with Democrats on the debt limit, giving ground to Republicans on their plan to cut programs that hardworking Americans – including veterans – rely on, just so they can offset the massive deficit the Republicans caused with their Trump tax scam. As a reminder, the consequences of a default on the nation’s debt would be economically disastrous. Yet, the Republicans are holding the economy hostage simply for ideological and partisan reasons. If Sinema sides with Republicans, critical benefits for everyday Americans will be at risk, including healthcare access for veterans and food assistance for hungry children. Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and the DSCC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?[Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and the DSCC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=10&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230503-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230503-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10658%2E9716520%2EjStnGd)**

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred
U.S. Representative (TX-32)
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Texas

Colin Allred is a 4th generation Texan running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. After playing in the NFL and serving as a civil rights attorney, he was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives, where he fights to protect the fundamental values of our democracy.

_**[Chip in now to help Colin Allred flip Texas blue, defeat Ted Cruz and help the DSCC expand our Democratic Senate majority →](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230503-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230503-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10658%2E9716520%2EjStnGd)**_

Friend,
I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign's America First platform.
_**He asked me if I still would 've run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family.**_
I answered, _**" ABSOLUTELY."**_
Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight.
_**But the battle to save America is worth the hell they 've put me through.**_
Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull's eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry.
_**They hate me because I 'm a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who've been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class.**_
But, there have been many other great patriots who've dutifully run for president before, so there's something about _our movement_ that's different...
...And that difference is **YOU.**
**The Swamp knows I 've flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support.**
_Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. _
**[If you're not doing poorly right now, please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA for 1,500% impact.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f952ef736114216a52d9ce88a5198f6&_e=0Qw0ruL3OvmUudRvPonUCjNFH4HHNkCQo8_AW2GWiXhu0e5xr26_fRmyyRaQGA5_G8uqUSGe3CxFD51GH0mvLgnwsp987PHCMrp2OBXRVVlHn9op-aMU4gu8dA0cMLFjjISoN4FHyElhKsa2iwToanP5sOhBqW76ieVBeZcHiRZc4ydIOMQcsSAqQZeVHQbKX29H9-YdiayftM5lkZtKjFDG-gOdXxTlRLIQvs7kfBEqhPSvYCp11mZjy1E-_gS5Ba6eJKPm1CJpopJ8hqecPCzn5aJ2J_qzcd3M4zQUdm2Iu6O27DN8gi6CFzrmQUbB80zU2GvZf8DZuRGHSQqjLVyGkwhYEd61pekHWxh9idfKqpCall7kZ_RkDj0g0_9SMMxYjaTeNvE3IOGjTQjn5w%3D%3D)**

clean_body: In case you missed the interview. | | | Friend, I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign's America First platform. He asked me if I still would 've run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family. I answered, " ABSOLUTELY." Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight. But the battle to save America is worth the hell they 've put me through. Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull's eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry. They hate me because I 'm a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who've been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class. But, there have been many other great patriots who've dutifully run for president before, so there's something about our movement that's different... ...And that difference is YOU. The Swamp knows I 've flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support. Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. | | [Pictured: President Trump sitting down with Steve Bannon at Mar-a-Lago in a recent interview] Thank you, | Donald J. name: Jamal and Sam, Evergreen
subject: Thank you, Governor Inslee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We wouldn't be here without you
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4536?t=2&akid=13315%2E53494%2EfZGwGv)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4536?t=3&akid=13315%2E53494%2EfZGwGv)
Hello friend,
Evergreen wouldn't be here today if it weren't for Washington Governor Jay Inslee—or as he's known to the many of us who have worked for him, just "the Gov." On Monday, he announced he will not seek a fourth term as governor—and will leave office at the end of next year as one of the most impactful governors on climate in American history.
But if you know Jay Inslee, you know he’s not done pushing our nation and our world to defeat the climate crisis and build a more just, thriving economy run on clean energy.
**[Thank Governor Jay Inslee for his visionary climate leadership:](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4536?t=4&akid=13315%2E53494%2EfZGwGv)
**
[SEND A THANK YOU NOTE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4536?t=5&akid=13315%2E53494%2EfZGwGv)
---
The Gov's historic presidential campaign put climate at the top of the political agenda. He set a new bar for climate policy and created an open-source, gold standard climate plan based on standards, investment, and justice. You can find the fingerprints of that work and the governor's visionary leadership throughout the Inflation Reduction Act, embedded in new climate policies at all levels of government, and in our ongoing work here at Evergreen.
We'll always be grateful to Governor Inslee for his climate leadership in Washington state and beyond, and for his role in helping us bring Evergreen to life. We're honored to continue what he helped us start.
Thank you, Jay.

Sincerely,
Jamal Raad and Sam Ricketts
Co-Founders, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=13315%2E53494%2EfZGwGv). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $3 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Maggie Hassan’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62740286/404424647/1987603654?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2275-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQ2N2UyOS1lZGU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CO8ZndNZGAkHMJTFN4WZTsPyWVpSL1ulMq0wZfCS1uw=)**

Friend,
I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign’s America First platform.
_**He asked me if I still would’ve run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family.**_
I answered, _**“ABSOLUTELY.”**_
Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight.
_**But the battle to save America is worth the hell they’ve put me through.**_
Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull’s eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry.
_**They hate me because I’m a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who’ve been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class.**_
But, there have been many other great patriots who’ve dutifully run for president before, so there’s something about _our movement_ that’s different...
...And that difference is **YOU.**
**The Swamp knows I’ve flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support.**
_Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. _

clean_body: Friend: Don't miss Wednesday afternoon's top conservative news! | | | | | | | | | Your input is critical to us and to the future of conservatism in America. We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story. To ensure our email makes it to your inbox daily and not spam, please add our email address to your email contact list. | ## ## ## ## ## ## ## | ## ## ## | | | ## ## ## ## ## You Might Like | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- ## ## ## ## ##

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Your input matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, When I decided to run for Senate, I did it because I was ready to fight for the values that keep American families strong.
But if we’re going to finish our fight and take back America from the radical Left, I need your help.
**Our team put together a survey for our most dedicated patriots on the biggest issues facing America today, and your input is CRITICAL for us to forge a winning path forward.**

Peter,

I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?[_Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue, and defend our Senate majority. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full-ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age, I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz, and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz, and defend our Democratic Senate majority →**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62741077/404428092/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230503-1-EM&amount=25.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2YWY3YzliLWVmZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hrp-Yb6NpTRjRu7V9_EB0vqaM5h91jaJqxs2L6Opbcw=)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full-ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age, I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: = Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. subject: You’ve been selected

body:
We need to hear what issues and candidates matter to you most this upcoming month.
#
Friend, your official May 2023 priorities survey is here!
Can you take 2 minutes to quickly share what issues and candidates you would like us to prioritize this upcoming month?
[**Use this link to share your thoughts with Mandela and The Long Run in our short May priorities survey.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230503_priorities_survey/?source=em230503-1-t3&refcode2=4409.196590.vYQOKL&t=1&akid=4409%2E196590%2EvYQOKL)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230503_priorities_survey/?source=em230503-1-t3&refcode2=4409.196590.vYQOKL&t=2&akid=4409%2E196590%2EvYQOKL)
We want to hear what issues, races, and candidates you would like us to prioritize in the upcoming month because as much as we would like, we cannot tackle every single issue and race at once. So, what you share with us today will _directly inform our decisions this month._
The more people who weigh in, the better Mandela and The Long Run can understand what's top of mind for people across the country.
We take your feedback very seriously. Because the strength of our movement comes from the support of folks like you.
[**So can you please take a moment to complete your official priorities survey for The Long Run?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230503_priorities_survey/?source=em230503-1-t3&refcode2=4409.196590.vYQOKL&t=3&akid=4409%2E196590%2EvYQOKL)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230503_priorities_survey/?source=em230503-1-t3&refcode2=4409.196590.vYQOKL&t=4&akid=4409%2E196590%2EvYQOKL)
Your authentic input is what makes this movement powerful, so Mandela wants to make sure your voice is heard, loud and clear, before making any key decisions.
Thank you,
The team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=4409%2E196590%2EvYQOKL). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4409%2E196590%2EvYQOKL)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=4409_196590_vYQOKL&akid=4409%2E196590%2EvYQOKL)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=4409%2E196590%2EvYQOKL)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Team Fetterman
subject: These emails give us the ick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
🥰🥰🥰
#
Hey Derek, quick question — do you get emails from other candidates + causes?
If we had to guess, you probably get a *lot* of political emails in your inbox. And not all of them treat you with respect. **In fact, they probably give you the ick.** 🙄
**“HURRY and we’ll QUADRUPLE match your gift”**
**“[CRITICAL] FINAL NOTICE”**
**“We’re going to lose our majority!!!”**
^Look familiar? These are just a few of the scammy, + straight up dishonest tactics used by campaigns to squeeze people for ActBlue donations.
**Well, we do things differently.** We know you’re not an ATM to hit up for cash. Real people are the backbone of our work — teachers, nurses, veterans, single parents, retirees, and grassroots supporters like you, Derek.
So yes, we still have to ask for money, but we’ll do it honestly and humbly: **[John’s work is funded by small online donations. Will you consider making one today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230503-1?refcode=em20230503-1-8360&refcode2=8360_434096_W4lfAj&akid=8360%2E434096%2EW4lfAj)**

We have so much work still to do, Derek. We need to take on extreme Republican attacks on basic freedoms, defend our Democratic majority + rally support for popular legislation that actually helps working people.
But we’ll never try to trick you into donating. We’re just asking for your help. And either way, we’re grateful you’re on the team.
From the bottom of our hearts, thank you!!!
💛 Team Fetterman HQ

And not all of them treat you with respect. In fact, they probably give you the ick. 🙄 “HURRY and we’ll QUADRUPLE match your gift” “[CRITICAL] FINAL NOTICE” “We’re going to lose our majority!!!” ^Look familiar? These are just a few of the scammy, + straight up dishonest tactics used by campaigns to squeeze people for ActBlue donations. Well, we do things differently. We know you’re not an ATM to hit up for cash. Real people are the backbone of our work — teachers, nurses, veterans, single parents, retirees, and grassroots supporters like you, Derek. So yes, we still have to ask for money, but we’ll do it honestly and humbly: We have so much work still to do, Derek. We need to take on extreme Republican attacks on basic freedoms, defend our Democratic majority + rally support for popular legislation that actually helps working people. But we’ll never try to trick you into donating. We’re just asking for your help. And either way, we’re grateful you’re on the team. From the bottom of our hearts, thank you!!! 💛 Team Fetterman HQ | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
If Republicans win on May 16th, they could try yet again to ban abortion.

Derek, we’re just 13 days away from a critical special election for the Pennsylvania State House of Representatives, and we need your help: Let us explain why:
1. If Republicans win on May 16th, they’ll take back the majority in the Pennsylvania House.
2. And if they regain the majority, _they could try yet again to ban abortion._

We need all hands on deck to make sure our Democratic candidate Heather Boyd wins.

**[Team Shapiro has stepped up time and time again to defy the odds, which is why we’re reaching out now. Heather is a devoted mother, former teacher, and public servant. She’s worked for years to elect Democrats up and down the ticket – and she’s exactly the person we need in Harrisburg to protect against the extreme elements threatening our political system.

**But abortion rights are on the line in this race – and the far-right GOP knows it. We need to do everything in our power to make sure Heather can fight back and win.**

And with just 13 days left until Election Day, there’s never been a more important moment to step up. Can we count on you?

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I will veto to protect reproductive rights.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Abortion care should be accessible, and the majority of North Carolinians agree.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62744113/404434598/823540626?refcode=ea.3881feaa-f5e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3881feaa-f5e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODgxZmVhYS1mNWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnNJx2DXPc7iALWhGqEFHkE5QtwIksQ9JGN-5kCqQ78=&emci=e1a5132e-eae9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3881feaa-f5e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — The Republican-controlled legislature is expected to pass their so-called 12-week abortion ban this week. Their description of this bill is not true for many women. In fact, it will effectively ban access to reproductive freedom earlier and sometimes altogether for many women because of new restrictions and requirements. This is why Republicans are ramming it through with no chance to amend it. **I will veto this extreme ban and need everyone’s help to hold it.** **[I need you to help me support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot who will stand up for reproductive rights in NC.
