I need your help to grow our grassroots movement.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62744420/404435092/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.03_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODE1NGIxMy1mNmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5Ajc8yH7FG9ZthLSoHVlXcGevAc6aczDagNXDqNZJ8=) Derek, I’m reaching out because I got an update from my team: Thanks to you and folks just like you across PA-17, we reached our fundraising goal for April, and we’re heading into May stronger than ever. **Thank you so much for your support.**

**I’m so proud of the team we brought together in 2022, Derek.** But if we want any chance at taking back the House and ensuring the radical right never gets their hands on western Pennsylvania, we need to continue building our grassroots movement — _and that means keeping up with our grassroots fundraising._

**Every time we hit a monthly goal, we send a message that the fight for our common good will prevail. If you want to help us get a jump start on May, you can chip in here:**

"What will you do with the money if I donate?" I’ve been at the DNC for a while now, and when I get the chance to talk to supporters, this is often one of the first things I’m asked.**It’s a fair question, Derek!** If you’ve had this question on your mind, **I want to give you a look into what the DNC is doing --_right now_ \-- to support Democratic campaigns and win elections.** [If you already know what the DNC is doing and where your money is going, I’d really appreciate it if you’d chip in $7 to support our critical work.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJH-j2n8a_cntBfa1lTfsweT2Mup1QNQo7-taK1rA7CCpPqoaVUUWc5bMjElN3rmGwGK1wENGJgaPfLKTIPENtYmveoEarqfdCZYsZXikAmTX-V24PPPehbLNtHq4ADK6DDNv3ucWV2IZmTQXEBD2rRvIfNoo5lh5pzPI6i7l09Z-HQXS2wbxG9QIJCqNwVP-eEIaI9QIs2_9HDQF8Pl7zimncj9ZHhNkiKJoQomerenKARiAfIL7r96jRH7GWv0fBoPTbFfPDb3BeXf5LZaZ-CyrEzGhmxv2D0O7p3gcEK_Z6vkDaJwz7NIdqWIKzTrm5J1TavP60VTZNZeMMkXhR0BnQoj6iyrz_Wgc1-N6V7q116fFlHEmzldzzSNQINhIQOgM34FAY6OIlRabyQ0vfG9nzHbzZ2FdOXs5n-L7P1h6nqsBCneYDSmpgIOfqEzRLPwulx4Ain5yDyPHHE-Nx-giNBG1yWCWWLDEWlrKimdQwpx-Vkm_GCoMj_KqIiwHpzqbuW5ZnrqOEvmKDkElSJl3Vn5F0eHKBBc_dbXqLo0UhBmRg9hCULMe8AR0h-Dp1q91GneXynmsl67QgJAliEg/3vv/q77Z3fDDTPy0pQlo9lDrKg/h0/SvuaQqpnHgq6-rAePTHk3LG1_BJ6IVlbQrnKxwCjJ2M) If you want more information, that’s what I’m here for. Keep reading:

* * *
**Every State Party; Every Race; Every Year:** The DNC is the only party committee responsible for electing Democrats from local office to the Oval Office. We do that by sending resources to state parties, who then can use what we send them to invest in local elections like school board and state legislative seats. They can also make long-term investments in vital programs like voter protection services or hire more staff. **Here’s a recent example:** We sent the Wisconsin Democratic Party resources to help win last month’s contentious Supreme Court election and seats up and down the ballot. Justice-Elect Janet Protasiewicz won by a whopping _11-points._ **Infrastructure Is Not Just a Buzzword:** We mention “electoral infrastructure” a lot in these kinds of emails, but let’s dive into exactly what that means. Infrastructure is everything from dollars and staff, to data and tech tools, access to our continuously updated and ever-growing voter file, voter protection, and so much more. Everything and anything that goes into making a campaign run is infrastructure. **Thanks to the DNC’s infrastructure (and folks like you who helped us build it), campaigns can easily prepare for that transition and get straight to work.** If campaigns had to do all of this on their own, their work to win votes would be delayed, and time is a precious resource for campaigns. **The DNC wants to make sure that candidates are doing what they do best -- talking to voters and getting their message out there.**
* * *
I know that was a lot of writing, Derek. But I’m giving you all this information because we need dedicated supporters like you to know that your hard earned money is really making a difference. [If you’re able to, chip in $7 to support all of the things I just mentioned and more. The DNC works to win races up and down the ballot _every year_ \-- we can do that thanks to the support of grassroots donors pitching in what they can. ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJH-j2n8a_cntBfa1lTfsweT2Mup1QNQo7-taK1rA7CCpPqoaVUUWc5bMjElN3rmGwGK1wENGJgaPfLKTIPENtYmveoEarqfdCZYsZXikAmTWKhV1e3SmLqLFfCoqGVaGkxYqfJbn3Q5TpT5yJI6DQMy_st4-3VR24GtrvHbGlaGFUd-OzztpBZPmMHYS-cPSi1-NJyFisPnq4bQuqturhCHdilb8iGb38wUp5n1ANGQa-_GWYZ4zLkRUUITIPHXDDik-PrS4mRGOYSvtPSrFtHHs6Cha71QO0CktdpE-xfBF_3fOsWIfNk-oaWcnWhHPcyLP0RHwtaKjRId-Hjg6YqXYmC6plaHCfpACnrSTV9XmdWgDOIJ4xT_NoZ_YNq6Sc3dxNZGoTM2Et3Q0chrQgGAhDqNLV1EJttc_Af0q9z4SW0kmzDnqAoxPfday9ikatNnMSkUMPoD4r_yS8Yc3SG-NdZ8y-0M_zZZXJY03P-wdOxwnC2teW17God21lSRPO2gq2RdHXlZj6wQT8kf1ug_TE3-O2SlzIfMC51TPB8TwmZxzkBoeqx7-hqDJ9QtWVZ-0s1lAFSIrj9ctQ7RVrPg/3vv/q77Z3fDDTPy0pQlo9lDrKg/h1/PQxkid2jsCrEK26RAbhWVdg32ovorV4eKY2aJueyiFE)

I’ve been at the DNC for a while now, and when I get the chance to talk to supporters, this is often one of the first things I’m asked.It’s a fair question, Derek! If you’ve had this question on your mind, I want to give you a look into what the DNC is doing --right now \-- to support Democratic campaigns and win elections. If you want more information, that’s what I’m here for. Keep reading: Every State Party; Every Race; Every Year: The DNC is the only party committee responsible for electing Democrats from local office to the Oval Office. We do that by sending resources to state parties, who then can use what we send them to invest in local elections like school board and state legislative seats. They can also make long-term investments in vital programs like voter protection services or hire more staff. Here’s a recent example: We sent the Wisconsin Democratic Party resources to help win last month’s contentious Supreme Court election and seats up and down the ballot. Justice-Elect Janet Protasiewicz won by a whopping 11-points. Infrastructure Is Not Just a Buzzword: We mention “electoral infrastructure” a lot in these kinds of emails, but let’s dive into exactly what that means. Infrastructure is everything from dollars and staff, to data and tech tools, access to our continuously updated and ever-growing voter file, voter protection, and so much more. Everything and anything that goes into making a campaign run is infrastructure. Thanks to the DNC’s infrastructure (and folks like you who helped us build it), campaigns can easily prepare for that transition and get straight to work. If campaigns had to do all of this on their own, their work to win votes would be delayed, and time is a precious resource for campaigns. The DNC wants to make sure that candidates are doing what they do best -- talking to voters and getting their message out there. I know that was a lot of writing, Derek. But I’m giving you all this information because we need dedicated supporters like you to know that your hard earned money is really making a difference. Peter,

I wanted to thank you for the support you showed our campaign in April. You helped us have another strong fundraising month so we can keep working to prepare for what we **_know_** will be a competitive race next year.

Republicans are already calling me a top target to expand their slim House majority, so hitting every fundraising goal, even this far out from Election Day, is vital to powering our around-the-clock organizing so we can keep reaching voters here in Rhode Island.

[If you weren’t able to chip in before our April deadline, or you want to double down on your support of our people-powered campaign, you can click here to help us get a head start on our May fundraising efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62744590/404435636/2042294413?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230503_TY_TY.1.1_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDgyOTQzOS1mNmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TpyoiZ1vVJ8U2FURUi795yvb0I7vEesbTPhAbz8Hj7w=)

Onward,
Seth

clean_body: I’m excited to announce I'm on Jane’s new game show, “Hot enough for you?” as this week’s special guest! | = | Hey, it’s Diedrich Bader and I have a special announcement for you! I’m excited to announce I'm on Jane’s new game show, “Hot enough for you?” as this week’s special guest! Jane tested me on my knowledge of pop culture and – most importantly – climate change. = | = Climate action should be top-of-mind for our elected leaders as the window closes to protect our planet. The consequences of climate change are getting worse and we’re left to deal with the damage as the fossil fuel industry rakes in millions in profits. My good friend Jane and the incredible team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC are hard at work supporting climate champions with a proven record of climate action, but they can’t do it alone. It takes all of us to build grassroots strength and hold our elected officials accountable. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar you invest has an immediate impact on their crucial work to protect our planet. Thank you, Diedrich Bader = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Francisco Aguilar [https://secure
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=25]
Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=10]That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and DASS PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=10]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=10]Chip in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=5]
Chip in $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=25]

Chip in $250 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=250]
Chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=5]
I'm a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=25] taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and DASS PAC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=25]
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this,
Colin Allred
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050323_b1_colin-split_30ac&amount=5]

# [The Excerpts of the Criminal Bribery and Homicide Trials of Joe, Hunter, James Biden, & Dr. Anthony Fauci](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=a62dcfea0a&e=8edd2b8f7d)

_**We the People Are Meting Out Justice as Government and Federal Judicial Cover-up Continues of Alleged Crimes by the Ruling Elite Establishment of Both Parties.**_
[**CLICK HERE TO VIEW**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=ff5804f20c&e=8edd2b8f7d)
(May 3, 2023) Today, Freedom Watch, Inc., and its Citizens' Prosecutor Larry Klayman, the founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch, a former Justice Department prosecutor, and current chairman and general counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc., released an excerpt of the on-going criminal trials, which began on July 13, 2022, of Joe, Hunter and James Biden and Dr. Anthony Fauci.

Joe, Hunter and James Biden had been indicted by a Freedom Watch citizens' grand jury for alleged bribery from Communist China, Russia and Ukraine, among other criminal charges, and Joe Biden for negligent homicide with regard to Afghanistan.

Dr. Anthony Fauci had been indicted by a Freedom Watch citizens' grand jury for negligent homicide in the deaths of over six million persons in the United States and worldwide, among other criminal charges.

**THE TRIALS OF THE BIDENS AND FAUCI ARE CONTINUING, AS MORE EVIDENCE COMES TO LIGHT EVERY DAY IMPLICATING THEM IN ALLEGED CRIMINAL ACTIVITY AND JUDGMENTS BY THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL BE ISSUED IN THE NEXT FEW WEEKS.**

Please view the embedded excerpts of these on-going trials, which explain the peaceful and legal procedures under the laws of man and God's law, to hold these alleged criminals accountable to the rule of law.

Other alleged criminals who have been indicted both in government and the judiciary will follow, but these on-going trials of the Bidens and Fauci have been put at the forefront since these persons continue to commit crimes that are endangering not just the survival of the nation, but ordinary citizens and their loved ones and families.

Once completed these trials in their entirely can be viewed at [www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=42ae1e7a7b&e=8edd2b8f7d). Also available on this website now are the citizens' grand jury proceedings which gave rise to the indictments of the Bidens and Fauci, as well as other alleged government and federal judicial criminals.

Citizen justice is necessary as the nation's Biden-Harris Justice Department has been totally and irreparably corrupted and turned into a literal Gestapo of the Biden-Harris regime, which controls it under the corrupt leadership of AG Merrick Garland and FBI Director Christopher Wray, who have also been sued civilly by Klayman on behalf of class action plaintiffs.

As just one example among many, the Biden-Harris Justice Department is currently engaged in an obvious cover-up of the alleged crimes of the Bidens, Fauci and others who are aligned with the Left and the Democrat Party. However, Republicans and others will be held to account as well, as the rampant alleged criminality among the nation's so-called leaders in Washington, D.C. and state capitals, and on the federal bench, is underscored by the inquisition underway of peaceful January 6, 2022, protesters. This government and judicial tyranny even spans both Democrat and Republican appointees to the federal bench, including Trump appointees, who have sanctioned the raiding of peoples' homes, turned a blind eye to threats against the populace, and are jailing persons without due process, and last but hardly least forcing confessions as occurs in dictatorships such as Iran, North Korea and Russia.

"The nation and its citizenry is under siege by lawless government and a federal judiciary who have become, as predicted by Founding Father and third American President Thomas Jefferson, the yes men and women of the ruling elite, who do as they please without legal accountability by corrupt establishment institutions of the three branches of government. The time for this tyranny to end is now, before the country is totally destroyed under a sea of deceit and lawlessness!", stated Klayman.

Klayman writes about this dire prediction by Jefferson, in which has come to pass, in his new book, "It Takes a Counter-Revolution: Wake Up America!", which can be obtained at [www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=8204e52553&e=8edd2b8f7d) and all major booksellers on line. In this book, Klayman lays out a concrete plan of peaceful and legal citizen action such as the indictments and on-going criminal trials of the Bidens, Fauci and others.

GO TO [WWW.FREEDOMWATCHUSA.ORG](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=5eb21f7f32&e=8edd2b8f7d) TO JOIN OUR JUSTICE LEAGUE AND SUPPORT OUR CITIZENS LEGAL PROCEEDINGS TO BRING THESE ALLEGED CRIMINALS TO JUSTICE!

For more information or an interview of Citizens Prosecutor Klayman contact Asher Anderson at [Asher.andersonfw@gmail.com](mailto:Asher.andersonfw@gmail.com)

[**CLICK HERE TO**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=eb26f22ba4&e=8edd2b8f7d)****[**WATCH VIDEO**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=08ef5e76ef&e=8edd2b8f7d)|

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a04bb161a06d4a5ca85b29cc0e7af0ad&_e=LdbDACSFwlK_2qubdpVFM7IouPzulpE82LG_iKufeWP7Wnk2Z1DtyDxC8L5NXAIu3np8RmvLWQC1KUiJZ75Bqxz9OOnEfFd3mqMnhQ7XGjvO7-Yr3wgqrCmrsX-U8xe-k3BnKwp2ZpzavoJRP-kN2IY2LJQwK6iu8h0T5hXSzXN04_DVbI0rs2fzxlz4x565GXEhWzuik7MTQV4XYTZxzUH3GCv-7kNg5X5ZNQxnA8RKeJt0UZVhOjU8E4HoTtoQG2wiPfhNjRLGpw_iPk-62llHOIVWTnMnnYPZfAW2YG6x1dXsk06Vj4A8Mb85aIWPoLnR4UN7B6kF0RmE4YGhDtdZLPSkBTjZHZkWe294Hp7vTLgm2x_e_Dk1m9Bco2HPpJhfzBYlyX0d0VV_jP4-YQ%3D%3D)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a04bb161a06d4a5ca85b29cc0e7af0ad&_e=LdbDACSFwlK_2qubdpVFM7IouPzulpE82LG_iKufeWP7Wnk2Z1DtyDxC8L5NXAIu3np8RmvLWQC1KUiJZ75Bqxz9OOnEfFd3mqMnhQ7XGjvO7-Yr3wgqrCmrsX-U8xe-k3BnKwp2ZpzavoJRP-kN2IY2LJQwK6iu8h0T5hXSzXN04_DVbI0rs2fzxlz4x565GXEhWzuik7MTQV4XYTZxzUH3GCv-7kNg5X5ZNQxnA8TO-n0HoJTtJsGnGsj64WiDVOwf2BYefpCRSP4CLZL_g3KQ9pvT3CaGFwdS3uxOE8vLbYsr4WSyU2YaZwhJhjRxv5bjQ4W7Lg_A0bsUHMgoRaASAfJNi5k7KHR17HOrqOMZvYlJN5oAWcRk7jYj-SFw5JuEsD5bfSzKHLyl6XO0ng%3D%3D)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a04bb161a06d4a5ca85b29cc0e7af0ad&_e=LdbDACSFwlK_2qubdpVFM7IouPzulpE82LG_iKufeWP7Wnk2Z1DtyDxC8L5NXAIu3np8RmvLWQC1KUiJZ75Bqxz9OOnEfFd3mqMnhQ7XGjvO7-Yr3wgqrCmrsX-U8xe-k3BnKwp2ZpzavoJRP-kN2IY2LJQwK6iu8h0T5hXSzXN04_DVbI0rs2fzxlz4x565GXEhWzuik7MTQV4XYTZxzUH3GCv-7kNg5X5ZNQxnA8SG-WJV18RW49I8Lo8grB0M6x50F3fiNGOiDwxD56JuUCQ8cc9F8HOQVtiiRwU7Q_Kk7drvzxGBbDKqM2typmjwFMgEwsHgFtNRXNe-fPvu79J8rKHHSB0gl_30mJJJ7vz5Po6EQRBd4RJwsCPo7uI_JvH40103u1Wb1rhEcyRj2A%3D%3D "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. name: Team AOC
subject: AOC and Matt Gaetz agree.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Lawmakers should not insider trade.
#
Members of Congress shouldn't be able to engage in insider trading. It's really common sense.
That's why everyone from Alexandria to Matt Gaetz are getting together behind a new bill — the Bipartisan Restoring Faith in Government Act — **to ban members of Congress and their families from insider stock trading.**
When Members of Congress trade individual stocks, people are right to question whether their decisions are for the public good or their own personal benefit. During the height of COVID, we saw senators leave briefings and trade stocks — even investing in body bags.
[**Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of this bill to end congressional insider trading? Click here to sign.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18180?t=1&akid=4263%2E2526796%2ERz0i97)
**[Take action →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18180?t=2&akid=4263%2E2526796%2ERz0i97)**
Members of Congress often get detailed briefings the public may not have access to for days, weeks, or even months. This information can be about investigations, hearings, policy changes, supply chain issues, new technologies — or even as we've seen these past few years — global pandemics and looming bank failures.
But all too often, we've seen that instead of using this information to help American families, Members of Congress have used their positions to make lucrative stock trading decisions that benefit themselves.
**The Bipartisan Restoring Faith in Government, supported by Democrats and Republicans, is our best chance in a very long time to restore some trust that members of Congress are working for the people — not their pocketbooks.**
[**Please sign on as a citizen co-sponsor here. We'll use this to show Congress that Americans DO care about the integrity of their elected officials.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18180?t=3&akid=4263%2E2526796%2ERz0i97)
In solidarity,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230503-1.Re-5Mb&refcode=em20230503-4263-P_ENG_ANO_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4263%2E2526796%2ERz0i97)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=4263%2E2526796%2ERz0i97) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=4263%2E2526796%2ERz0i97) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=4263%2E2526796%2ERz0i97)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: It's important I tell you this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Raquel Terán for Congress
body:
https://raquelteran.com/ [https://raquelteran.com/]
Hi friend,
My name is Raquel Terán and I wanted to tell you why I made the big decision to run for Congress in Arizona's 3rd Congressional District.
I grew up in a border town in Southern Arizona, on the actual street that divides the United States and Mexico. Growing up, my family was very active in our church and put their values of fairness and service into action by helping out in our community.
That's why I decided to dedicate my career towards advancing justice, equity, and fairness. In 2006, when I saw anti-immigrant sentiment and legislation gaining momentum in Arizona, I joined with others in our community and helped fight in the battle against SB 1070, notoriously known as the "show me your papers" law. But that’s not where our fight ended. Along the way we’ve built a movement not just to stand up to bullies like Joe Arpaio and Kari Lake, but to lift up the voices of everyone in our community.
We've always fought against bullies who want to take us backwards, and to fight for our progressive values without fear. But we’ve never done it alone, and we can’t do it alone now. If you're with us, please make a donation to our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_050323_ImportantISayThis&amount=25]
The coalition of everyday Arizonans that we brought together was powerful. We expanded on our wins with victories in 2018 and 2020. In 2022, as chair of the Arizona Democratic Party, we faced MAGA Republicans up and down the ballot who were determined to take away our access to abortion, our right to be who we are and love who we want, and to choose who speaks for us in government. As an elected official, a community organizer -- and most importantly as a mother -- I knew we had to stand together once again. So many said we couldn't do it, but thanks to the hard work of so many organizers and volunteers, we elected a Democratic Senator, Governor, Secretary of State, and Attorney General, and many other great Democrats up and down the ballot.
The progress we've built over the past decade is the result of so many people organizing, building strong coalitions, and lifting up every voice in our community. Now, it's time we take our fight to Congress.
This campaign will be fought and won on the ground, connecting with all voters, building coalitions, and centering the community. Together, we can accomplish so much.
So, friend, what do you say? Join our campaign today and chip in just $10 to give us a head start on the long road we have ahead. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_050323_ImportantISayThis&amount=25]
A ganar,
Raquel Terán
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_050323_ImportantISayThis&amount=25]
Raquel Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
Paid for by Raquel Terán for Congress

name: SCOTUS Alert (via CoriBush.org)
subject: The Lever: Thomas helped kill eviction ban threatening benefactor's business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Harlan Crow's company said tenant protections threatened its profits. Thomas voted to end them twice while being lavished with luxury gifts.
#
Peter,
Last week, new reporting from _The Lever_ continued to reveal **_more of**_ Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas' corruption.
In August 2021, the Court and its far-right majority voted to strike down a federal moratorium on evictions that was originally enacted by the CDC during the height of the pandemic.
Yes, this is **the very same eviction moratorium** that Cori fought to extend by protesting outside the Capitol for five days straight.
Cori fought for the people — despite the rain, the heat, the cold, and all the pessimism that nothing could be done — and won, preventing millions from being evicted.
...All while Thomas voted to end the eviction ban **_twice**_.
While Cori was putting her health and safety on the line to fight for the people, Clarence Thomas was voting to evict millions while accepting luxury gifts and trips from conservative billionaires.
**[He must be held accountable for this blatant corruption by impeaching and removing Clarence Thomas from the Court immediately. Add your name to our petition today to join Cori in demanding his impeachment.](https://act.coribush.org/sign/impeach-clarence-thomas-cta?refcode=em20230503-2625&t=1&akid=2625%2E1082990%2EExI_69)**
**[Add My Name >>](https://act.coribush.org/sign/impeach-clarence-thomas-cta?refcode=em20230503-2625&t=2&akid=2625%2E1082990%2EExI_69)**
At the time of voting on the eviction moratorium, Thomas failed to disclose his relationship with billionaire Harlan Crow a GOP mega donor whose company was fighting to end the moratorium in the name of increasing their profits. This is a **clear conflict of interest,** yet Thomas did not recuse himself from the case.
For nearly two decades, Justice Thomas was lavished with luxury gifts and trips and purchases of property, flagrantly violating longstanding federal ethics rules. And we can't forget his history of history of sexual harassment and abuse.
Justice Thomas shouldn't hold public office, let alone a permanent spot on the highest Court in the country. Every single day Justice Thomas remains on the bench, he disgraces the integrity of the Supreme Court with his complete disregard for ethical standards.
**That's why Cori was the first member of the House Judiciary Committee to call for Clarence Thomas' impeachment.**
**[No one is above the law, including Clarence Thomas. Will you sign our petition today calling for his immediate removal from the Court?](https://act.coribush.org/sign/impeach-clarence-thomas-cta?refcode=em20230503-2625&t=3&akid=2625%2E1082990%2EExI_69)**
**[Add Your Name >>](https://act.coribush.org/sign/impeach-clarence-thomas-cta?refcode=em20230503-2625&t=4&akid=2625%2E1082990%2EExI_69)**
Thank you for taking action today.
In solidarity,
— Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230503?refcode=em20230503-2625-footer&t=5&refcode2=2625_1082990_ExI_69&akid=2625%2E1082990%2EExI_69) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=6&akid=2625%2E1082990%2EExI_69)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2625%2E1082990%2EExI_69)

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream — from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy — and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz — when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Sharice’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62750032/404439915/1367965908?amount=20&contactdata=vA+TQhae8hR3lsZfK3AOntD50QQBFcXm97k23CKYVwenq9zA3+7vpgmjABz7K065mDL3EH9HRtsk+7VlU0NQf93K466aLkEIOx7ZX6xpAdcMSJYHnRaN2dSOVYFtgRZ3YXCdAnPD5L541GuEMaPy/w==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230503_FR.Allred.1.1_0_1MO_Allred_Allred_NA_Allred&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmUzYTgxYy1mYmU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EuEjIlZF5AtMsxBiRN1PNf2o2br7TFQ2qhQ8dPYFhlM=)**

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

name: Wes Moore
subject: 2 chapters, done
body:
Here's what we've been up to for the last 4 months... | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62754301/404443476/2098035812?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230503eomty_wm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjcyMWYyZS1mZWU5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfcGUypCjoeT2w88E4nJYX8h-O7W2UF3JEP-Hh4vl7k=)
---
That’s two chapters in the history books DONE, Maryland. **The first** (and bigger) chapter is the end of my first legislative session as governor. We’ve been sharing these victories for the past few weeks, but I really can’t get enough of celebrating all we did. We passed legislation to:
> 💵 Raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour in 2024
>
> 🍃 Make Maryland a leader in clean energy by becoming the offshore wind capitol of the country
>
> 🎓 Give every high school graduate in Maryland the opportunity for a paid year of service to our state while gaining real-world skills, perspective, and experience
>
> 🏥 Ensure transgender Marylanders get the care they need by requiring Maryland Medicaid to provide coverage for additional gender-affirming treatments
>
> 👧 Reduce child poverty in our state through the Earned Income Tax Credit and Child Tax Credit, which greatly benefit working families
>
> 📜 Enshrine reproductive freedom into our state constitution – Marylanders will get to vote on this in 2024!
There’s plenty more, but my team said a 5,000-word email would end up in your spam folder. **The second** chapter we closed is our first deadline since the fundraising freeze lifted. And I’m happy to share that we hit our goal – which helps us stay on track and ensures Aruna and I have what we need to keep moving Maryland forward. Whether you raised your voice during the legislative session or donated to help hit our goal (or both!), **I want to thank you for showing up and being a part of this movement.** Elevate, Wes
---
| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.
---

name: Cecile Richards
subject: Did you see my last message? [extended deadline]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
---
Hey, friend – it's Cecile Richards. Did you see my last message?
Yesterday marked one year since news leaked that the Supreme Court was going to overturn Roe. It was a devastating blow that empowered the GOP to ramp up their attacks on reproductive freedom.
I know Democrats like you are eager to keep up the fight for reproductive freedom, **which is why we extended the deadline for our $20,000 goal to midnight tonight.**
**That's why I'm reaching out personally to ask you again:[Will you help us raise the final $5,425 we need to hit our goal by donating $15 right now to help American Bridge hold Republicans accountable at the ballot box and stop them from ending abortion access in America?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62755017/404444120/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2536-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1ZTk1NjliLWZlZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IqsTGQtlHaH39zKCwxF_jYHrsKK8bBVwgnBmUW2UzLw=)**
Thank you for your commitment to this fight.

Cecile Richards
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Cecile Richards**
Date: Tue, May 2, 2023
Subject: The GOP won't stop until abortion is banned nationwide
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62755021/404444121/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2536-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1ZTk1NjliLWZlZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IqsTGQtlHaH39zKCwxF_jYHrsKK8bBVwgnBmUW2UzLw=) Friend – one year ago today, we got infuriating news. We learned from a leak to the press that the Supreme Court was going to overturn _Roe_ and end the constitutional right to an abortion in America. Fast-forward to today, and we see the horrifying consequences of that decision – abortion bans are in place in 21 states. Let me be clear: The GOP won't stop until abortion is banned nationwide in America.
A vast majority of Americans agree that health care decisions should be made by people who are pregnant, not by Republican politicians.

Still, the GOP is forging ahead with its plan, passing more and more restrictions on reproductive care. To stop the madness, Democrats have to flip the House, defend the Senate and win the White House. It's a tall order.

That's why I'm working with American Bridge to raise $20,000 and make early investments in key races.
**I'll never give up on the fight for reproductive freedom. I hope you won't either, friend.****[Please, on the anniversary of the _Dobbs_ leak, will you pitch in right away to help American Bridge hold Republicans accountable at the ballot box and stop them from ending abortion access nationwide?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62755024/404444122/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2536-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1ZTk1NjliLWZlZTktZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IqsTGQtlHaH39zKCwxF_jYHrsKK8bBVwgnBmUW2UzLw=)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: It’s not complicated
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=248%2E35263%2Eelh1bY)
It’s not complicated, Peter. Medical decisions should be made between a patient and their doctor. Full stop. But the attacks on reproductive rights just keep on coming. Last month, a federal judge in Texas severely restricted access to abortion medication — thankfully, the Supreme Court issued a last-minute stay to protect medication-based abortions for the time being, but this fight isn’t over yet. **And here in Wisconsin, a case is being heard in Dane County tomorrow about our state’s restrictive abortion law from 1849.** I’m fighting my heart out to pass my bill, the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , to finally protect the right to safe and legal abortions under federal law — because we can’t keep risking our access to reproductive care. I reintroduced the bill recently, and I’m leading the charge to get this critical legislation across the finish line and onto President Biden’s desk. **Last year, every single Senate Republican voted to block this bill.** Well, if McConnell and Trump could eliminate the filibuster to put three Supreme Court justices on the bench, then we should do the same to pass the _WHPA_ and protect reproductive rights for millions of Americans – no matter what conservative judges and far-right legislators decide. [**Every person deserves the right to make their own health care decisions, without interference from anti-choice politicians. If you agree, add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ quickly.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2305_WHPA_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230503_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=248%2E35263%2Eelh1bY) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2305_WHPA_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230503_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=248%2E35263%2Eelh1bY)
---
Thanks for signing on, Peter. No matter how difficult the battle may be, I’ll never stop fighting to protect reproductive freedom.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=248%2E35263%2Eelh1bY) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=248%2E35263%2Eelh1bY)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=248%2E35263%2Eelh1bY)

Our team at Their Future. Our Vote. has hit the ground running. Already, we went to Washington to advocate for our kids, joined pediatricians to call for action to address gun violence, wrote letters to members of Congress and state legislators across the nation, and more.

Now, we want to hear from you. There are so many issues that impact our kids — from climate change to gun violence to attacks on LGBTQ+ youth — and _Their Future_ is here to fight back.

| | Recap of the Drag Queen Storytime on Saturday, April 29th, 2023 – and NEXT STEPS. It’s a little long, but WORTH THE READ. From the moment we arrived to protest the children’s drag event this past Saturday, six things were abundantly clear:
1. The entire “Keiki Community Fair” was centered around the drag performance.
2. The “Keiki Community Fair” was highly political – clearly promoting a progressive political message.
3. The “drag queen storytime” was hyper sexualized and included much more than book reading.
4. The organizers (supported by our State agencies) have absolutely no respect for dissenting opinions or the First Amendment.
5. The event did not have local support.
6. This is an issue that Conservatives unite around.

Please [DONATE](https://www.hawaiiconservatives.org/so/e9OVZbrye/c?w=XXrbNwzyBJ7K3ruC0NfdSLaEixymApAXwOm4NLwQxU4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS84Mjc1OWI3My1jNjVjLTRlZGQtODQ2ZS02ZTc1NWZmMTA3MjEvaGF3YWlpLWNvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZXNfZG9uYXRlIiwiciI6ImE1YmVlZDA1LTIxYjktNGZkYi05NmRhLTgyMDYzNGVjYTIxMyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImJlMmU2NjJhLWM3YzMtNDZlYi1hNzNlLWEzYzQ0ZjVmMTQyMiJ9) so we have the resources to stand against this madness in our community!

Team – my team just gave me an update that we very narrowly met our end-of-month fundraising goal! _Thank you, thank you, thank you!_ I’m grateful that my grassroots team stepped up in the final moments to prove that our people-powered movement is here to stay. Folks chipped in what they could – [**$10 here, $15 there**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62757074/404445608/373057073?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.03_b1_as_all-nd&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGUwZjFiZC0wMGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=slt2gjY9cm_-63R1ZRdONmYVnObujsKf8KYjoq1JxJw=) – because they know that when everyone chips in, it all adds up. Fellow American - I will take on the Fed.

The Fed has tried to play God with a fat finger for the last 25 years and failed miserably. You can't hit two targets - inflation & unemployment - with one arrow. Time to go back to focusing the Fed on stabilizing the dollar, period. If elected, I will.

Please take a look at an excerpt from a recent opinion piece from the Wall Street Journal's editorial board below.

I'll make the 2024 election a referendum on the Fed & put the beast back in its cage

Thanks,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=58bf20d97ade4430a13c5fc81fa0bfe2&_e=AJxD9r3JPKzOLdKNuf2FknWwzWOfAwXHlgCe5kpFK9bKyiP4OBdJuGqtZl9oBoaSDvoPNuR14eWYgYeMzYGE9Q3J7ubdG9_CosbGcoQaP61WVR7HiyZBoZCxkDZkWcRscmFG0qKJtkOXGqZ8ScxPNEmIbVcgC2BNy-aTwvPICIfuPQanGUcgUaWiAryB63lza3RrG0D9g2iV2l12TtMVdvZplPO-PpiG2rSnFYpVSv-n-sisjuhHA3_sT95VcPp8oRKLIJeTRV6NfzuzBw-iyVgNNPVNX6BtpTWI9tIJkgJUN9mxzx_yxLWBdJVW0ksjoft9GN48qul8_j_fpBUngXa6B5F_oZnh54a6HXS5ipwL3pm2rG0yTzB8Z5dqrBPqEPtMRVBBLlNXQmIBqDkyPw%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

* * *

_The role of the central bank in our economy is a presidential-level issue._

By the Editorial Board

_"This is an economic debate that deserves to be part of the presidential campaign. Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis has also criticized the Fed, though so far without Mr. Ramaswamy's specificity."

"...Mr. Ramaswamy has it right with his focus on maintaining a stable dollar. That is supposed to be the Fed's job, but in recent decades it has measured success based on the job market or inflation measures that are prone to measurement errors and ignore asset bubbles. This helps explain why the Fed constantly undershoots or overshoots in its policies and inflicts substantial collateral damage."

"Mr. Ramaswamy's proposal instead would be for the Fed to focus more directly on dollar stability with reference to a basket of commodities. This would be easier to track in real-time and also would help the dollar become a stable basis for global trade again."_

| [** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=58bf20d97ade4430a13c5fc81fa0bfe2&_e=AJxD9r3JPKzOLdKNuf2FknWwzWOfAwXHlgCe5kpFK9bKyiP4OBdJuGqtZl9oBoaSDvoPNuR14eWYgYeMzYGE9Q3J7ubdG9_CosbGcoQaP61WVR7HiyZBoZCxkDZkWcRscmFG0qKJtkOXGqZ8ScxPNEmIbVcgC2BNy-aTwvPICIfuPQanGUcgUaWiAryB63lza3RrG0D9g2iV2l12TtMVdvZplPO-PpiG2rSnFYpVSv-n-sisjuhHA3_sT95VcPp8QwVqdJz9PHVCGmi0xy07f6OkZXY9Swix6GIMwGfSUK6ZCj_jAEJv4LMrH5nhpQd_h3HmatgIswjmVcaNZgyea7nVFiBZi03nfGVZ15sb7JGJ4Ae1WMkLjAGmBAYJU05MSyewKwoAJ3H0U9XQVe30qw%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62758587/404446491/-899494275?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230503-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjQ0YTkxYS0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcHII_44B2rZPFf9LBeQbC6hN0m2C2COv0gmCqIg_Zo=)

Peter,

I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and BACKROADS PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?[_Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62758588/404446492/-899494275?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230503-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjQ0YTkxYS0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcHII_44B2rZPFf9LBeQbC6hN0m2C2COv0gmCqIg_Zo=)**

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. clean_body: Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! | = Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and BACKROADS PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?= | | | = | = | = I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: = Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred | = * | | = Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. I won’t stop working to support our small businesses.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62759097/404446739/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230503-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWZhNDQ4OC0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_8HQ1fxwgW0C2vsUipA-Y9vAjODpjMyaZFiobxASMJI=)

| Peter,

**Happy Small Business Week!**

Small businesses create jobs, form the backbone of Pennsylvania’s economy, and make PA-07 a welcoming and unique place to raise a family.

In Congress, I am proud to be a strong advocate for our small businesses and small business owners.

I’ve been a leader on legislation supporting our small businesses and our restaurants, including fighting to make sure they were able to keep their doors open throughout the Covid-19 pandemic. _**And I’ll keep working so they have the resources they need to thrive.**_

Since day one, I’ve worked to support small businesses to strengthen our communities and invest in a brighter economic future. And my promise to you is that I won’t stop working to support our small businesses.

Thanks so much,
Susan

P.S. [_**If you’re able, I hope you’ll consider investing in my re-election campaign so that I can stay in Congress advocating for small businesses in Pennsylvania and across the country!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62759098/404446740/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230503-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWZhNDQ4OC0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_8HQ1fxwgW0C2vsUipA-Y9vAjODpjMyaZFiobxASMJI=)

|
---
| | Pro-choice. Period.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62758745/404446551/-56018745?sourceid=1050010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjQ0YTkxYS0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pg3Ls8mbq-N_nARZ2WbaSbRVHc-q-oasTdOpdvhrQwo=&emci=69e3a2e2-eee9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=af44a91a-02ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Yesterday marked a tough anniversary for reproductive rights in America — one year since the Supreme Court's draft decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ went public. That was the night it became crystal clear, for anyone still doubting, that a radical anti-choice Court was poised to throw out decades of legal precedence and, along with it, the freedom of half the American population.

Our fight changed that night. Not our commitment to electing Democratic pro-choice women — that's stronger than ever. But the urgency of our task exploded overnight. That's why we wrote to you earlier this week with an opportunity:**[_To add your name and put pressure on Congress to codify the right to choose:_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62758748/404446552/-56018745?sourceid=1050010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjQ0YTkxYS0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pg3Ls8mbq-N_nARZ2WbaSbRVHc-q-oasTdOpdvhrQwo=&emci=69e3a2e2-eee9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=af44a91a-02ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62758750/404446553/-56018745?sourceid=1050010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjQ0YTkxYS0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pg3Ls8mbq-N_nARZ2WbaSbRVHc-q-oasTdOpdvhrQwo=&emci=69e3a2e2-eee9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=af44a91a-02ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Please read our note below, and then take action.

Thank you,

the EMILYs List team _\----------Original Message---------
From: EMILYs List
Sent: Tues., May 2, 2023_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62758753/404446554/-56018745?sourceid=1050010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjQ0YTkxYS0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pg3Ls8mbq-N_nARZ2WbaSbRVHc-q-oasTdOpdvhrQwo=&emci=69e3a2e2-eee9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=af44a91a-02ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, today marks one year since the news went public that the Supreme Court was poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and end the constitutional right to abortion in America.

Today, millions of Americans are less free. They have been denied the care they need, forced to cross state lines just to be seen, and even arrested for making health care decisions for themselves.

Republicans at the state and local level and in Congress continue to ignore their constituents, the American people, the vast majority of whom are pro-choice, in order to keep stripping away fundamental rights.

**Standing up and speaking out to elect the women who can stop these Republicans in their tracks is what we do at EMILYs List, and we need you.****[Will you add your name now to demand that Congress restore the right to abortion nationwide?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62758755/404446555/-56018745?sourceid=1050010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjQ0YTkxYS0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pg3Ls8mbq-N_nARZ2WbaSbRVHc-q-oasTdOpdvhrQwo=&emci=69e3a2e2-eee9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=af44a91a-02ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62758757/404446556/-56018745?sourceid=1050010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjQ0YTkxYS0wMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pg3Ls8mbq-N_nARZ2WbaSbRVHc-q-oasTdOpdvhrQwo=&emci=69e3a2e2-eee9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=af44a91a-02ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) There are now 15 states where nearly all abortion is illegal. Idaho went further and made it illegal for minors to travel across state lines for abortion care. In just the past month, a federal judge in Texas attempted to overturn FDA approval of medication abortion, Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law in Florida, and North Dakota banned nearly all abortion.

**Make no mistake: The GOP will not stop until abortion rights are ripped away from every single one of us.**

Fighting back looks like electing Democratic pro-choice women everywhere, and we need supporters like you. [**Will you join EMILYs List in demanding that Congress restore reproductive freedom? clean_body: | | | Pro-choice. Period. Peter, Yesterday marked a tough anniversary for reproductive rights in America — one year since the Supreme Court's draft decision overturning Roe v. Wade went public. That was the night it became crystal clear, for anyone still doubting, that a radical anti-choice Court was poised to throw out decades of legal precedence and, along with it, the freedom of half the American population. Our fight changed that night. Not our commitment to electing Democratic pro-choice women — that's stronger than ever. But the urgency of our task exploded overnight. That's why we wrote to you earlier this week with an opportunity: Please read our note below, and then take action. Thank you, the EMILYs List team \----------Original Message--------- From: EMILYs List Sent: Tues., May 2, 2023 Peter, today marks one year since the news went public that the Supreme Court was poised to overturn Roe v. Wade and end the constitutional right to abortion in America. Today, millions of Americans are less free. They have been denied the care they need, forced to cross state lines just to be seen, and even arrested for making health care decisions for themselves. Republicans at the state and local level and in Congress continue to ignore their constituents, the American people, the vast majority of whom are pro-choice, in order to keep stripping away fundamental rights. Standing up and speaking out to elect the women who can stop these Republicans in their tracks is what we do at EMILYs List, and we need you. There are now 15 states where nearly all abortion is illegal. Idaho went further and made it illegal for minors to travel across state lines for abortion care. In just the past month, a federal judge in Texas attempted to overturn FDA approval of medication abortion, Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law in Florida, and North Dakota banned nearly all abortion. Make no mistake: The GOP will not stop until abortion rights are ripped away from every single one of us. Fighting back looks like electing Democratic pro-choice women everywhere, and we need supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our pro-choice movement, the EMILYs List team | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
We’ve come so far in the two years since we launched...

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62759868/404447258/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230503Anniversary_N_TEAM_90do_6_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNzk0NzVlLTAzZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Dnnwp_89NCJEj1Nin1OA2xWaEMt9T-U4PEDL5tiaL6M=)
| When we started knocking doors two years ago today, we had just one staff member – Kadida Kenner, our founding Executive Director and now Chief Executive Officer – and a team of fellows.

Today, we’re celebrating our two-year anniversary with a team of more than 40 Pennsylvanians on our staff conducting year-round voter registration and civic engagement. **[Grassroots support from donors like you have been a vital part of this growth since the start, and with your help, we will continue to expand the electorate in Pennsylvania for years to come. Can you chip in $10 today to celebrate our two-year anniversary and help us make an even bigger impact in the communities we center?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62759869/404447259/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230503Anniversary_N_TEAM_90do_6_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNzk0NzVlLTAzZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Dnnwp_89NCJEj1Nin1OA2xWaEMt9T-U4PEDL5tiaL6M=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62759870/404447260/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230503Anniversary_N_TEAM_90do_6_B_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNzk0NzVlLTAzZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Dnnwp_89NCJEj1Nin1OA2xWaEMt9T-U4PEDL5tiaL6M=) From the start, we’ve had one crucial mission: To conduct year-round voter registration, civic engagement and mobilization centering historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth to ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth.

We saw how our hard work paid off in 2022. We helped transform the electorate of our battleground state, win two U.S. Senate races, our Governor’s race, and flip our State House for the first time in over a decade. Rather than facing down ever-worsening voter suppression and abortion restrictions, today we’re making progress for both. **[We’ve come a long way in the last two years, and we’re going to do so much more in the next two. Will you donate $10 right now to help us keep up our momentum?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62759871/404447261/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230503Anniversary_N_TEAM_90do_6_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNzk0NzVlLTAzZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Dnnwp_89NCJEj1Nin1OA2xWaEMt9T-U4PEDL5tiaL6M=)** clean_body: We’ve come so far in the two years since we launched... = | When we started knocking doors two years ago today, we had just one staff member – Kadida Kenner, our founding Executive Director and now Chief Executive Officer – and a team of fellows. Today, we’re celebrating our two-year anniversary with a team of more than 40 Pennsylvanians on our staff conducting year-round voter registration and civic engagement. = = From the start, we’ve had one crucial mission: To conduct year-round voter registration, civic engagement and mobilization centering historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth to ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. We saw how our hard work paid off in 2022. We helped transform the electorate of our battleground state, win two U.S. Senate races, our Governor’s race, and flip our State House for the first time in over a decade. Rather than facing down ever-worsening voter suppression and abortion restrictions, today we’re making progress for both. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to : May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. And they didn’t just invite her — the Sangamon County Republican Party paid Conway $30,000 to come spew her lies at their “Lincoln Day” Dinner tonight! Friend, I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a1ac78cdb1cd43879bdc5f4eefd140e9&_e=wsrM3GtfJ24_OkIeQVA5N0RvvGGQ-WjYJOOYDEu3cY_skyq_Mt4qqISDl44I6QRS38R6d16IBCPHtp1rAQWJ8D8Ro5e3byPQaMLLzrqK99o5LMSrAPAA8CfJiWTeqlZs29dkpM7zDCdKVt8qfWgE6MawAQAfCRWqQhPLz3wMkpMYh95o0lW3yzpooqbzOd_BIQNFvMSnErqYj8pKZgmxKMaVPsAWak7Gdy4WuZkAxSJ3u-f-vQdlcevOS6CN7EfTyVUGx3YuMfBh7mSFIiyf3bOCEkWxh3ssxKacfSvYsdMMLWISqMcTPFg3nTZNTUu-IiAMOLGRkMGw5h_-sZHKUkX7_2X2GfYelRSq0SAMgGbAhyax7NO9cIcvE-1Wf1_N "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a1ac78cdb1cd43879bdc5f4eefd140e9&_e=wsrM3GtfJ24_OkIeQVA5N0RvvGGQ-WjYJOOYDEu3cY_skyq_Mt4qqISDl44I6QRS38R6d16IBCPHtp1rAQWJ8D8Ro5e3byPQaMLLzrqK99o5LMSrAPAA8CfJiWTeqlZs29dkpM7zDCdKVt8qfWgE6MawAQAfCRWqQhPLz3wMkpMYh95o0lW3yzpooqbzOd_BIQNFvMSnErqYj8pKZgmxKMaVPsAWak7Gdy4WuZkAxSK53z0rzP4pBFE4wXH-1lT4TYNpEeiBewH9YpwaQo8UgqoYlTmQ5PY28S_LYHGqdoPTbQczS3QqGq6Oeh7wxqdRwh5fLfbEythRVuleBdQ0becqz2R9EqLqPOSnMlMhWi7-ZtGbQ6KwDbdpu6jT7B1D "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.")**_

clean_body: I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn’t be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities. | | | | | | | | | | "SUBMIT YOUR ANSWERS HERE" | | | Friend, I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities. But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America." I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me? | | "JOIN MY TEAM" I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. I understand the value of a dollar. I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift. "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America."** | | "JOIN MY TEAM" | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Our Revolution
subject: SURVEY: who is more dangerous? Trump or DeSantis?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

The Republican primary for president is
underway, and both of the leading candidates are fascists open about
wanting to crush worker rights, end fair elections, slash environmental
protections, take away reproductive freedom, and give even more power to
billionaires and multinational corporations.

Stopping whoever wins between Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis is a top
priority because if either of them becomes president, we may never have
another fair election or the opportunity to peacefully make progress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Trump_or_DeSantis_sv/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230503_SV_TrumpDeSantis_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_TrumpDeSantis&t=1011&akid=4242%2E5885482%2EQHa2Bz ]That's why we're reaching out to ask: who do you think is more
dangerous for America, Donald Trump or Ron DeSantis?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Trump_or_DeSantis_sv/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230503_SV_TrumpDeSantis_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_TrumpDeSantis&t=1012&akid=4242%2E5885482%2EQHa2Bz ]TAKE OUR SURVEY

Donald Trump was by far the most dangerous president in modern history —
posing as a populist while pursuing policies that impoverish workers, take
away our freedoms, slash safety protections, lower life expectancy for
working families, destroy our environment, and undermine our democracy.
That’s why we’ve worked so hard to demand he’s banned from future
elections for violating the Constitution by leading a violent
insurrection.

However, Ron DeSantis is also an existential threat to democracy. In
Florida, he's pursued authoritarian policies like banning books,
weaponizing hatred against immigrants and the LGBTQ+ community,
criminalizing protests, and signing one of the cruelest abortion bans in
America.

His background before becoming governor is just as concerning. DeSantis
served as a lawyer at Guantanamo Bay, and was tasked with protecting the
human rights of those detained.

Not only has DeSantis repeatedly defended human rights abuses at
Guantanamo, but he's also been credibly accused of listening to prisoner
complaints and instructing guards to make conditions that bothered them
even worse. That kind of cruel indifference to human suffering and the
rule of law is an incredibly dangerous quality to have in a president.

As a member-driven progressive movement, we need to hear from you about
how we should prepare for the threat of a Trump or a DeSantis presidency.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Trump_or_DeSantis_sv/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230503_SV_TrumpDeSantis_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_TrumpDeSantis&t=1013&akid=4242%2E5885482%2EQHa2Bz ]Please take a moment to answer our survey by clicking this link.

When we organize, we win.
Our Revolution

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, The Republican primary for president is underway, and both of the leading candidates are fascists open about wanting to crush worker rights, end fair elections, slash environmental protections, take away reproductive freedom, and give even more power to billionaires and multinational corporations. Stopping whoever wins between Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis is a top priority because if either of them becomes president, we may never have another fair election or the opportunity to peacefully make progress. [ ]That's why we're reaching out to ask: who do you think is more dangerous for America, Donald Trump or Ron DeSantis? [ ]TAKE OUR SURVEY Donald Trump was by far the most dangerous president in modern history — posing as a populist while pursuing policies that impoverish workers, take away our freedoms, slash safety protections, lower life expectancy for working families, destroy our environment, and undermine our democracy. That’s why we’ve worked so hard to demand he’s banned from future elections for violating the Constitution by leading a violent insurrection. However, Ron DeSantis is also an existential threat to democracy. In Florida, he's pursued authoritarian policies like banning books, weaponizing hatred against immigrants and the LGBTQ+ community, criminalizing protests, and signing one of the cruelest abortion bans in America. His background before becoming governor is just as concerning. DeSantis served as a lawyer at Guantanamo Bay, and was tasked with protecting the human rights of those detained. Not only has DeSantis repeatedly defended human rights abuses at Guantanamo, but he's also been credibly accused of listening to prisoner complaints and instructing guards to make conditions that bothered them even worse. That kind of cruel indifference to human suffering and the rule of law is an incredibly dangerous quality to have in a president. As a member-driven progressive movement, we need to hear from you about how we should prepare for the threat of a Trump or a DeSantis presidency. [ ]Please take a moment to answer our survey by clicking this link. When we organize, we win. | | | [](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=ee601e8f9f104e61adc88984bf86456f&_e=wbzM8vGRSN3OGFyuFRHrYuF_aFxdxs5g4a1z28IWkYQv1ztkdKM9sJpXNmxZf7LUDCA-m4uNw0UiEzsho9vf0mA9AhsbKngJ57IAdxWwO9MV6XpuccuYQY05ICOM1n8Bvb4440nNcacoq6STI-iqkhLj6LiOh_qTG2gc4ISFM6RtLwQX75LS9Uc8Qst3hKS17y6ir3gttX-i6q9OHfILNp3HnW0i6gZurWvInyFd0T0jAl36GiUE71pKF8xf4o0isDB_ziUYuIfTIfpc4TxCGfhKHNrc7J2RoALQw0uB3lX_8V2x8IkeCqPInK6g0s5yU1mIh-EpysGa0TE5GndXIXB8hq-I-x96ZOJLhCeCDKo%3D)
