| | Folks, when I first ran for election to become Governor of Mississippi, I had no idea what was coming.

From terrible tornadoes to countless hurricanes and a global pandemic that shut down the whole world, our Mississippi family has been through a ton together.
But I am thankful to you - even through these challenges, Mississippi is creating the strongest momentum in our state's history.
* **We refused to shut down our schools for years, and our test scores show it.**
* **We have the lowest unemployment rate in our history and more people working than ever before.**
* **We have seen the largest economic development investments ever in Mississippi's history.**

And I know with your help, there is even more that we will do. This is Mississippi's moment. This is Mississippi's time.
[**Join our team today and help us ensure that it will always be a beautiful day to wake up in Mississippi.**](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=ee601e8f9f104e61adc88984bf86456f&_e=wbzM8vGRSN3OGFyuFRHrYuF_aFxdxs5g4a1z28IWkYQv1ztkdKM9sJpXNmxZf7LUDCA-m4uNw0UiEzsho9vf0mA9AhsbKngJ57IAdxWwO9MV6XpuccuYQY05ICOM1n8Bvb4440nNcacoq6STI-iqkhLj6LiOh_qTG2gc4ISFM6RtLwQX75LS9Uc8Qst3hKS17y6ir3gttX-i6q9OHfILNg9u_Fv7UQMfmdQ3FabuGJhJ2raShbb9LUnbJJ9etL6CVw6QNwZ4sMybeO_tzi7yldtJI091xFctzXRkdgDMkiGYfTOsTUnyPh85gVaePbHYNiORQubMYH6ILvXPM7TmvcMthrbsg9p5TNll-KIj2TU%3D)

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, when I first ran for election to become Governor of Mississippi, I had no idea what was coming. From terrible tornadoes to countless hurricanes and a global pandemic that shut down the whole world, our Mississippi family has been through a ton together. But I am thankful to you - even through these challenges, Mississippi is creating the strongest momentum in our state's history. We refused to shut down our schools for years, and our test scores show it. We have the lowest unemployment rate in our history and more people working than ever before. We have seen the largest economic development investments ever in Mississippi's history.** And I know with your help, there is even more that we will do. This is Mississippi's moment. This is Mississippi's time. Thank you, Governor Tate Reeves | | | | | | Paid for by Tate for Governor | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Tate for Governor P.O. Box 24355, Jackson, MS 39225

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: No more corporate tax cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Did you catch this last week, Peter?
While GOP “budget hawks” in Congress are trying to cut investments into veterans’ healthcare and infrastructure jobs, they’re ALSO planning to put forward even MORE **corporate tax cuts.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31967?refcode=em20230503-3078&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT)
Here’s my promise: Send me to the U.S. Senate, and you’ll never have to wonder if I’m fighting to invest into everyday Americans over the massive corporations tearing up our country — and any corrupt politician standing in my way won’t have to wonder either.
That’s why we’re building an entirely grassroots movement, without a cent from corporate PACs, to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and put real working people in charge of our country. **But it’s not possible without your help, so Peter:**
**[Will you add your first donation of $10 or whatever you can afford right now so we can get this message in front of voters? Top election watchers agree that our race here in Missouri is Democrats’ top opportunity to flip a Senate seat in 2024 — and your early support is one of the best ways we can make it happen.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31967?refcode=em20230503-3078&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31968?refcode=em20230503-3078&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31968?refcode=em20230503-3078&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31968?refcode=em20230503-3078&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31968?refcode=em20230503-3078&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31968?refcode=em20230503-3078&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31968?refcode=em20230503-3078&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31967?refcode=em20230503-3078&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT)
---
**Anyone saying we can't afford to invest in everyday Americans is a liar.**
When I’m in the U.S. Senate, you’ll always know I’m fighting for the people and communities that make our country strong. That’s why I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money and don’t pull any punches when it comes to taking on Big Pharma, Wall Street, the fossil fuel industry OR their corrupt allies in Congress.
Together, we’re building a people-powered movement so we can invest in our country and make real change happen.
Thanks for being part of it,
Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230503-3078-footer&t=10&refcode2=3078_614464_pc9BDT&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT)**
---

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=3078%2E614464%2Epc9BDT).
